                    const tpTargetId = payload.targetId;
                    if (!tpTargetId) break;
                    const tpTgtEnt = await loadEntity(tpTargetId);
                    if (!tpTgtEnt) break;
                    await commitTravel(tpTargetId, true);
                    api.v1.ui.toast('📍 Teleported to ' + tpTgtEnt.name, { type: 'info', autoClose: 2000 });
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_SILENT_TELEPORT error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_DELETE_CHAR': {
                // [v1.9.1] Bridge "Kill Character" — routes through the SAME confirm+delete
                // path the native character cards and the character edit modal use
                // (confirmDeleteChar -> deleteCharacter), so it scrubs the entity body and
                // fires the portrait cascade instead of leaving an orphaned body behind.
                // The confirm modal is shown engine-side; nothing is deleted until the
                // author confirms. Falls back to the old index-only removal only if the
                // character record can't be loaded (true orphan with no name).
                try {
                    const dcId = payload.charId;
                    if (!dcId) break;
                    const dcChar = await loadCharacter(dcId);
                    if (dcChar) {
                        await confirmDeleteChar(dcId, dcChar.name || 'this character');
                    } else {
                        const dcIdx = await loadIndex();
                        await saveIndex(dcIdx.filter(function(m) { return m.id !== dcId; }));
                        await api.v1.storyStorage.remove(STORAGE_CHAR_PFX + dcId);
                        api.v1.ui.toast('Orphan character removed from index.', { type: 'info', autoClose: 2000 });
                        await broadcastCharacterData();
                        await broadcastSceneState();
                    }
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_DELETE_CHAR error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_SAVE_CHAR_VISUALS': {
                // Bridge gallery saved visual overrides for a character. Merges into CharacterRecord.
                try {
                    const scvId = payload.charId; if (!scvId) break;
                    const scvChar = await loadCharacter(scvId); if (!scvChar) break;
                    if (payload.visuals       !== undefined) scvChar.visuals       = payload.visuals;
                    if (payload.uc            !== undefined) scvChar.uc            = payload.uc;
                    if (payload.avatarVisuals !== undefined) scvChar.avatarVisuals = payload.avatarVisuals;
                    if (payload.avatarWidth   !== undefined) scvChar.avatarWidth   = payload.avatarWidth;
                    if (payload.avatarHeight  !== undefined) scvChar.avatarHeight  = payload.avatarHeight;
                    if (payload.avatarSeed    !== undefined) scvChar.avatarSeed    = payload.avatarSeed;
                    await saveCharacter(scvChar);
                    api.v1.ui.toast('\u2713 Visuals saved \u2014 ' + scvChar.name, { type: 'success', autoClose: 1500 });
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_SAVE_CHAR_VISUALS error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_FETCH_CHAR_PROFILE': {
                // Bridge opened a character's combined HUD profile. Build and push the
                // full editable record (same CharacterRecord the native editor reads).
                try {
                    const fcpId = payload.charId; if (!fcpId) break;
                    const fcpChar = await loadCharacter(fcpId);
                    if (!fcpChar) { await broadcastToTM(EVT_CHAR_PROFILE, { id: fcpId, error: 'Not found' }); break; }
                    const fcpCfg = await loadConfig();
                    const fcpOut = await buildCharProfilePayload(fcpChar, fcpCfg);
                    await broadcastToTM(EVT_CHAR_PROFILE, fcpOut);
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_FETCH_CHAR_PROFILE error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_SAVE_CHAR_FIELD': {
                // Bridge wrote one field in the HUD profile. Merge into the record, keep the
                // linked lorebook entry in sync, then push a fresh profile + coalesced roster
                // refresh so every surface reflects the change. fieldKey routing:
                //   direct string fields | coreValues | nicknames | custom.<id> | sheet.<cat>.<fld> | flag.<name>
                try {
                    const scfId = payload.charId;
                    const scfKey: string = payload.fieldKey || '';
                    if (!scfId || !scfKey) break;
                    let scfChar = await loadCharacter(scfId); if (!scfChar) break;
                    const scfVal = payload.value;
                    const SCF_DIRECT: string[] = ['name','conceptDump','species','age','gender','occupationRole','briefDescription','physicalDescription','personalityCore','voiceAndMannerisms','background'];
                    let scfHandled = true;
                    if (SCF_DIRECT.indexOf(scfKey) >= 0) {
                        (scfChar as any)[scfKey] = String(scfVal === undefined || scfVal === null ? '' : scfVal);
                    } else if (scfKey === 'coreValues') {
                        if (Array.isArray(scfVal)) scfChar.coreValues = scfVal.map(function(x: any) { return String(x).trim(); }).filter(Boolean);
                        else scfChar.coreValues = String(scfVal || '').split(';').map(function(x) { return x.trim(); }).filter(Boolean);
                    } else if (scfKey === 'nicknames') {
                        if (Array.isArray(scfVal)) scfChar.nicknames = scfVal.map(function(x: any) { return String(x).trim(); }).filter(Boolean);
                        else scfChar.nicknames = String(scfVal || '').split(',').map(function(x) { return x.trim(); }).filter(Boolean);
                    } else if (scfKey.indexOf('custom.') === 0) {
                        let scfCfId = scfKey.slice(7);
                        if (!scfChar.customFieldValues) scfChar.customFieldValues = {};
                        scfChar.customFieldValues[scfCfId] = String(scfVal === undefined ? '' : scfVal);
                    } else if (scfKey.indexOf('sheet.') === 0) {
                        let scfRef = scfKey.slice(6);
                        let scfParts = scfRef.split('.');
                        if (scfParts.length === 2) {
                            let scfDot = scfParts[0] + '.' + scfParts[1];
                            let scfUnd = scfParts[0] + '_' + scfParts[1];
                            if (!scfChar.sheetValues) scfChar.sheetValues = {};
                            scfChar.sheetValues[scfDot] = String(scfVal === undefined ? '' : scfVal);
                            scfChar.sheetValues[scfUnd] = scfChar.sheetValues[scfDot];
                        } else { scfHandled = false; }
                    } else if (scfKey.indexOf('flag.') === 0) {
                        let scfFlag = scfKey.slice(5);
                        let scfBool = !!scfVal;
                        if (scfFlag === 'charContextEnabled') scfChar.charContextEnabled = scfBool;
                        else if (scfFlag === 'autoUpdateEnabled') scfChar.autoUpdateEnabled = scfBool;
                        else if (scfFlag === 'autoThoughtsEnabled') scfChar.autoThoughtsEnabled = scfBool;
                        else if (scfFlag === 'hooksEnabled') scfChar.hooksEnabled = scfBool;
                        else scfHandled = false;
                    } else {
                        scfHandled = false;
                    }
                    if (!scfHandled) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_SAVE_CHAR_FIELD unknown key: ' + scfKey); break; }
                    await saveCharacter(scfChar);
                    try { await syncLorebookEntry(scfChar.id, true); } catch (eScfLb) { /* non-fatal: lore sync best-effort */ }
                    const scfCfg = await loadConfig();
                    const scfOut = await buildCharProfilePayload(scfChar, scfCfg);
                    await broadcastToTM(EVT_CHAR_PROFILE, scfOut);
                    queueCharacterDataBroadcast();
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_SAVE_CHAR_FIELD error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_GEN_SLOT_OPTIONS': {
                // [v2.72.0 SLOT-OPTIONS] Return N candidate values for ONE field. Resolves the
                // field's instructions from cfg.customStaticFields first (slot/facet defs live
                // there) and falls back to STATIC_FIELD_DEFS for the four core narrative fields,
                // so the same message serves both. Writes nothing — the bridge picks, then saves
                // through AE_SAVE_CHAR_FIELD like any other edit.
                try {
                    const gsoId = payload.charId;
                    const gsoKey: string = payload.fieldKey || '';
                    if (!gsoId || !gsoKey) break;
                    const gsoChar = await loadCharacter(gsoId); if (!gsoChar) break;
                    const gsoCfg = await loadConfig();

                    let gsoLabel = '';
                    let gsoInst  = '';
                    let gsoBudget = 150;
                    const gsoCustom = (gsoCfg.customStaticFields || []).find(function(f: any) { return f && f.id === gsoKey; });
                    if (gsoCustom) {
                        gsoLabel  = gsoCustom.label || gsoKey;
                        gsoInst   = gsoCustom.instructions || '';
                        gsoBudget = (gsoCfg.fieldBudgets && gsoCfg.fieldBudgets[gsoKey]) || 150;
                    } else {
                        const gsoDef = STATIC_FIELD_DEFS.find(function(d: any) { return d.key === gsoKey; });
                        if (!gsoDef) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_GEN_SLOT_OPTIONS unknown field: ' + gsoKey); break; }
                        gsoLabel  = (gsoCfg.fieldLabels && gsoCfg.fieldLabels[gsoKey]) || gsoDef.label;
                        gsoInst   = (gsoCfg.fieldInstructions && gsoCfg.fieldInstructions[gsoKey]) || gsoDef.defaultInstructions;
                        gsoBudget = (gsoCfg.fieldBudgets && gsoCfg.fieldBudgets[gsoKey]) || gsoDef.defaultBudget;
                    }
                    if (!gsoInst.trim()) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_GEN_SLOT_OPTIONS no instructions for: ' + gsoKey); break; }

                    const gsoCount = Math.max(2, Math.min(5, Number(payload.count) || 3));

                    // [v2.74.0 GEN-BUDGET] Pre-flight. generateSlotOptions asks for
                    // (budget + 30) * count + 40 output tokens; if the allowance cannot cover
                    // that, fail HERE with a reason rather than firing a call that comes back
                    // empty and looks like a model failure. A budget refusal and a bad
                    // generation need different advice, so they must not share a message.
                    const gsoNeed = (gsoBudget + 30) * gsoCount + 40;
                    const gsoBud = aeBudgetReport(gsoNeed);
                    if (gsoBud.out >= 0 && gsoBud.out < gsoNeed) {
                        api.v1.ui.toast('Not enough generation budget for ' + gsoLabel + '.', { id: 'ce-slotopts', type: 'warning', autoClose: 2500 });
                        await broadcastToTM(EVT_SLOT_OPTIONS, {
                            charId: gsoId, fieldKey: gsoKey, label: gsoLabel, options: [],
                            ok: false, reason: 'budget', budget: gsoBud
                        });
                        break;
                    }

                    api.v1.ui.toast('Generating ' + gsoCount + ' options for ' + gsoLabel + '\u2026', { id: 'ce-slotopts', type: 'info', autoClose: false });
                    const gsoOut = await generateSlotOptions(
                        gsoChar, gsoLabel, gsoInst, gsoCfg.generalStyle || '', payload.hint || '',
                        gsoBudget, gsoCount, payload.divergence || '',
                        { includeStory: !!payload.includeStory }
                    );
                    if (!gsoOut || !gsoOut.length) {
                        // Budget was sufficient at pre-flight, so an empty return is the model
                        // or the transport, not the allowance — reported as 'empty' so the
                        // bridge can say "try again" instead of "wait".
                        api.v1.ui.toast('Option generation came back empty.', { id: 'ce-slotopts', type: 'error', autoClose: 2000 });
                        await broadcastToTM(EVT_SLOT_OPTIONS, {
                            charId: gsoId, fieldKey: gsoKey, label: gsoLabel, options: [],
                            ok: false, reason: 'empty', budget: aeBudgetReport(0)
                        });
                        break;
                    }
                    api.v1.ui.toast('Generated ' + gsoOut.length + '.', { id: 'ce-slotopts', type: 'success', autoClose: 1200 });
                    await broadcastToTM(EVT_SLOT_OPTIONS, {
                        charId: gsoId, fieldKey: gsoKey, label: gsoLabel, options: gsoOut,
                        ok: true, budget: aeBudgetReport(0)
                    });
                } catch (e) {
                    aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_GEN_SLOT_OPTIONS error:', e);
                    // A throw reaches here having already passed pre-flight, so it is a real
                    // error, not an allowance problem. Report it as such and always release
                    // the bridge's busy state — a silent throw leaves the button spinning.
                    try {
                        await broadcastToTM(EVT_SLOT_OPTIONS, {
                            charId: payload.charId, fieldKey: payload.fieldKey || '', label: '',
                            options: [], ok: false, reason: 'error',
                            detail: String((e as any) && ((e as any).message || e)), budget: aeBudgetReport(0)
                        });
                    } catch (e2) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_GEN_SLOT_OPTIONS error-report failed:', e2); }
                }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_REGEN_CHAR_FIELD': {
                // Regenerate ONE narrative field from the concept dump (seed-and-go). Reuses
                // generateCharacterFields, applies only the requested key, pushes refreshed profile.
                try {
                    const rcfId = payload.charId;
                    const rcfKey: string = payload.fieldKey || '';
                    if (!rcfId || !rcfKey) break;
                    if (REGENERABLE_CHAR_FIELDS.indexOf(rcfKey) < 0) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_REGEN_CHAR_FIELD non-regenerable key: ' + rcfKey); break; }
                    let rcfChar = await loadCharacter(rcfId); if (!rcfChar) break;
                    if (!(rcfChar.conceptDump || '').trim()) {
                        api.v1.ui.toast('No concept profile to regenerate from \u2014 add a concept dump first.', { type: 'warning', autoClose: 2500 });
                        break;
                    }
                    api.v1.ui.toast('Regenerating ' + rcfKey + ' for ' + rcfChar.name + '\u2026', { type: 'info', autoClose: 1500 });
                    // [v0.9.100] Per-field generation with optional hint for the four narrative
                    // fields (matches the native editor's auto-generate buttons via generateFieldContent).
                    // Other fields fall back to dump-only generateCharacterFields.
                    let rcfHint: string = (payload.hint || '').toString();
                    let rcfDef = STATIC_FIELD_DEFS.find(function(d: any) { return d.key === rcfKey; });
                    if (rcfDef) {
                        let rcfCfg = await loadConfig();
                        let rcfLabel = (rcfCfg.fieldLabels && rcfCfg.fieldLabels[rcfKey]) || rcfDef.label;
                        let rcfInst  = (rcfCfg.fieldInstructions && rcfCfg.fieldInstructions[rcfKey]) || rcfDef.defaultInstructions;
                        let rcfBudget = (rcfCfg.fieldBudgets && rcfCfg.fieldBudgets[rcfKey]) || rcfDef.defaultBudget;
                        let rcfVal = await generateFieldContent(rcfChar, rcfLabel, rcfInst, rcfCfg.generalStyle || '', rcfHint, rcfBudget);
                        if (rcfVal === null) { api.v1.ui.toast('Regeneration failed.', { type: 'error' }); break; }
                        (rcfChar as any)[rcfKey] = rcfVal;
                    } else {
                        let rcfFields = await generateCharacterFields(rcfChar.name, rcfChar.conceptDump || '');
                        if (!rcfFields) { api.v1.ui.toast('Regeneration failed.', { type: 'error' }); break; }
                        if (rcfKey === 'coreValues') rcfChar.coreValues = (rcfFields as any).coreValues || [];
                        else (rcfChar as any)[rcfKey] = (rcfFields as any)[rcfKey] || '';
                    }
                    await saveCharacter(rcfChar);
                    try { await syncLorebookEntry(rcfChar.id, true); } catch (eRcfLb) { /* non-fatal: lore sync best-effort */ }
                    const rcfCfg = await loadConfig();
                    const rcfOut = await buildCharProfilePayload(rcfChar, rcfCfg);
                    await broadcastToTM(EVT_CHAR_PROFILE, rcfOut);
                    queueCharacterDataBroadcast();
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_REGEN_CHAR_FIELD error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_WIZ_FETCH_STATE': {
                try { await broadcastToTM(EVT_WIZ_STATE, await buildWizardStatePayload()); }
                catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_WIZ_FETCH_STATE error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_WIZ_MODE': {
                // [v1.2.0 WIZMODE] Bridge reports the wizard tab/modal opening or closing.
                try { await aeSetWizardMode(!!(payload && payload.on)); }
                catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_WIZ_MODE error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_WIZLIVE_START': {
                // [v2.4.0 WIZLIVE] Open an in-document wizard chat. payload: { topicId? }
                try { await startLiveWizardChat(payload && payload.topicId ? String(payload.topicId) : ''); }
                catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_WIZLIVE_START error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_WIZLIVE_END': {
                // [v2.4.0 WIZLIVE] Close it. payload: { action: 'save'|'discard' } ([v2.5.0] save -> CE Chats lorebook)
                try { await endLiveWizardChat(payload && payload.action ? String(payload.action) : 'save'); }
                catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_WIZLIVE_END error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_WIZLIVE_FETCH': {
                // [v2.4.0 WIZLIVE] Bridge tab opened — echo current live-chat state.
                try { await broadcastWizLiveState(); }
                catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_WIZLIVE_FETCH error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            // [v2.21.0 CHARCHAT; comment corrected v2.55.0] The bridge DOES drive these now:
            // the native Chat toolbar button remains a working entry point, but bridge v2.42.0's
            // chat-manager (a close button below the HUD toggle + summarize/delete controls)
            // sends AE_CHARCHAT_END and AE_CHARCHAT_SUMMARIZE. AE_CHARCHAT_START/_FETCH are
            // driven by the launcher. (The old "bridge does not send any of these yet / HUD
            // panel is P6" note was stale.)
            case 'AE_CHARCHAT_START': {
                // payload: { contactId, povId? }
                try { await startCharChat(payload && payload.contactId ? String(payload.contactId) : '', payload && payload.povId ? String(payload.povId) : ''); }
                catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_CHARCHAT_START error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_CHARCHAT_END': {
                // payload: { action: 'save'|'discard' }. Both ship (see EVT_CHARCHAT_END).
                // Default 'discard' guards a malformed payload — the destructive-but-recoverable
                // choice (the document is stripped either way; 'save' also banks the thread).
                try { await endCharChat(payload && payload.action ? String(payload.action) : 'discard'); }
                catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_CHARCHAT_END error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_CHARCHAT_SUMMARIZE': {
                // [v2.55.0 CHARCHAT-MANAGER] Bridge chat-manager "summarize" button. Same body
                // as the native Chat-button picker's 'summarize' branch: preview, then open the
                // engine's own editable summary modal. Keeps the chat open; nothing crosses back.
                try {
                    let ccSum = await previewSummarizeCharChat();
                    if (!ccSum) { api.v1.ui.toast('Nothing to summarize yet.', { type: 'warning', autoClose: 3000 }); break; }
                    _charchatSummaryPreview = ccSum;
                    await _charchatShowSummaryModal();
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_CHARCHAT_SUMMARIZE error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_CHARCHAT_FETCH': {
                try { await broadcastCharChatState(); }
                catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_CHARCHAT_FETCH error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            // [v2.51.5 CHARCHAT-THREADS] Bridge's Chat launcher asks for the saved-thread
            // roster (message counts per contact/POV pair). Thin wrapper over
            // listCharChatThreads via broadcastCharChatThreads — see the EVT_CHARCHAT_THREADS_*
            // constants. Bridge fetches this once per Chat-view open.
            case 'AE_CHARCHAT_THREADS_REQ': {
                try { await broadcastCharChatThreads(); }
                catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_CHARCHAT_THREADS_REQ error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            // [v2.32.0 CHARCHAT-HUD] ONE dispatcher for every chat verb, per the bridge's
            // own CE-INDEX convention ("add new verbs as new 'op' values, not new
            // sendToEngine event names, unless the payload shape genuinely differs") —
            // the same shape AE_JOURNAL_ACTION already uses.
            //   op:'stage'   { text }        [v2.33.0] append a POV turn and STOP — the
            //                                user's own tap on NAI's native Send is what
            //                                generates. This is what the bridge sends;
            //                                see CHARCHAT-NATIVE-SEND in the CE-INDEX.
            //   op:'send'    { text }        append a POV turn, then generate (native
            //                                path only — budget-capped from a postMessage)
            //   op:'nudge'   {}              generate with no new message
            //   op:'regen'   {}              drop the last contact turn, generate again
            //   op:'edit'    { ids, text }   rewrite a turn in place
            //   op:'remove'  { ids }         delete a turn
            case 'AE_CHARCHAT_ACTION': {
                try { await handleCharChatAction(payload || {}); }
                catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_CHARCHAT_ACTION error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_SET_PROJECT': {
                // [v0.9.7.0 SETUP] HUD Setup tab writes project name/genre/concept; echo fresh state.
                try {
                    await mutConfig(function(c) {
                        if (payload.name !== undefined)    c.projectName = String(payload.name);
                        if (payload.genre !== undefined)   c.projectGenre = String(payload.genre);
                        if (payload.concept !== undefined) c.projectConcept = String(payload.concept);
                    });
                    await broadcastToTM(EVT_WIZ_STATE, await buildWizardStatePayload());
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_SET_PROJECT error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_WIZ_NEW_CHAT': {
                try {
                    const wncTopic = payload.topicId || (DEFAULT_WIZARD_TOPICS[0] ? DEFAULT_WIZARD_TOPICS[0].id : 'topic_concept');
                    const wncChat = await createWizardChat(wncTopic, payload.title || 'New Chat');
                    await api.v1.tempStorage.set(STORAGE_WIZ_ACTIVE_CHAT, wncChat.id);
                    await broadcastToTM(EVT_WIZ_STATE, await buildWizardStatePayload());
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_WIZ_NEW_CHAT error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_WIZ_SELECT_CHAT': {
                try {
                    if (payload.chatId) await api.v1.tempStorage.set(STORAGE_WIZ_ACTIVE_CHAT, payload.chatId);
                    await broadcastToTM(EVT_WIZ_STATE, await buildWizardStatePayload());
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_WIZ_SELECT_CHAT error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_WIZ_DELETE_CHAT': {
                try {
                    if (payload.chatId) {
                        await deleteWizardChat(payload.chatId);
                        delete _wizFrozenCtx[payload.chatId]; // [v1.2.0 WIZMODE] drop any frozen context for the deleted chat
                        let wdActive = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_WIZ_ACTIVE_CHAT, '') as string;
                        if (wdActive === payload.chatId) await api.v1.tempStorage.set(STORAGE_WIZ_ACTIVE_CHAT, '');
                    }
                    await broadcastToTM(EVT_WIZ_STATE, await buildWizardStatePayload());
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_WIZ_DELETE_CHAT error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_WIZ_RENAME_CHAT': {
                try {
                    if (payload.chatId && payload.title !== undefined) {
                        let wrChat = await loadWizardChat(payload.chatId);
                        if (wrChat) { wrChat.title = String(payload.title).slice(0, 80) || 'Untitled'; await saveWizardChat(wrChat); }
                    }
                    await broadcastToTM(EVT_WIZ_STATE, await buildWizardStatePayload());
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_WIZ_RENAME_CHAT error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_WIZ_SEND': {
                // Run one wizard chat turn (yoink generation, no budget cost). The turn
                // function persists both messages; we then push reply signal + fresh state.
                try {
                    const wsId = payload.chatId;
                    const wsText: string = payload.text || '';
                    if (!wsId) break;
                    let wsReply = await runWizardChatTurn(wsId, wsText);
                    await broadcastToTM(EVT_WIZ_REPLY, { chatId: wsId, ok: wsReply !== null, error: wsReply === null ? 'Generation failed' : '' });
                    await broadcastToTM(EVT_WIZ_STATE, await buildWizardStatePayload());
                } catch (e) {
                    aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_WIZ_SEND error:', e);
                    try { await broadcastToTM(EVT_WIZ_REPLY, { chatId: payload.chatId, ok: false, error: 'Turn failed' }); } catch (eWs2) {}
                }
                break;
            }

            // [v2.66.0 DIAG-CMD] The surface-independent replacement for v2.65.0's
            // wizard-chat-only /log and /diag commands (see aeHandleDiagCommand's own
            // header comment for why that placement was wrong). No document write, no
            // generation, no budget cost — pure storage read/write plus a reply broadcast.
            case 'AE_DIAG_CMD': {
                try {
                    const dcRaw: string = String((payload && payload.cmd) || '').trim();
                    const dcLower = dcRaw.toLowerCase();
                    let dcOut = await aeHandleDiagCommand(dcRaw, dcLower);
                    if (dcOut === null) dcOut = 'Not a recognized command: "' + dcRaw + '". Try /log list or /diag list.';
                    await broadcastToTM(EVT_DIAG_REPLY, { cmd: dcRaw, out: dcOut });
                } catch (eDc) {
                    aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_DIAG_CMD error:', eDc);
                    try { await broadcastToTM(EVT_DIAG_REPLY, { cmd: (payload && payload.cmd) || '', out: 'Command failed \u2014 see engine console.' }); } catch (eDc2) {}
                }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_WIZ_LIST_CONTEXT_SOURCES': {
                try { await broadcastToTM(EVT_WIZ_CONTEXT_SOURCES, await buildWizardSourcesPayload(payload.chatId || '')); }
                catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_WIZ_LIST_CONTEXT_SOURCES error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_WIZ_SET_CHAT_CONTEXT': {
                // Persist a chat's context selection. characterIds resolve to their linked
                // lorebook entries (created lazily if missing), then merged into lorebookEntryIds
                // so buildWizardContext picks them up with no new context source.
                try {
                    const wscId = payload.chatId;
                    if (!wscId) break;
                    let wscChat = await loadWizardChat(wscId);
                    if (!wscChat) break;
                    wscChat.contextChatIds = Array.isArray(payload.contextChatIds) ? payload.contextChatIds : [];
                    wscChat.includeStory = !!payload.includeStory;
                    wscChat.lorebookEntryIds = Array.isArray(payload.lorebookEntryIds) ? payload.lorebookEntryIds : [];
                    wscChat.characterIds = Array.isArray(payload.characterIds) ? payload.characterIds : [];
                    await saveWizardChat(wscChat);
                    delete _wizFrozenCtx[wscId]; // [v1.2.0 WIZMODE] source selection changed — force a fresh context build next turn
                    await broadcastToTM(EVT_WIZ_CONTEXT_SOURCES, await buildWizardSourcesPayload(wscId));
                    await broadcastToTM(EVT_WIZ_STATE, await buildWizardStatePayload());
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_WIZ_SET_CHAT_CONTEXT error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_WIZ_EDIT_MSG': {
                try {
                    let wemChat = await loadWizardChat(payload.chatId);
                    let wemIdx = payload.index;
                    if (wemChat && wemChat.messages && wemIdx >= 0 && wemIdx < wemChat.messages.length && payload.content !== undefined) {
                        wemChat.messages[wemIdx].content = String(payload.content);
                        // [v1.23.0] notesCache keys on message COUNT, which an in-place edit
                        // does not change. Drop it so the next generation re-distills.
                        wemChat.notesCache = undefined;
                        await saveWizardChat(wemChat);
                    }
                    await broadcastToTM(EVT_WIZ_STATE, await buildWizardStatePayload());
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_WIZ_EDIT_MSG error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_WIZ_DELETE_MSG': {
                try {
                    let wdmChat = await loadWizardChat(payload.chatId);
                    let wdmIdx = payload.index;
                    if (wdmChat && wdmChat.messages && wdmIdx >= 0 && wdmIdx < wdmChat.messages.length) {
                        wdmChat.messages.splice(wdmIdx, 1);
                        await saveWizardChat(wdmChat);
                    }
                    await broadcastToTM(EVT_WIZ_STATE, await buildWizardStatePayload());
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_WIZ_DELETE_MSG error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_WIZ_GENERATE': {
                // Unified review/commit dispatcher. Routes a kind to its existing batch
                // function (no recreation), then pushes a result + the relevant refresh.
                try {
                    const wgKind: string = payload.kind || '';
                    const wgCount: number = Math.max(1, Math.min(10, payload.count || 1));
                    const wgSrc: string[] = Array.isArray(payload.sourceChatIds) ? payload.sourceChatIds : [];
                    let wgMade = 0; let wgOk = true;
                    api.v1.ui.toast('Generating ' + wgKind + '\u2026', { type: 'info', autoClose: 1500 });
                    if (wgKind === 'species')        wgMade = await runWizardSpeciesBatch(wgCount, wgSrc);
                    else if (wgKind === 'factions')  wgMade = await runWizardFactionsBatch(wgCount, wgSrc);
                    // [CE-STRIP v2.1.6] 'archetypes'/'items' kinds removed — Bestiary + Item Templates cut.
                    else if (wgKind === 'locations') wgMade = await runWizardLocationsBatch(wgCount, payload.parentId || null, wgSrc);
                    else if (wgKind === 'characters') wgMade = await runWizardCharactersBatch(wgCount, wgSrc);
                    else if (wgKind === 'web')       wgMade = await runWizardWebBatch(wgCount, wgSrc);
                    else if (wgKind === 'narratives') wgMade = await runWizardNarrativesBatch(wgCount, wgSrc);
                    else if (wgKind === 'hooks')     wgMade = await runWizardHooksBatch(Array.isArray(payload.charIds) ? payload.charIds : [], wgSrc);
                    // [v1.6.3 INTRO-STAGE] 'intro' now stages an editable draft (no story write);
                    // commit happens separately (native wizard Commit button / commitIntroDraft).
                    else if (wgKind === 'intro')     { wgOk = await generateIntroDraft(payload.locationId || '', wgSrc); wgMade = wgOk ? 1 : 0; }
                    else { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_WIZ_GENERATE unknown kind: ' + wgKind); wgOk = false; }
                    if (wgKind === 'characters' || wgKind === 'hooks' || wgKind === 'web') queueCharacterDataBroadcast();
                    await broadcastToTM(EVT_WIZ_GEN_RESULT, { kind: wgKind, count: wgMade, ok: wgOk });
                    await broadcastToTM(EVT_WIZ_STATE, await buildWizardStatePayload());
                } catch (e) {
                    aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_WIZ_GENERATE error:', e);
                    try { await broadcastToTM(EVT_WIZ_GEN_RESULT, { kind: payload.kind, count: 0, ok: false }); } catch (eWg2) {}
                }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_WIZ_COMMIT_MEMORY': {
                try {
                    api.v1.ui.toast('Building memory\u2026', { type: 'info', autoClose: 1500 });
                    let wcmCount = await runWizardMemoryFanout(payload.chatId || '');
                    let wcmCfg = await loadConfig();
                    let wcmOk = await commitWizardMemory(wcmCfg);
                    await broadcastToTM(EVT_WIZ_GEN_RESULT, { kind: 'memory', count: wcmCount, ok: wcmOk });
                } catch (e) {
                    aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_WIZ_COMMIT_MEMORY error:', e);
                    try { await broadcastToTM(EVT_WIZ_GEN_RESULT, { kind: 'memory', count: 0, ok: false }); } catch (eWcm2) {}
                }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_SYNC_LOREBOOK': {
                // [v0.9.7.6] Tab-level "Sync to Lorebook": create-or-update every entry
                // of one kind (species|factions|characters|locations). Reuses the engine's
                // existing per-item create/sync fns (silent), with one summary toast.
                try {
                    const slKind: string = payload.kind || '';
                    let slCreated = 0; let slSynced = 0; let slFailed = 0; let slSkipped = 0;
                    if (slKind === 'species') {
                        const slCfgSp = await loadConfig();
                        for (const sp of ((slCfgSp.species || []) as any[])) {
                            try {
                                if (sp.lorebookEntryId) { await syncSpeciesLorebookEntry(sp.id, true); slSynced++; }
                                else { await createLinkedSpeciesLorebookEntry(sp.id, true); slCreated++; }
                            } catch (eSp) { slFailed++; }
                        }
                    } else if (slKind === 'factions') {
                        const slCfgFa = await loadConfig();
                        for (const fa of ((slCfgFa.factions || []) as any[])) {
                            try {
                                if (fa.lorebookEntryId) { await syncFactionLorebookEntry(fa.id, true); slSynced++; }
                                else { await createLinkedFactionLorebookEntry(fa.id, true); slCreated++; }
                            } catch (eFa) { slFailed++; }
                        }
                    } else if (slKind === 'characters') {
                        const slIdx = await loadIndex();
                        for (const slCm of slIdx) {
                            try {
                                const slCh = await loadCharacter(slCm.id);
                                if (!slCh) { slSkipped++; continue; }
                                if (slCh.lorebookEntryId) { await syncLorebookEntry(slCm.id, true); slSynced++; }
                                else { await createLinkedLorebookEntry(slCm.id, true); slCreated++; }
                            } catch (eCh) { slFailed++; }
                        }
                    } else if (slKind === 'locations') {
                        const slEnts = await loadEntityIndex();
                        for (const slLm of slEnts) {
                            if ((slLm as any).type !== 'location') continue;
                            try {
                                const slLoc = await loadEntity(slLm.id);
                                if (!slLoc) { slSkipped++; continue; }
                                if ((slLoc as any).lorebookEntryId) { await syncEntityLorebookEntry(slLm.id, true); slSynced++; }
                                else if (((slLoc as any).lorebookText || '').trim()) { await createLinkedEntityLorebookEntry(slLm.id, true); slCreated++; }
                                else { slSkipped++; }
                            } catch (eLc) { slFailed++; }
                        }
                    } else {
                        api.v1.ui.toast('Unknown lorebook sync kind.', { type: 'error', autoClose: 2500 });
                        break;
                    }
                    let slMsg = 'Lorebook: ' + slCreated + ' created, ' + slSynced + ' updated';
                    if (slSkipped) slMsg += ', ' + slSkipped + ' skipped';
                    if (slFailed)  slMsg += ', ' + slFailed + ' failed';
                    slMsg += '.';
                    api.v1.ui.toast(slMsg, { type: slFailed ? 'warning' : 'success', autoClose: 3500 });
                    try { await broadcastToTM('AE_SYNC_LOREBOOK_RESULT', { kind: slKind, text: slMsg, ok: !slFailed }); } catch (eSLb) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] sync result broadcast failed'); }
                } catch (eSL) {
                    aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_SYNC_LOREBOOK error:', eSL);
                    api.v1.ui.toast('Lorebook sync failed.', { type: 'error', autoClose: 3000 });
                }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_WIZ_LIST_ENTITIES': {
                try { await broadcastToTM(EVT_WIZ_ENTITIES, await buildWizardEntitiesPayload(payload.kind || '')); }
                catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_WIZ_LIST_ENTITIES error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_WIZ_CREATE_ENTITY': {
                // Create a blank named entity so its fields can then be generated.
                try {
                    const wceKind: string = payload.kind || '';
                    const wceName: string = (payload.name || '').toString().trim();
                    if (wceKind === 'memory') {
                        await mutConfig(function(c) {
                            if (!c.wizardSections) c.wizardSections = [];
                            c.wizardSections.push({ id: 'wsec_' + generateId(), label: wceName || 'New Section', enabled: true, content: '', instructions: '', target: 'memory' });
                        });
                    } else if (wceKind === 'species' || wceKind === 'factions') {
                        let wceEk = (wceKind === 'factions') ? 'faction' : 'species';
                        let wceId = await addBlankWizardEntity(wceEk);
                        if (wceName) {
                            await mutConfig(function(c) {
                                let arr: any[] = (wceEk === 'faction') ? (c.factions || []) : (c.species || []);
                                let t = arr.find(function(x) { return x.id === wceId; });
                                if (t) t.name = wceName;
                            });
                            if (wceEk === 'faction') await syncFactionLorebookEntry(wceId).catch(function() {});
                            else await syncSpeciesLorebookEntry(wceId).catch(function() {});
                        }
                    }
                    await broadcastToTM(EVT_WIZ_ENTITIES, await buildWizardEntitiesPayload(wceKind));
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_WIZ_CREATE_ENTITY error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_WIZ_SAVE_ENTITY': {
                try {
                    const wseKind: string = payload.kind || '';
                    const wseId: string = payload.id || '';
                    if (!wseId) break;
                    if (wseKind === 'memory') {
                        await mutConfig(function(c) {
                            let sec = (c.wizardSections || []).find(function(s) { return s.id === wseId; });
                            if (!sec) return;
                            if (payload.name !== undefined) sec.label = String(payload.name);
                            if (payload.content !== undefined) sec.content = String(payload.content);
                            if (payload.enabled !== undefined) sec.enabled = !!payload.enabled;
                            if (payload.target !== undefined && (payload.target === 'memory' || payload.target === 'an')) sec.target = payload.target;
                            if (payload.instructions !== undefined) sec.instructions = String(payload.instructions);
                        });
                    } else if (wseKind === 'species' || wseKind === 'factions') {
                        let wseEk = (wseKind === 'factions') ? 'faction' : 'species';
                        await mutConfig(function(c) {
                            let arr: any[] = (wseEk === 'faction') ? (c.factions || []) : (c.species || []);
                            let t = arr.find(function(x) { return x.id === wseId; });
                            if (!t) return;
                            if (payload.name !== undefined) t.name = String(payload.name);
                            if (payload.content !== undefined) t.description = String(payload.content);
                            if (wseEk === 'faction' && Array.isArray(payload.relationshipStates)) {
                                t.relationshipStates = payload.relationshipStates.map(function(rs: any) { return String(rs); }).filter(function(rs: string) { return rs.trim().length > 0; });
                            }
                        });
                        if (wseEk === 'faction') await syncFactionLorebookEntry(wseId).catch(function() {});
                        else await syncSpeciesLorebookEntry(wseId).catch(function() {});
                    }
                    await broadcastToTM(EVT_WIZ_ENTITIES, await buildWizardEntitiesPayload(wseKind));
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_WIZ_SAVE_ENTITY error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_WIZ_REGEN_ENTITY': {
                try {
                    const wreKind: string = payload.kind || '';
                    const wreId: string = payload.id || '';
                    const wreHint: string = (payload.hint || '').toString();
                    const wreSrc: string[] = Array.isArray(payload.sourceChatIds) ? payload.sourceChatIds : [];
                    if (!wreId) break;
                    api.v1.ui.toast('Regenerating\u2026', { type: 'info', autoClose: 1200 });
                    let wreOk = false;
                    if (wreKind === 'memory') { let r = await regenerateWizardSection(wreId, wreSrc, wreHint); wreOk = r !== null; }
                    else if (wreKind === 'species') { let r = await regenerateWizardEntity('species', wreId, wreSrc, wreHint); wreOk = r !== null; }
                    else if (wreKind === 'factions') { let r = await regenerateWizardEntity('faction', wreId, wreSrc, wreHint); wreOk = r !== null; }
                    if (!wreOk) api.v1.ui.toast('Regeneration failed.', { type: 'error', autoClose: 2000 });
                    await broadcastToTM(EVT_WIZ_ENTITIES, await buildWizardEntitiesPayload(wreKind));
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_WIZ_REGEN_ENTITY error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_WIZ_DELETE_ENTITY': {
                try {
                    const wdeKind: string = payload.kind || '';
                    const wdeId: string = payload.id || '';
                    if (!wdeId) break;
                    if (wdeKind === 'memory') {
                        await mutConfig(function(c) { c.wizardSections = (c.wizardSections || []).filter(function(s) { return s.id !== wdeId; }); });
                    } else if (wdeKind === 'species' || wdeKind === 'factions') {
                        await mutConfig(function(c) {
                            if (wdeKind === 'factions') c.factions = (c.factions || []).filter(function(x: any) { return x.id !== wdeId; });
                            else c.species = (c.species || []).filter(function(x: any) { return x.id !== wdeId; });
                        });
                    }
                    await broadcastToTM(EVT_WIZ_ENTITIES, await buildWizardEntitiesPayload(wdeKind));
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_WIZ_DELETE_ENTITY error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_FETCH_GALLERY_LOCATIONS': {
                // [v0.9.94 LOCHIER] Enhanced payload: adds parentId, childCount, lorebookText,
                // icon so the bridge can build a true hierarchy navigator.
                try {
                    const listMeta = await loadEntityIndex();
                    const locations = [];
                    for (const m of listMeta) {
                        if (m.type === 'location') {
                            const rec = await loadEntity(m.id);
                            if (rec) {
                                locations.push({
                                    id: rec.id,
                                    name: rec.name,
                                    parentId: rec.parentId,
                                    description: rec.description || '',
                                    atmosphere: rec.atmosphere || '',
                                    locationVisuals: (rec as any).locationVisuals || '',
                                    lorebookText: rec.lorebookText || '',
                                    lorebookEntryId: rec.lorebookEntryId || '',
                                    icon: rec.icon || '',
                                    childCount: m.childCount || 0
                                });
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    await broadcastToTM('AE_GALLERY_LOCATIONS_RESPONSE', { locations: locations });
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_FETCH_GALLERY_LOCATIONS error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_SAVE_LOCATION_VISUALS': {
                // [v0.9.94 LOCHIER] Now accepts description + lorebookText from the HUD
                // location profile in addition to the existing visuals field.
                try {
                    const vlId = payload.locationId;
                    if (vlId) {
                        const vlRec = await loadEntity(vlId);
                        if (vlRec) {
                            if (payload.visuals     !== undefined) (vlRec as any).locationVisuals = payload.visuals;
                            if (payload.description !== undefined) vlRec.description = payload.description;
                            if (payload.lorebookText !== undefined) vlRec.lorebookText = payload.lorebookText;
                            await saveEntity(vlRec);
                            try {
                                // Re-sync the linked lorebook entry if one exists
                                if (vlRec.lorebookEntryId) {
                                    const vlEntry = await api.v1.lorebook.entry(vlRec.lorebookEntryId);
                                    if (vlEntry) {
                                        let vlText = vlRec.description || '';
                                        if (vlRec.lorebookText) vlText += '\n\n' + vlRec.lorebookText;
                                        vlEntry.text = vlText.trim();
                                        await api.v1.lorebook.updateEntry(vlRec.lorebookEntryId, vlEntry);
                                    }
                                }
                            } catch (eLocLb) { /* non-fatal: lorebook re-sync best-effort */ }
                            api.v1.ui.toast('\u2713 Location saved', { type: 'success', autoClose: 1500 });
                        }
                    }
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_SAVE_LOCATION_VISUALS error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_ASK_RESPONSE': {
                // [v0.9.23 X2] Bridge resolved an __ask__ picker; unblock the waiting Promise.
                try {
                    let askRes = _pendingBridgeResolves[payload.promptId];
                    if (askRes) { delete _pendingBridgeResolves[payload.promptId]; askRes(payload.value !== undefined ? payload.value : null); }
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE] AE_ASK_RESPONSE error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_TARGET_SELECTED': {
                // [v0.9.23 X1] Bridge resolved a target pick; unblock the waiting Promise.
                try {
                    let tgtRes = _pendingBridgeResolves[payload.promptId];
                    if (tgtRes) { delete _pendingBridgeResolves[payload.promptId]; tgtRes(payload.targetId || null); }
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE] AE_TARGET_SELECTED error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_SET_PLAYER_FLAVOR': {
                // [v0.9.22 E5] Bridge sends player flavor before firing an action.
                // Empty string clears any pending flavor.
                try {
                    let flavorTxt = String(payload.text || '').trim();
                    if (flavorTxt) {
                        await api.v1.tempStorage.set(STORAGE_PENDING_FLAVOR, flavorTxt).catch(function(_e: any) {});
                    } else {
                        await api.v1.tempStorage.remove(STORAGE_PENDING_FLAVOR).catch(function(_e: any) {});
                    }
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_SET_PLAYER_FLAVOR error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_SET_PLAYER_EMOTION': {
                try {
                    const activeEmo = payload.emotion || 'neutral';
                    await api.v1.tempStorage.set('ae_player_emotion', activeEmo);
                    aeLog('[AE:engine] Active player emotion tracked: ' + activeEmo);
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_SET_PLAYER_EMOTION error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_IMG_FIELD_ACTION': {
                // [v2.13.0 IMGFIELDS] Replaces AE_SAVE_PRESET / AE_SET_ACTIVE_PRESET.
                // Single op-based dispatcher for the click-to-add field library, mirroring
                // the journal's AE_*_ACTION convention. saveImageSettings() persists +
                // rebroadcasts AE_IMG_FIELDS_SYNC on every branch.
                try {
                    const ifaOp = String(payload.op || '');
                    if (ifaOp === 'add') {
                        imagePromptFields.push({
                            id: generateId(),
                            name: String(payload.name || 'New Field'),
                            basePrompt: String(payload.basePrompt || ''),
                            uc: String(payload.uc || ''),
                            weight: 1,
                            active: false
                        });
                    } else if (ifaOp === 'update') {
                        const f = imagePromptFields.find(function(x) { return x.id === payload.id; });
                        if (f) {
                            if (payload.name       !== undefined) f.name       = String(payload.name);
                            if (payload.basePrompt  !== undefined) f.basePrompt = String(payload.basePrompt);
                            if (payload.uc          !== undefined) f.uc         = String(payload.uc);
                            if (payload.weight      !== undefined) f.weight     = Math.max(0.1, Math.min(10, Number(payload.weight) || 1));
                        }
                    } else if (ifaOp === 'toggle') {
                        const f = imagePromptFields.find(function(x) { return x.id === payload.id; });
                        if (f) f.active = !f.active;
                    } else if (ifaOp === 'delete') {
                        imagePromptFields = imagePromptFields.filter(function(x) { return x.id !== payload.id; });
                    } else if (ifaOp === 'reorder' && Array.isArray(payload.orderedIds)) {
                        const byId: { [k: string]: ImagePromptField } = {};
                        imagePromptFields.forEach(function(f) { byId[f.id] = f; });
                        imagePromptFields = payload.orderedIds.map(function(oid: string) { return byId[oid]; }).filter(Boolean);
                    } else if (ifaOp === 'setDefaults') {
                        if (payload.width  !== undefined) globalSettings.defaultWidth  = Number(payload.width)  || globalSettings.defaultWidth;
                        if (payload.height !== undefined) globalSettings.defaultHeight = Number(payload.height) || globalSettings.defaultHeight;
                        if (payload.scale  !== undefined) globalSettings.defaultScale  = Number(payload.scale)  || globalSettings.defaultScale;
                        if (payload.steps  !== undefined) globalSettings.defaultSteps  = Number(payload.steps)  || globalSettings.defaultSteps;
                    } else {
                        aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_IMG_FIELD_ACTION unknown op:', ifaOp);
                    }
                    await saveImageSettings();
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_IMG_FIELD_ACTION error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_INSPECT_LOCATION': {
                // Bridge requests description/atmosphere for a location node.
                try {
                    const ilId: string = payload.locationId;
                    if (!ilId) break;
                    let ilEnt: EntityRecord | null = null;
                    try { ilEnt = await loadEntity(ilId); } catch(_e2) {}
                    await broadcastToTM('AE_INSPECT_RESPONSE', {
                        locationId: ilId,
                        name:        ilEnt ? ilEnt.name : ilId,
                        description: (ilEnt as any)?.description  || '',
                        atmosphere:  (ilEnt as any)?.atmosphere   || '',
                        travelCost:  (ilEnt as any)?.travelCost   || null,
                        locked:      (ilEnt as any)?.isLocked     || false
                    });
                } catch (e) { aeLog('[AE:map] AE_INSPECT_LOCATION error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_PACK_TO_LOREBOOK': {
                // [v0.9.7.10] Pack full world config to a hidden lorebook entry for
                // scenario sharing. Also callable from the Worldbuilding menu buttons.
                try { await packConfigToLorebook(); }
                catch (ePkMsg) { aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_PACK_TO_LOREBOOK error:', ePkMsg); }
                break;
            }

            // [CE-STRIP v2.0.x] AE_TIME_ADVANCE / AE_TIME_SET removed — Clock/Calendar cut.

            case 'AE_SET_NARRATIVE_DATE': {
                // [v0.9.9.2] Set/clear a narrative's absolute day target (drives the AN
                // countdown when that narrative is the tracked one). Null/empty clears it.
                try {
                    let sndId = payload.narrativeId || payload.entityId || '';
                    if (sndId) {
                        let sndEnt = await loadEntity(sndId);
                        if (sndEnt) {
                            if (payload.day === null || payload.day === undefined || payload.day === '') {
                                sndEnt.eventDayTarget = undefined;
                            } else {
                                sndEnt.eventDayTarget = Math.max(0, Math.floor(Number(payload.day) || 0));
                            }
                            await saveEntity(sndEnt);
                            await refreshSidebar();
                            await broadcastSceneState();
                            api.v1.ui.toast('Event date updated.', { type: 'success', autoClose: 1800 });
                        }
                    }
                } catch (e) { api.v1.error('[AE:bridge] AE_SET_NARRATIVE_DATE error:', e); }
                break;
            }

            // [v1.7.0 JOURNAL] Bridge → engine journal control. State mutations run the
            // same Section 10b verbs the native HUD uses, then rebroadcast AE_JOURNAL_STATE.
            case 'AE_JOURNAL_REQ': {
                await broadcastJournal();
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_JOURNAL_ACTION': {
                try {
                    const jOp = String(payload.op || '');
                    if (jOp === 'add')            await journalAddBubble(String(payload.text || ''));
                    else if (jOp === 'update')    await journalUpdateBubble(String(payload.id || ''), String(payload.text || ''));
                    else if (jOp === 'delete')    await journalDeleteBubble(String(payload.id || ''));
                    else if (jOp === 'archive')   await journalSetArchived(String(payload.id || ''), true);
                    else if (jOp === 'unarchive') await journalSetArchived(String(payload.id || ''), false);
                    else if (jOp === 'merge')     await journalMergeDown();
                    else aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_JOURNAL_ACTION unknown op:', jOp);
                } catch (e) { api.v1.error('[AE:bridge] AE_JOURNAL_ACTION error:', e); }
                await broadcastJournal();
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_JOURNAL_GEN': {
                // Rewrite/compress a passage. Returns text only — the HUD reviews and then
                // commits via AE_JOURNAL_ACTION 'update' (mirrors the native review flow).
                const gOp = String(payload.op || '');
                const gId = String(payload.id || '');
                try {
                    const gSrc = String(payload.text || '');
                    let gOut: string | null = null;
                    if (gOp === 'rewrite')       gOut = await journalGenerateRewrite(gSrc);
                    else if (gOp === 'compress') gOut = await journalGenerateCompress(gSrc);
                    await broadcastToTM('AE_JOURNAL_GEN_RESULT', { id: gId, op: gOp, text: gOut || '', ok: !!gOut });
                } catch (e) {
                    api.v1.error('[AE:bridge] AE_JOURNAL_GEN error:', e);
                    try { await broadcastToTM('AE_JOURNAL_GEN_RESULT', { id: gId, op: gOp, text: '', ok: false }); } catch (e2) {}
                }
                break;
            }

            // [v2.12.0 CHARJOURNAL] Bridge -> engine per-character journal control. Same
            // three-message shape as AE_JOURNAL_* above (REQ/ACTION/GEN), every payload
            // additionally carries charId. State mutations run the Section 10c verbs, then
            // rebroadcast AE_CHAR_JOURNAL_STATE for that charId.
            case 'AE_CHAR_JOURNAL_REQ': {
                const cjrCharId = String(payload.charId || '');
                if (!cjrCharId) break;
                await broadcastCharJournal(cjrCharId);
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_CHAR_JOURNAL_ACTION': {
                const cjaCharId = String(payload.charId || '');
                if (!cjaCharId) break;
                try {
                    const cjaOp = String(payload.op || '');
                    if (cjaOp === 'add')            await charJournalAddBubble(cjaCharId, String(payload.text || ''));
                    else if (cjaOp === 'update')    await charJournalUpdateBubble(cjaCharId, String(payload.id || ''), String(payload.text || ''));
                    else if (cjaOp === 'delete')    await charJournalDeleteBubble(cjaCharId, String(payload.id || ''));
                    else if (cjaOp === 'archive')   await charJournalSetArchived(cjaCharId, String(payload.id || ''), true);
                    else if (cjaOp === 'unarchive') await charJournalSetArchived(cjaCharId, String(payload.id || ''), false);
                    else if (cjaOp === 'merge')     await charJournalMergeDown(cjaCharId);
                    else aeLog('[AE:bridge] AE_CHAR_JOURNAL_ACTION unknown op:', cjaOp);
                } catch (e) { api.v1.error('[AE:bridge] AE_CHAR_JOURNAL_ACTION error:', e); }
                await broadcastCharJournal(cjaCharId);
                break;
            }

            case 'AE_CHAR_JOURNAL_GEN': {
                // Rewrite/compress reuse the SAME generation functions the main journal
                // uses — pure text transforms, no per-journal identity, nothing to duplicate.
                const cjgCharId = String(payload.charId || '');
                const cjgOp = String(payload.op || '');
                const cjgId = String(payload.id || '');
                try {
                    const cjgSrc = String(payload.text || '');
                    let cjgOut: string | null = null;
                    if (cjgOp === 'rewrite')       cjgOut = await journalGenerateRewrite(cjgSrc);
                    else if (cjgOp === 'compress') cjgOut = await journalGenerateCompress(cjgSrc);
                    await broadcastToTM('AE_CHAR_JOURNAL_GEN_RESULT', { charId: cjgCharId, id: cjgId, op: cjgOp, text: cjgOut || '', ok: !!cjgOut });
                } catch (e) {
                    api.v1.error('[AE:bridge] AE_CHAR_JOURNAL_GEN error:', e);
                    try { await broadcastToTM('AE_CHAR_JOURNAL_GEN_RESULT', { charId: cjgCharId, id: cjgId, op: cjgOp, text: '', ok: false }); } catch (e2) {}
                }
                break;
            }

            // [CE-STRIP v2.0.x] AE_HOLDING_REQ / AE_HOLDING_ACTION removed — Holding cut.

            default:
                aeLog('[AE:bridge] Unhandled bridge message, event:', event, payload);
        }
    } catch (e) {
        aeLog('[AE:bridge] handleBridgeMessage error:', e);
    }
}


// ============================================================================
// SECTION 18b — LOREBOOK WORLD-PACK  [v0.9.7.9]
// packConfigToLorebook(): serialises the full AE world into a single hidden,
// disabled lorebook entry (AE_LOREBOOK_PACK_NAME). The entry travels with the
// story's .scenario export, so any user who imports the scenario gets the
// world pre-configured. The entry is NEVER injected into context (enabled:false,
// no keys, forceActivation:false). It can be re-packed at any time; the engine
// finds the existing entry by displayName and updates it in place.
//
// loadConfigFromLorebook(): called from onScriptsLoaded. If the sentinel entry
// exists AND storyStorage has no config yet (fresh story from scenario), imports
// the full world automatically and logs a summary. Non-destructive — existing
// stories are never overwritten.
// ============================================================================

// ============================================================================
// [v0.98] PLAIN-JSON IMPORT / EXPORT
// Uses api.v1.file.save() and api.v1.file.prompt() — no bridge required.
// Produces a human-readable, tool-friendly JSON file using the importPayload()
// schema, fully compatible with the existing smart importer.
// ============================================================================

async function exportAll(): Promise<void> {
    try {
        const xaCfg    = await loadConfig();
        const xaChars  = await loadAllCharacters();
        const xaEntIdx = await loadEntityIndex();
        const xaEnts: EntityRecord[] = [];
        for (const xaM of xaEntIdx.filter(Boolean)) {
            const xaE = await loadEntity(xaM.id);
            if (xaE) xaEnts.push(xaE);
        }
        const xaNpcWeb    = typeof loadNpcWeb    === 'function' ? await (loadNpcWeb as any)().catch(function() { return []; })    : [];

        const xaData = {
            _ae:        true,
            aeVersion:  '0.9.9.2',
            exportedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            config:     xaCfg,
            characters: xaChars,
            entities:   xaEnts,
            npcWeb:     xaNpcWeb
        };

        const xaSafeName = ((xaCfg as any).projectName || 'ae_world').replace(/[^a-z0-9]/gi, '_').toLowerCase();
        await api.v1.file.save(xaSafeName + '_export.json', JSON.stringify(xaData, null, 2));
        api.v1.ui.toast('Exported: ' + xaChars.length + ' characters, ' + xaEnts.length + ' nodes.', { type: 'success', autoClose: 3000 });
    } catch (e) {
        api.v1.error('[AE] exportAll failed:', e);
        api.v1.ui.toast('Export failed — see engine log.', { type: 'error' });
    }
}

async function importData(): Promise<void> {
    try {
        const raw = await api.v1.file.prompt({ accept: '.json,application/json,text/plain,*/*', readAs: 'text' });
        if (!raw || typeof raw !== 'string') return;

        const data = JSON.parse(raw);
        const result = await importPayload(data);

        const parts: string[] = [];
        if (result.configImported) {
            const cc = sumMergeCounts(result.configCategoryCounts);
            parts.push((cc.added + cc.updated) > 0 ? `settings (${cc.added} added, ${cc.updated} updated)` : 'settings');
        }
        if (result.charCount > 0)      parts.push(result.charCount + ' character' + (result.charCount !== 1 ? 's' : ''));
        if (result.entityCount > 0)    parts.push(result.entityCount + ' node' + (result.entityCount !== 1 ? 's' : ''));
        if (result.npcWebImported) {
            const wc = result.npcWebCounts || { added: 0, updated: 0 };
            parts.push((wc.added + wc.updated) > 0 ? `NPC web (${wc.added} added, ${wc.updated} updated)` : 'NPC web');
        }
        if (result.partyStateImported) parts.push('party state');

        if (!parts.length) {
            api.v1.ui.toast('File loaded but no recognisable AE data found.', { type: 'warning', autoClose: 3500 });
            return;
        }
        api.v1.ui.toast('Imported: ' + parts.join(', ') + '.', { type: 'success', autoClose: 3500 });
        await refreshSidebar();
        queueSceneStateBroadcast();
    } catch (e) {
        api.v1.error('[AE] importData failed:', e);
        api.v1.ui.toast('Import failed — check that the file is valid JSON.', { type: 'error' });
    }
}

async function packConfigToLorebook(): Promise<void> {
    aeLog('[AE:pack] Packing world config to lorebook...');
    try {
        // -- Gather storyStorage data -----------------------------------------
        const pkCfg   = await api.v1.storyStorage.get(STORAGE_CONFIG);
        const pkIdx   = await api.v1.storyStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_INDEX, []) as CharacterMeta[];
        const pkEntIdx = await api.v1.storyStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_ENTITY_INDEX, []) as EntityMeta[];
        const pkParty  = await api.v1.storyStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_PARTY, null);
        const pkWebRaw = await api.v1.storyStorage.get(STORAGE_NPC_WEB) as string | undefined;
        const pkQI     = await api.v1.storyStorage.getOrDefault('ae_quick_instances', []);
        const pkWizRaw = await api.v1.storyStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_WIZ_CHATS, '[]') as string;

        // -- Characters (sequential load) -------------------------------------
        let pkCharRecs: Record<string, any> = {};
        for (const pkCm of pkIdx) {
            try {
                const pkCh = await api.v1.storyStorage.get(STORAGE_CHAR_PFX + pkCm.id);
                if (pkCh) pkCharRecs[pkCm.id] = pkCh;
            } catch (eChPk) { aeLog('[AE:pack] char load skip:', pkCm.id, eChPk); }
        }

        // -- Entities (sequential load) ---------------------------------------
        let pkEntRecs: Record<string, any> = {};
        for (const pkEm of pkEntIdx) {
            try {
                const pkEnt = await api.v1.storyStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_ENTITY_PFX + pkEm.id, null);
                if (pkEnt) pkEntRecs[pkEm.id] = pkEnt;
            } catch (eEntPk) { aeLog('[AE:pack] entity load skip:', pkEm.id, eEntPk); }
        }

        // -- Image settings (in-memory, from global api.v1.storage) ----------
        // imagePromptFields/globalSettings are module-level; re-read to be safe.
        const pkImgFields = await api.v1.storage.get(STORAGE_KEY_PROMPT_FIELDS);
        const pkImgGlob   = await api.v1.storage.get(STORAGE_KEY_GLOBAL);

        // -- Assemble package -------------------------------------------------
        const pkPayload = JSON.stringify({
            v:            1,
            aeVersion:    '0.9.7.9',
            packedAt:     Date.now(),
            config:       pkCfg     || null,
            charIndex:    pkIdx,
            charRecords:  pkCharRecs,
            entIndex:     pkEntIdx,
            entRecords:   pkEntRecs,
            party:        pkParty   || null,
            npcWeb:       pkWebRaw  || null,
            quickInstances: pkQI,
            wizChats:     pkWizRaw,
            imageFields:  pkImgFields || null,
            imageGlobal:  pkImgGlob   || null
        });

        const pkBytes = pkPayload.length; // character count; JSON is mostly ASCII so ~= bytes
        aeLog('[AE:pack] Payload size:', pkBytes, 'bytes;', pkIdx.length, 'chars,', pkEntIdx.length, 'entities.');

        // -- Find existing sentinel entry or create new -----------------------
        let pkExisting: any = null;
        try {
            const pkAllEntries = await api.v1.lorebook.entries();
            pkExisting = pkAllEntries.find(function(pkE: any) { return pkE.displayName === AE_LOREBOOK_PACK_NAME; });
        } catch (eEntries) { aeLog('[AE:pack] entries() error:', eEntries); }

        if (pkExisting) {
            await api.v1.lorebook.updateEntry(pkExisting.id, { text: pkPayload });
            aeLog('[AE:pack] Updated existing lorebook entry id:', pkExisting.id);
        } else {
            const pkNewId = api.v1.uuid();
            await api.v1.lorebook.createEntry({
                id:              pkNewId,
                displayName:     AE_LOREBOOK_PACK_NAME,
                text:            pkPayload,
                keys:            [],
                enabled:         false,
                hidden:          true,
                forceActivation: false
            });
            aeLog('[AE:pack] Created new lorebook entry id:', pkNewId);
        }
        api.v1.ui.toast('World packed to lorebook (' + Math.round(pkBytes / 1024) + ' KB). Export scenario to share.', { type: 'success', autoClose: 4000 });
    } catch (ePack) {
        api.v1.error('[AE:pack] packConfigToLorebook error:', ePack);
        api.v1.ui.toast('Pack failed - see engine log.', { type: 'error', autoClose: 3000 });
    }
}

// Returns true if config was imported, false if skipped (entry missing or
// config already present). Called from onScriptsLoaded.
// Pass forced=true to import even when storyStorage already has a config.
async function loadConfigFromLorebook(forced?: boolean): Promise<boolean> {
    try {
        // -- Find sentinel entry ----------------------------------------------
        let lcEntry: any = null;
        try {
            const lcAll = await api.v1.lorebook.entries();
            lcEntry = lcAll.find(function(lcE: any) { return lcE.displayName === AE_LOREBOOK_PACK_NAME; });
        } catch (eLcList) { aeLog('[AE:pack] loadConfigFromLorebook entries() error:', eLcList); return false; }
        if (!lcEntry || !lcEntry.text) return false;

        // -- Only import if storyStorage has no config yet (fresh scenario) ---
        const lcExistingCfg = await api.v1.storyStorage.get(STORAGE_CONFIG);
        if (!forced && lcExistingCfg !== null && lcExistingCfg !== undefined) {
            aeLog('[AE:pack] Lorebook pack found but storyStorage already has config; skipping auto-import.');
            return false;
        }

        // -- Parse ------------------------------------------------------------
        let lcData: any;
        try { lcData = JSON.parse(lcEntry.text); }
        catch (eLcParse) { api.v1.error('[AE:pack] loadConfigFromLorebook: JSON parse failed:', eLcParse); return false; }

        aeLog('[AE:pack] Importing from lorebook pack v' + (lcData.v || '?') + ' packed at', lcData.packedAt, 'aeVersion', lcData.aeVersion);

        // -- Restore storyStorage: config -------------------------------------
        if (lcData.config) await api.v1.storyStorage.set(STORAGE_CONFIG, lcData.config);

        // -- Restore storyStorage: character index + records ------------------
        if (Array.isArray(lcData.charIndex) && lcData.charIndex.length > 0) {
            await api.v1.storyStorage.set(STORAGE_INDEX, lcData.charIndex);
            let lcCharCount = 0;
            const lcCharRecs = lcData.charRecords || {};
            for (const lcCharId in lcCharRecs) {
                try { await api.v1.storyStorage.set(STORAGE_CHAR_PFX + lcCharId, lcCharRecs[lcCharId]); lcCharCount++; }
                catch (eLcChar) { aeLog('[AE:pack] char restore skip:', lcCharId, eLcChar); }
            }
            aeLog('[AE:pack] Restored', lcCharCount, 'character records.');
        }

        // -- Restore storyStorage: entity index + records ---------------------
        if (Array.isArray(lcData.entIndex) && lcData.entIndex.length > 0) {
            await api.v1.storyStorage.set(STORAGE_ENTITY_INDEX, lcData.entIndex);
            let lcEntCount = 0;
            const lcEntRecs = lcData.entRecords || {};
            for (const lcEntId in lcEntRecs) {
                try { await api.v1.storyStorage.set(STORAGE_ENTITY_PFX + lcEntId, lcEntRecs[lcEntId]); lcEntCount++; }
                catch (eLcEnt) { aeLog('[AE:pack] entity restore skip:', lcEntId, eLcEnt); }
            }
            aeLog('[AE:pack] Restored', lcEntCount, 'entity records.');
        }

        // -- Restore storyStorage: ancillary data -----------------------------
        if (lcData.party)          await api.v1.storyStorage.set(STORAGE_PARTY,         lcData.party);
        if (lcData.npcWeb)         await api.v1.storyStorage.set(STORAGE_NPC_WEB,        lcData.npcWeb);
        if (lcData.quickInstances) await api.v1.storyStorage.set('ae_quick_instances',   lcData.quickInstances);
        if (lcData.wizChats)       await api.v1.storyStorage.set(STORAGE_WIZ_CHATS,      lcData.wizChats);

        // -- Restore global api.v1.storage: image settings -------------------
        if (lcData.imageFields) await api.v1.storage.set(STORAGE_KEY_PROMPT_FIELDS, lcData.imageFields);
        if (lcData.imageGlobal) await api.v1.storage.set(STORAGE_KEY_GLOBAL,        lcData.imageGlobal);

        const lcCharLen  = Object.keys(lcData.charRecords || {}).length;
        const lcEntLen   = Object.keys(lcData.entRecords  || {}).length;
        aeLog('[AE:pack] Import complete:', lcCharLen, 'chars,', lcEntLen, 'entities.');
        api.v1.ui.toast('World imported from lorebook pack (' + lcCharLen + ' chars, ' + lcEntLen + ' locations). Reload to activate.', { type: 'success', autoClose: 5000 });
        return true;
    } catch (eLcMain) {
        api.v1.error('[AE:pack] loadConfigFromLorebook error:', eLcMain);
        return false;
    }
}

// Takes already-parsed lorebook pack data (packConfigToLorebook format: charIndex/
// charRecords/entIndex/entRecords) and restores the full world into storyStorage
// and api.v1.storage. 
// Distinct from importPayload(), which handles the plain-JSON export format.
async function importFromLorebookPack(data: any): Promise<void> {
    if (data.config) await api.v1.storyStorage.set(STORAGE_CONFIG, data.config);

    if (Array.isArray(data.charIndex) && data.charIndex.length > 0) {
        await api.v1.storyStorage.set(STORAGE_INDEX, data.charIndex);
        let ifpCharRecs = data.charRecords || {};
        for (let ifpCId in ifpCharRecs) {
            try { await api.v1.storyStorage.set(STORAGE_CHAR_PFX + ifpCId, ifpCharRecs[ifpCId]); } catch (eIfpC) {}
        }
    }

    if (Array.isArray(data.entIndex) && data.entIndex.length > 0) {
        await api.v1.storyStorage.set(STORAGE_ENTITY_INDEX, data.entIndex);
        let ifpEntRecs = data.entRecords || {};
        for (let ifpEId in ifpEntRecs) {
            try { await api.v1.storyStorage.set(STORAGE_ENTITY_PFX + ifpEId, ifpEntRecs[ifpEId]); } catch (eIfpE) {}
        }
    }

    if (data.party)          await api.v1.storyStorage.set(STORAGE_PARTY,         data.party);
    if (data.npcWeb)         await api.v1.storyStorage.set(STORAGE_NPC_WEB,        data.npcWeb);
    if (data.quickInstances) await api.v1.storyStorage.set('ae_quick_instances',   data.quickInstances);
    if (data.wizChats)       await api.v1.storyStorage.set(STORAGE_WIZ_CHATS,      data.wizChats);

    if (data.imageFields) await api.v1.storage.set(STORAGE_KEY_PROMPT_FIELDS, data.imageFields);
    if (data.imageGlobal) await api.v1.storage.set(STORAGE_KEY_GLOBAL,        data.imageGlobal);
}

// Scans all lorebook entries for AE world packs (any entry whose text parses to
// JSON containing an aeVersion field), presents a modal picker, and calls
// importFromLorebookPack on the selected entry. Entry-point for the Import button
// in Settings → Adventure Module Management and the Characters tab header.
async function pickAndImportFromLorebook(): Promise<void> {
    let pklPacks: { entry: any; data: any }[] = [];
    try {
        let pklAll = await api.v1.lorebook.entries();
        for (let pklE of pklAll) {
            if (!pklE.text) continue;
            try {
                let pklD = JSON.parse(pklE.text);
                if (pklD && pklD.aeVersion) pklPacks.push({ entry: pklE, data: pklD });
            } catch (ePklParse) {}
        }
    } catch (ePklScan) {
        api.v1.ui.toast('Failed to scan lorebook entries.', { type: 'error' });
        return;
    }

    if (pklPacks.length === 0) {
        api.v1.ui.toast('No AE world packs found in the lorebook. Use "Pack to Lorebook" first.', { type: 'warning', autoClose: 4000 });
        return;
    }

    let pklContent: any[] = [
