        let amGen = await generateSceneNpc();
        if (amGen) {
            _aeAddNpcName = amGen.name;
            _aeAddNpcBrief = amGen.brief;
            api.v1.ui.toast('Filled in — tweak and Create, or generate again.', { id: 'ae-gen-am', type: 'success', autoClose: 2500 });
            await refreshAddNpcModal();
        } else {
            api.v1.ui.toast('Could not generate — type it in or try again.', { id: 'ae-gen-am', type: 'warning', autoClose: 3000 });
        }
    } } as UIPart);
    amParts.push({ type: 'button', text: 'Create Character', iconId: 'user-plus', style: { width: '100%', marginTop: '6px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(126,200,160,0.15)', color: '#7ec8a0' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
        if (!_aeAddNpcName.trim()) { api.v1.ui.toast('Name required.', { type: 'warning' }); return; }
        await spawnSceneNpc(_aeAddNpcName.trim(), _aeAddNpcBrief.trim(), _aeAddNpcLoc, false);
        try { if (_aeAddNpcHandle && !_aeAddNpcHandle.isClosed()) await _aeAddNpcHandle.close(); } catch (eAc) {}
        if (_aeAddNpcRefresh) await _aeAddNpcRefresh();
    } } as UIPart);
    return amParts;
}

async function refreshAddNpcModal(): Promise<void> {
    if (_aeAddNpcHandle && typeof _aeAddNpcHandle.isClosed === 'function' && !_aeAddNpcHandle.isClosed()) {
        let ramContent = await buildAddNpcContent();
        await _aeAddNpcHandle.update({ content: ramContent });
    }
}

async function openAddNpcModal(locId: string | null, refreshFn: () => Promise<void>): Promise<void> {
    _aeAddNpcName = '';
    _aeAddNpcBrief = '';
    _aeAddNpcLoc = locId;
    _aeAddNpcRefresh = refreshFn;
    let oamContent = await buildAddNpcContent();
    _aeAddNpcHandle = await openEngineModal({ id: 'ae-add-minor', title: 'Add Character', size: 'small', content: oamContent });
}

// ── [v1.15.0] Add-Item modal (blank or from item template) \u2014 native HUD twin of
// the Add-NPC modal. Spawns a loose item into the inspected location so the
// existing Pick Up action can grab it, mirroring "+ Add NPC Here".
var _aeAddItemHandle: any = null;
var _aeAddItemName = '';
var _aeAddItemDesc = '';
var _aeAddItemLoc: string | null = null;
var _aeAddItemRefresh: (() => Promise<void>) | null = null;

async function buildAddItemContent(): Promise<UIPart[]> {
    // [CE-STRIP v2.1.6] Item template picker removed — Item Templates cut. Freeform
    // name + description only now, same as before minus the template shortcut.
    let aiParts: UIPart[] = [];
    // [v2.17.0 CHAREDIT-TABS] This modal is now also opened from a character's
    // Equipment section ("+ Add Item Here", explicitParentId = char.entityId) —
    // the original copy assumed a location target ("lands loose here; Pick Up
    // moves it to inventory"), which reads wrong for a character. Check the
    // actual target entity's type and phrase accordingly.
    let aiTargetEnt = _aeAddItemLoc ? await loadEntity(_aeAddItemLoc) : null;
    let aiIntroText = (aiTargetEnt && aiTargetEnt.type === 'character')
        ? 'A quick item, parented directly to this character\u2019s inventory. Name plus what it is.'
        : 'A quick drop-in item at the current location. Name plus what it is. It lands loose here; Pick Up moves it to inventory.';
    aiParts.push({ type: 'text', text: aiIntroText, style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.7', marginBottom: '8px' } } as UIPart);
    aiParts.push({ type: 'textInput', label: 'Name', placeholder: 'e.g. Rusted Key, Silk Scarf, Hunting Knife', initialValue: _aeAddItemName, onChange: function(v: string) { _aeAddItemName = v; } } as UIPart);
    aiParts.push({ type: 'multilineTextInput', label: 'What is it?', placeholder: 'e.g. A tarnished brass key with a worn ribbon.', initialValue: _aeAddItemDesc, style: { minHeight: '50px' }, onChange: function(v: string) { _aeAddItemDesc = v; } } as UIPart);
    aiParts.push({ type: 'button', text: '✨ Generate from Scene', style: { width: '100%', marginTop: '6px', fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(136,204,255,0.12)', color: '#88ccff' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
        api.v1.ui.toast('Generating an item that fits the scene…', { id: 'ae-gen-ai', autoClose: false });
        let aiGen = await generateSceneItem();
        if (aiGen) {
            _aeAddItemName = aiGen.name;
            _aeAddItemDesc = aiGen.desc;
            api.v1.ui.toast('Filled in — tweak and Create, or generate again.', { id: 'ae-gen-ai', type: 'success', autoClose: 2500 });
            await refreshAddItemModal();
        } else {
            api.v1.ui.toast('Could not generate — type it in or try again.', { id: 'ae-gen-ai', type: 'warning', autoClose: 3000 });
        }
    } } as UIPart);
    aiParts.push({ type: 'button', text: 'Create Item', iconId: 'plus', style: { width: '100%', marginTop: '6px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(126,200,160,0.15)', color: '#7ec8a0' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
        if (!_aeAddItemName.trim()) { api.v1.ui.toast('Name required.', { type: 'warning' }); return; }
        await spawnItem(_aeAddItemName.trim(), _aeAddItemDesc.trim(), false, _aeAddItemLoc || '__room__');
        try { if (_aeAddItemHandle && !_aeAddItemHandle.isClosed()) await _aeAddItemHandle.close(); } catch (eAi) {}
        if (_aeAddItemRefresh) await _aeAddItemRefresh();
    } } as UIPart);
    return aiParts;
}

async function refreshAddItemModal(): Promise<void> {
    if (_aeAddItemHandle && typeof _aeAddItemHandle.isClosed === 'function' && !_aeAddItemHandle.isClosed()) {
        let raiContent = await buildAddItemContent();
        await _aeAddItemHandle.update({ content: raiContent });
    }
}

async function openAddItemModal(locId: string | null, refreshFn: () => Promise<void>): Promise<void> {
    _aeAddItemName = '';
    _aeAddItemDesc = '';
    _aeAddItemLoc = locId;
    _aeAddItemRefresh = refreshFn;
    let oaiContent = await buildAddItemContent();
    _aeAddItemHandle = await openEngineModal({ id: 'ae-add-item', title: 'Add Item', size: 'small', content: oaiContent });
}

// ── [v1.19.0 LOCGEN] Add-Location modal \u2014 native HUD twin of the bridge Map tab's
// _showAddLocationPopup. Opened from renderMap()'s "+ New Location" button, next to the
// Travel header, so it's anchored to the same reference location the Travel list uses.
//
// >>> PAIRED, three ways \u2014 touch one, check the others:
// >>>   _showAddLocationPopup()  bridge Section 12 \u2014 same relation model, same fields.
// >>>   generateSceneLocation()  the generator this calls (Items block).
// >>>   spawnLocation()          the creator this calls (Items block).
var _aeAddLocHandle: any = null;
var _aeAddLocName = '';
var _aeAddLocDesc = '';
var _aeAddLocLore = '';
var _aeAddLocSuggestion = '';
var _aeAddLocRelation: string = 'sibling';   // 'sibling' | 'child' \u2014 see spawnLocation
var _aeAddLocRefId: string | null = null;
var _aeAddLocRefresh: (() => Promise<void>) | null = null;

async function buildAddLocationContent(): Promise<UIPart[]> {
    let alParts: UIPart[] = [];
    // [v2.51.0 ROOT-ADDLOC] At the world root the reference is the sentinel (or null), which
    // never resolves to an entity — both sibling/child collapse to a top-level create (see
    // spawnLocation). Say that plainly rather than "relative to here", and drop the sit
    // toggle, which would be a meaningless choice with nothing to nest under.
    let alIsRoot = (!_aeAddLocRefId) || (_aeAddLocRefId === AE_ROOT_LOCATION_ID);
    let alRefEnt = (_aeAddLocRefId && !alIsRoot) ? await loadEntity(_aeAddLocRefId) : null;
    let alRefName = alRefEnt ? alRefEnt.name : 'here';
    let alState: any = await getSceneState();
    let alParentName = (alState && alState.locationGraph && alState.locationGraph.parentName) ? alState.locationGraph.parentName : '';

    if (alIsRoot) {
        alParts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'A new place at the top level of the world \u2014 there\u2019s nothing to nest it under yet. Gets a name, a scene description, and a lorebook entry. Gating and travel cost are left default \u2014 set those in the entity editor after.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.7', marginBottom: '8px' } } as UIPart);
    } else {
        alParts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'A new place relative to ' + alRefName + '. Gets a name, a scene description, and a lorebook entry. Gating and travel cost are left default \u2014 set those in the entity editor after.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.7', marginBottom: '8px' } } as UIPart);

        alParts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Where does it sit?', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.7', marginBottom: '4px' } } as UIPart);
        alParts.push(_aeHudRow([
            { type: 'button', text: 'Beside \u2014 same tier', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: _aeAddLocRelation === 'sibling' ? 'rgba(136,204,255,0.15)' : undefined, border: _aeAddLocRelation === 'sibling' ? '1px solid rgba(136,204,255,0.4)' : undefined }, callback: async function() { _aeAddLocRelation = 'sibling'; await refreshAddLocationModal(); } } as UIPart,
            { type: 'button', text: 'Inside \u2014 contained here', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: _aeAddLocRelation === 'child' ? 'rgba(136,204,255,0.15)' : undefined, border: _aeAddLocRelation === 'child' ? '1px solid rgba(136,204,255,0.4)' : undefined }, callback: async function() { _aeAddLocRelation = 'child'; await refreshAddLocationModal(); } } as UIPart
        ]));
        let alHint = (_aeAddLocRelation === 'sibling')
            ? ('Same tier as ' + alRefName + (alParentName ? ', also inside ' + alParentName : ', at the top level of the world') + '. Reachable from here without going up first.')
            : ('One tier down, contained within ' + alRefName + '. Entered from here.');
        alParts.push({ type: 'text', text: alHint, style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.55', lineHeight: '1.4', marginBottom: '8px' } } as UIPart);
    }

    alParts.push({ type: 'textInput', label: 'Steer the generator (optional)', placeholder: 'e.g. a flooded undercroft', initialValue: _aeAddLocSuggestion, onChange: function(v: string) { _aeAddLocSuggestion = v; } } as UIPart);
    alParts.push({ type: 'button', text: '\u2728 Generate from Story', style: { width: '100%', marginTop: '6px', fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(136,204,255,0.12)', color: '#88ccff' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
        api.v1.ui.toast('Generating a location that fits the story\u2026', { id: 'ae-gen-al', autoClose: false });
        let alGen = await generateSceneLocation(_aeAddLocRelation, _aeAddLocRefId, _aeAddLocSuggestion);
        if (alGen) {
            _aeAddLocName = alGen.name;
            _aeAddLocDesc = alGen.description;
            _aeAddLocLore = alGen.lore;
            api.v1.ui.toast('Filled in \u2014 tweak and Create, or generate again.', { id: 'ae-gen-al', type: 'success', autoClose: 2500 });
            await refreshAddLocationModal();
        } else {
            api.v1.ui.toast('Could not generate \u2014 type it in or try again.', { id: 'ae-gen-al', type: 'warning', autoClose: 3000 });
        }
    } } as UIPart);

    alParts.push({ type: 'textInput', label: 'Name', placeholder: 'e.g. The Drowned Undercroft', initialValue: _aeAddLocName, onChange: function(v: string) { _aeAddLocName = v; } } as UIPart);
    alParts.push({ type: 'multilineTextInput', label: 'Description \u2014 what a camera senses on arrival', placeholder: 'No history here, just the immediate scene.', initialValue: _aeAddLocDesc, style: { minHeight: '50px' }, onChange: function(v: string) { _aeAddLocDesc = v; } } as UIPart);
    alParts.push({ type: 'multilineTextInput', label: 'Lorebook entry (blank = no entry)', placeholder: 'History, significance, culture, tensions.', initialValue: _aeAddLocLore, style: { minHeight: '70px' }, onChange: function(v: string) { _aeAddLocLore = v; } } as UIPart);

    alParts.push({ type: 'button', text: 'Create Location', iconId: 'map-pin', style: { width: '100%', marginTop: '6px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(126,200,160,0.15)', color: '#7ec8a0' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
        if (!_aeAddLocName.trim()) { api.v1.ui.toast('Name required.', { type: 'warning' }); return; }
        await spawnLocation(_aeAddLocName.trim(), _aeAddLocDesc.trim(), _aeAddLocLore.trim(), _aeAddLocRelation, _aeAddLocRefId, false);
        try { if (_aeAddLocHandle && !_aeAddLocHandle.isClosed()) await _aeAddLocHandle.close(); } catch (eAl) {}
        if (_aeAddLocRefresh) await _aeAddLocRefresh();
    } } as UIPart);
    return alParts;
}

async function refreshAddLocationModal(): Promise<void> {
    if (_aeAddLocHandle && typeof _aeAddLocHandle.isClosed === 'function' && !_aeAddLocHandle.isClosed()) {
        let ralContent = await buildAddLocationContent();
        await _aeAddLocHandle.update({ content: ralContent });
    }
}

async function openAddLocationModal(refLocId: string | null, refreshFn: () => Promise<void>): Promise<void> {
    _aeAddLocName = '';
    _aeAddLocDesc = '';
    _aeAddLocLore = '';
    _aeAddLocSuggestion = '';
    _aeAddLocRelation = 'sibling';
    _aeAddLocRefId = refLocId;
    _aeAddLocRefresh = refreshFn;
    let oalContent = await buildAddLocationContent();
    _aeAddLocHandle = await openEngineModal({ id: 'ae-add-location', title: 'New Location', size: 'small', content: oalContent });
}

async function killCharacter(charId: string): Promise<void> {
    try {
        let char = await loadCharacter(charId);
        if (!char) return;

        char.active = false;
        char.scenePresent = false;

        // --- INVENTORY DROP LOGIC ---
        if (char.entityId) {
            let allEnts = await loadEntityIndex();
            let charBody = await loadEntity(char.entityId);
            
            if (charBody) {
                // Determine where to drop the loot: the room they died in.
                // If they are in the void (null), fallback to the player's room.
                let dropRoomId = charBody.parentId; 
                if (!dropRoomId) {
                    dropRoomId = await loadPlayerLocation(); 
                }

                if (dropRoomId) {
                    // Find all items/entities currently attached to the dying character
                    let lootItems = allEnts.filter(function(e) { return e.parentId === char.entityId; });
                    for (let lootMeta of lootItems) {
                        let itemEnt = await loadEntity(lootMeta.id);
                        if (itemEnt) {
                            itemEnt.parentId = dropRoomId;
                            await saveEntity(itemEnt);
                        }
                    }
                }
                
                // Clear equipped items so they aren't still "wielding" things from the grave
                char.equippedItemIds = [];
            }
        }

        await saveCharacter(char);

        // Send entity body to Graveyard
        if (char.entityId) {
            let allEnts = await loadEntityIndex();
            let gyMeta = allEnts.find(function(e) { return e.name === 'Graveyard' && e.type === 'location'; });
            if (!gyMeta) {
                let gyEnt = makeDefaultEntity('Graveyard');
                gyEnt.type = 'location';
                gyEnt.parentId = null;
                await saveEntity(gyEnt);
                gyMeta = { id: gyEnt.id, name: 'Graveyard', type: 'location', parentId: null, childCount: 0, presentCharacterCount: 0, state: 'default' };
            }
            let gyBody = await loadEntity(char.entityId);
            if (gyBody) { gyBody.parentId = gyMeta.id; await saveEntity(gyBody); }
        }

        // Move to bottom of character index
        let idx = await loadIndex();
        let pos = idx.findIndex(function(m) { return m.id === charId; });
        if (pos >= 0 && pos < idx.length - 1) {
            let item = idx.splice(pos, 1)[0];
            idx.push(item);
            await saveIndex(idx);
        }

        api.v1.ui.toast('💀 ' + char.name + ' — deceased.', { type: 'warning' });
    } catch (e) { 
        api.v1.error('[AE] killCharacter:', e); 
    }
}


// ── Character Edit Modal ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

async function openCharEditModal(charId: string): Promise<void> {
    if (charEditModalHandle && !charEditModalHandle.isClosed()) charEditModalHandle.close();
    editingCharId = charId;
    // [v2.17.0 CHAREDIT-TABS] title now shows the character's own name — the tab
    // bar replaced the old always-visible header, so this is the one place
    // identity stays visible regardless of which tab is open.
    const openChar = await loadCharacter(charId);
    charEditModalHandle = await openEngineModal({ id: 'ce-char-edit', size: 'full', fillWidth: true, title: (openChar && openChar.name) ? openChar.name : 'Edit Character', content: await buildCharEditContent(charId) });
}

async function refreshCharEditModal(): Promise<void> { 
    if (!charEditModalHandle || charEditModalHandle.isClosed() || !editingCharId) return; 
    const freshChar = await loadCharacter(editingCharId);
    await charEditModalHandle.update({ title: (freshChar && freshChar.name) ? freshChar.name : 'Edit Character', content: await buildCharEditContent(editingCharId) }); 
}


// ============================================================================
// CHARACTER EDIT MODAL — TABBED LAYOUT  [v2.17.0 CHAREDIT-TABS]
// Replaces the old flat list-of-collapsing-headers with four button-tabs
// (Overview / Static Profile / Dynamic Profile / Visuals), mirroring the
// World-Build Wizard's own tabBar()/redraw() pattern (Section 23) so content
// isn't squished inside a collapsibleSection wrapper on top of its own
// nesting. Active tab is per-character tempStorage (`ce_tab_${charId}`);
// switching tabs calls refreshCharEditModal() same as any other mutation.
// ============================================================================

var CHAR_EDIT_TABS: { id: string; label: string; iconId: string }[] = [
    { id: 'overview', label: 'Overview',        iconId: 'user'   },
    { id: 'static',   label: 'Static Profile',  iconId: 'edit-3' },
    { id: 'dynamic',  label: 'Dynamic Profile', iconId: 'zap'    },
    { id: 'visuals',  label: 'Visuals',         iconId: 'eye'    }
];

function charEditTabBar(charId: string, activeTab: string): UIPart {
    return { type: 'row', wrap: true, style: { gap: '4px', marginBottom: '10px', paddingBottom: '8px', borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)' }, content: CHAR_EDIT_TABS.map(function(t) {
        const on = t.id === activeTab;
        return { type: 'button', text: t.label, iconId: t.iconId as any, disabled: on, style: { flex: '1 1 auto', minWidth: '90px', margin: 0, padding: '6px 4px', fontSize: '11px', fontWeight: on ? 'bold' : 'normal', borderBottom: on ? '2px solid #88ccff' : '2px solid transparent', borderRadius: '4px 4px 0 0', backgroundColor: on ? 'rgba(136,204,255,0.12)' : 'transparent', opacity: on ? '1' : '0.65' }, callback: async function() { await api.v1.tempStorage.set(`ce_tab_${charId}`, t.id); await refreshCharEditModal(); } } as UIPart;
    }) } as UIPart;
}

// Plain, non-collapsing section label — used on Overview for Equipment/
// Conditions/Factions (always expanded per request, not buried in a
// collapsibleSection) and as sub-headers within the Dynamic Profile tab.
function sectionHeader(label: string): UIPart {
    return { type: 'text', text: label, style: { fontSize: '13px', fontWeight: 'bold', marginTop: '18px', marginBottom: '8px', paddingBottom: '4px', borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)' } } as UIPart;
}

// A control button paired with an inline caption explaining what it does —
// replaces the old header row's single "❓ Help" popup modal.
function controlRow(btn: UIPart, caption: string): UIPart {
    return { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '10px', marginBottom: '8px' }, content: [
        btn,
        { type: 'text', text: caption, style: { flex: '1 1 0', fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.55', lineHeight: '1.3' } }
    ] } as UIPart;
}

function _ceToggleBtn(label: string, on: boolean, onToggle: () => Promise<void>): UIPart {
    return { type: 'button', text: label, style: { flex: '1 1 0', minWidth: '80px', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', padding: '6px 4px', fontWeight: on ? 'bold' : 'normal', backgroundColor: on ? 'rgba(126,200,160,0.18)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.04)', color: on ? '#7ec8a0' : '#888', border: on ? '1px solid rgba(126,200,160,0.4)' : '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)' }, callback: onToggle } as UIPart;
}

// [v2.17.0] A generatable static field, rendered as: label (left) + a
// zap-icon button (right) that pops a small "optional hint" modal before
// confirming generation, then a click-to-expand preview/edit button below
// (opens a `size:'large'` modal with one big multilineTextInput — text is
// never squished into a small bubble, edited or not). Shared by the four
// STATIC_FIELD_DEFS fields, Core Values, and custom fields — all of which
// previously duplicated the same hint-textInput-plus-zap-row pattern.
function buildGeneratableFieldBlock(
    char: CharacterRecord, cfg: GlobalConfig, charId: string,
    label: string, currentValue: string, genInstructions: string, genBudget: number,
    applyResult: (v: string) => Promise<void>
): UIPart[] {
    return [
        { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { justifyContent: 'space-between', marginTop: '14px', marginBottom: '4px' }, content: [
            { type: 'text', text: label, style: { fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 'bold' } },
            { type: 'button', iconId: 'zap', style: { margin: 0, padding: '4px 8px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,180,50,0.15)', color: '#ffb432', border: '1px solid rgba(255,180,50,0.3)' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                let hintVal = '';
                const hintContent: UIPart[] = [
                    { type: 'text', text: 'Optional hint to steer the generation.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.6', marginBottom: '8px' } },
                    { type: 'textInput', placeholder: 'e.g. emphasize a scar from the war', initialValue: '', onChange: function(v: string) { hintVal = v; } },
                    { type: 'button', text: 'Generate', iconId: 'zap', style: { width: '100%', marginTop: '8px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,180,50,0.15)', color: '#ffb432' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                        try { if (hp && !hp.isClosed()) hp.close(); } catch (eHp) {}
                        api.v1.ui.toast('Generating ' + label + '…', { id: 'ce-genf', autoClose: false, type: 'info' });
                        const result = await generateFieldContent(char, label, genInstructions, cfg.generalStyle, hintVal, genBudget);
                        if (result) { await applyResult(result); api.v1.ui.toast('Generated.', { id: 'ce-genf', type: 'success', autoClose: 1500 }); await refreshCharEditModal(); }
                        else { api.v1.ui.toast('Failed.', { id: 'ce-genf', type: 'error', autoClose: 2000 }); }
                    } }
                ];
                const hp = await openEngineModal({ title: 'Generate: ' + label, size: 'small', content: hintContent });
            } }
        ] } as UIPart,
        { type: 'button', text: currentValue || '(Tap to write, or generate above)', style: { width: '100%', margin: 0, textAlign: 'left', whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap', minHeight: '44px', fontSize: '12px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)', color: currentValue ? undefined : '#666' }, callback: async function() {
            const editContent: UIPart[] = [
                { type: 'multilineTextInput', label: label, initialValue: currentValue, style: { minHeight: '220px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { await applyResult(v); } },
                { type: 'button', text: 'Done', style: { width: '100%', marginTop: '8px' }, callback: async function() { try { if (fp && !fp.isClosed()) fp.close(); } catch (eFp) {} await refreshCharEditModal(); } }
            ];
            const fp = await openEngineModal({ title: label, size: 'large', content: editContent });
        } } as UIPart
    ];
}

// ── Equipment (Overview tab) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// [v2.17.0] Gained "+ Add Item Here" — the native inspect modal's own
// openAddItemModal()/spawnItem(), just called with this character's
// entityId as the explicit parent instead of a location id. spawnItem
// already treats any non-sentinel explicitParentId as a direct parent, so
// this parents the new item straight into the character's hierarchy, same
// as the bridge's existing character-scoped item button (v2.15.0
// BRIDGE-CONDITIONS). Also carries over the per-item edit shortcut that
// the orphaned buildInventorySection had the right idea about.
async function buildEquipmentRows(char: CharacterRecord): Promise<UIPart[]> {
    if (!char.entityId) {
        return [{ type: 'text', text: 'Character has no body entity — use Generate Missing Physical Body above before adding items.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.5' } }];
    }
    const rows: UIPart[] = [];
    const entIdx = await loadEntityIndex();
    const invItems = entIdx.filter(function(e) { return e.type === 'item' && e.parentId === char.entityId; });
    rows.push({ type: 'button', text: '+ Add Item Here', iconId: 'plus', style: { width: '100%', fontSize: '11px', marginBottom: '8px' }, callback: async function() { await openAddItemModal(char.entityId || null, refreshCharEditModal); } } as UIPart);
    if (invItems.length === 0) {
        rows.push({ type: 'text', text: 'No items carried.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.5' } });
    } else {
        for (const item of invItems) {
            const isEquipped = (char.equippedItemIds || []).includes(item.id);
            rows.push({ type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px', marginBottom: '4px' }, content: [
                { type: 'text', text: item.name, style: { flex: '1 1 0', fontSize: '12px', color: isEquipped ? '#7ec8a0' : undefined } },
                { type: 'button', text: isEquipped ? '\u2713 Equipped' : 'Equip', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: isEquipped ? 'rgba(126,200,160,0.15)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)', color: isEquipped ? '#7ec8a0' : undefined }, callback: async function() {
                    // [BUGFIX v2.51.7 EQUIP-STATE-SYNC, per user] Was a hand-rolled
                    // equippedItemIds splice -- correct for context (buildCharDynamicBlock
                    // reads it) but never touched the item entity's own isEquipped/
                    // equippedToCharId, so equipping here never showed up in the bridge's
                    // "Append equipped items" image-prompt feature (reads isEquipped). Now
                    // routes through aeSetEquip (Section 19), the same canonical function
                    // Fix A and the bridge HUD use, so both sides always move together.
                    const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (!f) return;
                    const itemEnt = await loadEntity(item.id); if (!itemEnt) return;
                    await aeSetEquip(itemEnt, f, !isEquipped);
                    await broadcastCharacterData();
                    await broadcastSceneState();
                    await refreshCharEditModal();  // [v0.9.8.5] equipment rides ephemeral temp entry; no lorebook sync
                } },
                { type: 'button', iconId: 'edit', style: { margin: 0 }, callback: async function() { await openEntityEditModal(item.id); } }
            ] } as UIPart);
        }
    }
    return rows;
}

// ── Faction Relationships (Overview tab) ─────────────────────────────────
function buildFactionRelationshipRows(char: CharacterRecord, cfg: GlobalConfig, charId: string): UIPart[] {
    if (!cfg.factions || cfg.factions.length === 0) {
        return [{ type: 'text', text: 'No factions defined yet — add some in Settings.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.5' } }];
    }
    const trackedFactions = cfg.factions.filter(function(f) { return char.charFactionRelationships && char.charFactionRelationships[f.id] !== undefined; });
    const untrackedFactions = cfg.factions.filter(function(f) { return !char.charFactionRelationships || char.charFactionRelationships[f.id] === undefined; });
    const rows: UIPart[] = [];
    rows.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Track faction relationships for this character independently of the player\'s standing.', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.5', marginBottom: '8px' } });

    for (let fi = 0; fi < trackedFactions.length; fi++) {
        let fac = trackedFactions[fi];
        let captFacId = fac.id;
        let relIdx = char.charFactionRelationships[fac.id] || 0;
        let relState = (fac.relationshipStates || [])[relIdx] || 'Unknown';
        rows.push({ type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px', marginBottom: '6px' }, content: [
            { type: 'text', text: fac.name, style: { flex: '1 1 0', fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 'bold' } },
            { type: 'button', text: relState, style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', minWidth: '90px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)' }, callback: async function() {
                let states = fac.relationshipStates || [];
                let pm = await openEngineModal({ title: fac.name + ' — Relationship', size: 'small', content: states.map(function(s, idx) {
                    return { type: 'button', text: s, style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '4px', backgroundColor: relIdx === idx ? 'rgba(126,200,160,0.2)' : undefined, color: relIdx === idx ? '#7ec8a0' : undefined }, callback: async function() {
                        const f2 = await loadCharacter(charId); if (!f2) return;
                        if (!f2.charFactionRelationships) f2.charFactionRelationships = {};
                        f2.charFactionRelationships[captFacId] = idx; await saveCharacter(f2); pm.close(); await refreshCharEditModal();
                    } } as UIPart;
                })});
            } },
            { type: 'button', text: '✕', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', color: '#ff6b6b', backgroundColor: 'transparent' }, callback: async function() {
                const f2 = await loadCharacter(charId); if (!f2) return;
                delete f2.charFactionRelationships[captFacId]; await saveCharacter(f2); await refreshCharEditModal();
            } }
        ] });
    }

    if (untrackedFactions.length > 0) {
        rows.push({ type: 'button', text: '+ Track Faction', style: { fontSize: '11px', width: '100%', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.04)' }, callback: async function() {
            let pm = await openEngineModal({ title: 'Track Faction Relationship', size: 'small', content: untrackedFactions.map(function(f) {
                return { type: 'button', text: f.name, style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '4px', textAlign: 'left' }, callback: async function() {
                    const f2 = await loadCharacter(charId); if (!f2) return;
                    if (!f2.charFactionRelationships) f2.charFactionRelationships = {};
                    f2.charFactionRelationships[f.id] = 0; await saveCharacter(f2); pm.close(); await refreshCharEditModal();
                } } as UIPart;
            })});
        } });
    }

    if (trackedFactions.length === 0) rows.push({ type: 'text', text: 'No factions tracked. Use "+ Track Faction" to add.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.4' } });
    return rows;
}

// ── Conditions (Overview tab) ────────────────────────────────────────────
// [v2.17.0] Same computation as before (v2.7.0 CONDITIONS), just returning
// bare rows instead of a wrapping collapsibleSection — Overview shows it
// under a plain sectionHeader() instead.
function buildConditionsRows(char: CharacterRecord, cfg: GlobalConfig): UIPart[] {
    const defs = cfg.conditions || [];
    const active = char.activeConditions || [];

    const rows: UIPart[] = defs.map(function(def) {
        const stateIdx = active.findIndex(function(s) { return s.defId === def.id; });
        const isActive = stateIdx >= 0;
        const curStageIdx = isActive ? (active[stateIdx].stageIndex || 0) : 0;
        const hasStages = !!(def.stages && def.stages.length);
        const stageLabel = hasStages ? (def.stages[Math.max(0, Math.min(def.stages.length - 1, curStageIdx))] || '') : '';

        const rowContent: UIPart[] = [
            { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '8px' }, content: [
                { type: 'checkboxInput', initialValue: isActive, onChange: async function(v: boolean) {
                    const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (!f) return;
                    if (!f.activeConditions) f.activeConditions = [];
                    if (v) {
                        if (!f.activeConditions.some(function(s) { return s.defId === def.id; })) {
                            f.activeConditions.push({ defId: def.id, stageIndex: 0 });
                        }
                    } else {
                        f.activeConditions = f.activeConditions.filter(function(s) { return s.defId !== def.id; });
                    }
                    await saveCharacter(f); await refreshCharEditModal();
                } },
                { type: 'text', text: def.name, style: { fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 'bold', color: isActive ? '#e8a87c' : undefined, flex: '1 1 0' } }
            ] } as UIPart
        ];

        if (isActive && hasStages) {
            rowContent.push({ type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px', marginTop: '2px', marginLeft: '24px' }, content: [
                { type: 'button', text: '◀', style: { margin: 0, width: '28px' }, disabled: curStageIdx === 0, callback: async function() {
                    const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (!f) return;
                    const s = (f.activeConditions || []).find(function(x) { return x.defId === def.id; });
                    if (s) { s.stageIndex = Math.max(0, curStageIdx - 1); await saveCharacter(f); await refreshCharEditModal(); }
                } },
                { type: 'text', text: (curStageIdx + 1) + '/' + def.stages.length + ' \u2014 ' + (stageLabel || ''), style: { flex: '1', fontSize: '11px', textAlign: 'center', color: '#7ec8a0' } },
                { type: 'button', text: '\u25b6', style: { margin: 0, width: '28px' }, disabled: curStageIdx >= def.stages.length - 1, callback: async function() {
                    const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (!f) return;
                    const s = (f.activeConditions || []).find(function(x) { return x.defId === def.id; });
                    if (s) { s.stageIndex = Math.min(def.stages.length - 1, curStageIdx + 1); await saveCharacter(f); await refreshCharEditModal(); }
                } }
            ] } as UIPart);
        }

        return { type: 'box', style: { padding: '6px 8px', marginBottom: '4px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.02)', borderRadius: '4px' }, content: rowContent } as UIPart;
    });

    if (defs.length === 0) {
        rows.push({ type: 'text', text: 'No conditions defined yet \u2014 add some in Settings.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.5', textAlign: 'center', marginBottom: '4px' } } as UIPart);
    }

    const previewLines: string[] = active.map(function(s) {
        const def = defs.find(function(d) { return d.id === s.defId; });
        if (!def) return '';
        return buildConditionLine(char, def, s.stageIndex, cfg);
    }).filter(Boolean);

    return [
        { type: 'text', text: 'Multiple can be active at once. Defined in Settings. Injects into a temporary lorebook entry while active, not the Author\u2019s Note.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.6', marginBottom: '8px' } } as UIPart,
        ...rows,
        (previewLines.length > 0 ? { type: 'box', style: { padding: '6px 8px', marginTop: '8px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.25)', borderRadius: '4px', borderLeft: '3px solid #7ec8a0' }, content: [
            { type: 'text', text: 'Lorebook preview:', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.5', marginBottom: '2px' } },
            ...previewLines.map(function(l) { return { type: 'text', text: l, style: { fontSize: '11px', fontStyle: 'italic', opacity: '0.85' } } as UIPart; })
        ] } as UIPart : null)
    ].filter(Boolean) as UIPart[];
}

// ── Hooks (Dynamic Profile tab, rendered first) ──────────────────────────
// [v2.17.0] Slim empty state (one line + Add/Scan) instead of a padded
// collapsibleSection nobody opens when there's nothing in it; full editable
// list once hooks exist. BUNDLED FIX found while rebuilding this: the old
// "✓ Resolve Hook" button was singular-labeled but wiped char.hooks = []
// entirely — ALL hooks, not just one — with zero confirmation. Renamed to
// "Resolve Oldest" and changed to f.hooks.slice(1), matching what the label
// always claimed to do.
function buildHooksSection(char: CharacterRecord, cfg: GlobalConfig): UIPart[] {
    if (char.hooks.length === 0) {
        return [{ type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '8px' }, content: [
            { type: 'text', text: 'No active hooks.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.5', flex: '1 1 0' } },
            { type: 'button', text: '+ Add Hook', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: async function() { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (f) { f.hooks.push({ id: api.v1.uuid(), targetName: '', description: '', pressureLevel: 30, developmentNotes: [], resolved: false }); await saveCharacter(f); await refreshCharEditModal(); } } },
            { type: 'button', text: 'Scan', iconId: 'refresh-cw', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (!f) return;
                const cfg2 = await loadConfig(); const tc = await api.v1.storyStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_GEN_COUNT, 0) as number;
                api.v1.ui.toast('Scanning…', { id: 'ce-hk', autoClose: false, type: 'info' });
                const ok = await generateHookUpdates(f, cfg2, tc);
                api.v1.ui.toast(ok ? 'Updated.' : 'Failed.', { id: 'ce-hk', type: ok ? 'success' : 'error', autoClose: 2000 });
                if (ok) await refreshCharEditModal();
            } }
        ] } as UIPart];
    }

    const hookItems: UIPart[] = char.hooks.filter(Boolean).map(function(hk, i) {
        // [BUGFIX v2.28.0, per user's crash report] Was `npcPressureLabel`, which is
        // not and never was defined anywhere in this file (a ReferenceError only once
        // a character actually had a hook, which is why it surfaced as "can't open
        // Dynamics" rather than at load time). The real function is `_aePressureLabel`
        // (SECTION "SHARED INSPECT / ITEM / NARRATIVE HELPERS"), already used correctly
        // by the sidebar's hooks list a few hundred lines down.
        const hi = i; const imperative = _aePressureLabel(hk.pressureLevel);
        let hkDisplayTarget = hk.targetName === '__player__' ? '👑 Player' : (hk.targetName || 'Unknown');
        return { type: 'collapsibleSection', title: (hk.pressureLevel >= 85 ? '🔥 ' : '') + hkDisplayTarget + ' — ' + imperative + ' (' + hk.pressureLevel + ')', initialCollapsed: true, storageKey: `temp:ce_hk_${char.id}_${hk.id}`, content: [
            { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '4px', marginBottom: '4px' }, content: [
                { type: 'text', text: 'Target:', style: { fontSize: '11px', width: '50px', opacity: '0.7' } },
                { type: 'button', text: hk.targetName === '__player__' ? '👑 Player' : (hk.targetName || '(Select Target)'), style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', textAlign: 'left', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)' }, callback: async function() {
                    await api.v1.tempStorage.set('ce_hk_target_search', '');
                    async function drawSearchablePicker() {
                        const term = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault('ce_hk_target_search', '') as string;
                        const chars = typeof loadIndex === 'function' ? await loadIndex() : [];
                        const pickable = chars.filter(function(m) {
                            return m.id !== char.id && m.name.toLowerCase().includes(term.toLowerCase());
                        });
                        const contentParts: UIPart[] = [];
                        contentParts.push({ type: 'textInput', placeholder: '🔍 Search characters...', initialValue: term, onChange: async function(v: string) { await api.v1.tempStorage.set('ce_hk_target_search', v); await drawSearchablePicker(); } });
                        contentParts.push({ type: 'button', text: '✕ Clear Target', style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '4px', marginTop: '8px', color: '#ff6b6b' }, callback: async function() {
                            const f = await loadCharacter(char.id);
                            if (f) { f.hooks[hi].targetName = ''; await saveCharacter(f); pm.close(); await refreshCharEditModal(); }
                        } });
                        contentParts.push({ type: 'button', text: '👑 Player Character (protagonist)', style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '8px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,180,50,0.1)', color: '#ffb432', border: '1px solid rgba(255,180,50,0.2)' }, callback: async function() {
                            const f = await loadCharacter(char.id);
                            if (f) { f.hooks[hi].targetName = '__player__'; await saveCharacter(f); pm.close(); await refreshCharEditModal(); }
                        } });
                        pickable.forEach(function(m) {
                            contentParts.push({ type: 'button', text: `👤 ${m.name}`, style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '2px', textAlign: 'left', backgroundColor: hk.targetName === m.name ? 'rgba(126,200,160,0.2)' : undefined }, callback: async function() {
                                const f = await loadCharacter(char.id);
                                if (f) { f.hooks[hi].targetName = m.name; await saveCharacter(f); pm.close(); await refreshCharEditModal(); }
                            } } as UIPart);
                        });
                        if (pm && typeof pm.isClosed === 'function' && !pm.isClosed()) {
                            await pm.update({ content: contentParts });
                        } else {
                            pm = await openEngineModal({ id: 'ce-hk-target-picker', title: 'Select Hook Target', size: 'medium', content: contentParts });
                        }
                    }
                    let pm: any;
                    await drawSearchablePicker();
                }}
            ]},
            { type: 'multilineTextInput', label: 'Hook Description (the core tension)', initialValue: hk.description, style: { minHeight: '50px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (f) { f.hooks[hi].description = v; await saveCharacter(f); } } },
            { type: 'sliderInput', label: `Pressure Level — ${imperative}`, min: 0, max: 100, step: 5, initialValue: hk.pressureLevel, onChange: async function(v: number) { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (f) { f.hooks[hi].pressureLevel = v; await saveCharacter(f); } } },
            { type: 'text', text: 'Pressure 85+: injects directly into the Author\u2019s Note alongside this character\u2019s thoughts. Below 85: tracked here but not currently injected into context.', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.45', marginBottom: '6px' } },
            hk.developmentNotes.filter(Boolean).length > 0 ? { type: 'box', style: { backgroundColor: 'bg1', padding: '6px', borderRadius: '4px', marginBottom: '4px' }, content: hk.developmentNotes.filter(Boolean).map(function(n) { return { type: 'text', text: `• ${n}`, style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.6' } } as UIPart; }) } as UIPart : null,
            { type: 'checkboxInput', label: 'Resolved', initialValue: hk.resolved, onChange: async function(v: boolean) { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (f) { f.hooks[hi].resolved = v; await saveCharacter(f); await refreshCharEditModal(); } } },
            { type: 'button', text: '🗑 Remove Hook', style: { fontSize: '11px', marginTop: '6px', color: '#ff6b6b' }, callback: async function() { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (f) { f.hooks.splice(hi, 1); await saveCharacter(f); await refreshCharEditModal(); } } }
        ].filter(Boolean) as UIPart[] } as UIPart;
    });

    return [
        { type: 'text', text: 'Dramatic tensions between this character and another. Tracked by pressure level; 85+ injects into the Author\u2019s Note.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.6', marginBottom: '8px' } } as UIPart,
        ...hookItems,
        { type: 'row', style: { gap: '4px', marginTop: '8px' }, content: [
            { type: 'button', text: '+ Add Blank Hook', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: async function() { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (f) { f.hooks.push({ id: api.v1.uuid(), targetName: '', description: '', pressureLevel: 30, developmentNotes: [], resolved: false }); await saveCharacter(f); await refreshCharEditModal(); } } },
            { type: 'button', text: 'Scan Hooks', iconId: 'refresh-cw', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (!f) return;
                const cfg2 = await loadConfig(); const tc = await api.v1.storyStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_GEN_COUNT, 0) as number;
                api.v1.ui.toast('Scanning…', { id: 'ce-hk', autoClose: false, type: 'info' });
                const ok = await generateHookUpdates(f, cfg2, tc);
                api.v1.ui.toast(ok ? 'Updated.' : 'Failed.', { id: 'ce-hk', type: ok ? 'success' : 'error', autoClose: 2000 });
                if (ok) await refreshCharEditModal();
            } },
            { type: 'button', text: 'Resolve Oldest', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(126,200,160,0.08)', color: '#7ec8a0', border: '1px solid rgba(126,200,160,0.3)' }, disabled: char.hooks.length === 0, callback: async function() {
                const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (!f || f.hooks.length === 0) return;
                const hDesc = f.hooks[0].description.substring(0, 50);
                f.hooks = f.hooks.slice(1); await saveCharacter(f);
                api.v1.ui.toast('Hook resolved: ' + hDesc, { type: 'success', autoClose: 3000 });
                await refreshCharEditModal();
            } }
        ] }
    ];
}

// ── Ephemeral Thoughts / Mid-range State (Dynamic Profile tab) ──────────
function buildEphemeralRows(char: CharacterRecord, cfg: GlobalConfig): UIPart[] {
    const eph = char.ephemeral;
    const rows: UIPart[] = [];
    if (eph) {
        rows.push(
            { type: 'box', style: { backgroundColor: 'bg1', padding: '8px', borderRadius: '4px', marginBottom: '8px' }, content: [
                { type: 'text', text: `Event: "${eph.eventAnchor}"`, style: { fontSize: '11px', marginBottom: '2px' } },
                { type: 'text', text: `Feeling: "${eph.emotionalResponse}"`, style: { fontSize: '11px', marginBottom: '2px' } },
                { type: 'text', text: `Drive: "${eph.immediateDesire}"`, style: { fontSize: '11px', marginBottom: '6px' } },
                { type: 'text', text: 'Override thought (replaces AI fallback line):', style: { fontSize: '9px', opacity: '0.55', marginTop: '6px', marginBottom: '2px' } },
                { type: 'multilineTextInput', label: 'Override', placeholder: 'Leave blank to use AI-generated line. Type here to manually set.', initialValue: eph.compressedLine, style: { fontSize: '11px', minHeight: '40px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (f && f.ephemeral) { f.ephemeral.compressedLine = v; await saveCharacter(f); } } }
            ] },
            { type: 'row', style: { gap: '4px' }, content: [
                { type: 'button', text: 'Regenerate', iconId: 'refresh-cw', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (!f) return; const tc = await api.v1.storyStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_GEN_COUNT, 0) as number; api.v1.ui.toast('Generating…', { id: 'ce-eph', autoClose: false, type: 'info' }); const ok = await generateEphemeral(f, cfg, tc); api.v1.ui.toast(ok ? 'Updated.' : 'Failed.', { id: 'ce-eph', type: ok ? 'success' : 'error', autoClose: 2000 }); if (ok) await refreshCharEditModal(); } },
                { type: 'button', text: 'Clear', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: async function() { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (!f) return; f.ephemeral = null; f.ephemeralHistory = []; f.lastEphemeralGen = 0; await saveCharacter(f); await refreshCharEditModal(); } }
            ] }
        );
        if (char.ephemeralHistory.filter(Boolean).length > 0) {
            rows.push({ type: 'text', text: 'History:', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.5', marginTop: '8px' } });
            for (const h of char.ephemeralHistory.filter(Boolean)) { rows.push({ type: 'text', text: `  ${h.compressedLine}`, style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.4' } }); }
        }
    } else {
        rows.push({ type: 'text', text: 'No snapshot yet. Generates automatically on generation end.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.5', marginBottom: '6px' } });
        rows.push({ type: 'button', text: 'Force Generate', iconId: 'zap', style: { fontSize: '11px' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (!f) return; const tc = await api.v1.storyStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_GEN_COUNT, 0) as number; api.v1.ui.toast('Generating…', { id: 'ce-eph', autoClose: false, type: 'info' }); const ok = await generateEphemeral(f, cfg, tc); api.v1.ui.toast(ok ? 'Updated.' : 'Failed.', { id: 'ce-eph', type: ok ? 'success' : 'error', autoClose: ok ? 2000 : 3000 }); if (ok) await refreshCharEditModal(); } });
    }
    return rows;
}

function buildMidRangeRows(char: CharacterRecord, cfg: GlobalConfig): UIPart[] {
    const mid = char.midRange;
    const rows: UIPart[] = [];
    if (mid) {
        rows.push(
            { type: 'multilineTextInput', label: 'Current Goal', initialValue: mid.currentDesire, style: { fontSize: '11px', minHeight: '40px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (f && f.midRange) { f.midRange.currentDesire = v; await saveCharacter(f); } } },
            { type: 'multilineTextInput', label: 'Social Mask (performing vs. interior)', initialValue: mid.socialMask, style: { fontSize: '11px', minHeight: '40px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (f && f.midRange) { f.midRange.socialMask = v; await saveCharacter(f); } } },
            { type: 'multilineTextInput', label: 'Shifted View (belief now — diffed from baseline)', initialValue: mid.shiftedView, style: { fontSize: '11px', minHeight: '40px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (f && f.midRange) { f.midRange.shiftedView = v; await saveCharacter(f); } } },
            { type: 'multilineTextInput', label: 'Baseline View (frozen — belief entering the story)', initialValue: (mid as any).baselineView || '', style: { fontSize: '11px', minHeight: '40px', opacity: '0.85' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (f && f.midRange) { (f.midRange as any).baselineView = v; await saveCharacter(f); } } },
            { type: 'button', text: 'Regenerate', iconId: 'refresh-cw', style: { fontSize: '11px', marginTop: '4px' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (!f) return; const tc = await api.v1.storyStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_GEN_COUNT, 0) as number; api.v1.ui.toast('Generating…', { id: 'ce-mid', autoClose: false, type: 'info' }); const ok = await generateMidRange(f, cfg, tc); api.v1.ui.toast(ok ? 'Updated.' : 'Failed.', { id: 'ce-mid', type: ok ? 'success' : 'error', autoClose: 2000 }); if (ok) await refreshCharEditModal(); } }
        );
        const _mh = (char.midRangeHistory || []).filter(Boolean);
        if (_mh.length > 0) {
            rows.push({ type: 'text', text: 'History (logged only on change):', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.5', marginTop: '6px' } });
            for (const _h of _mh) { rows.push({ type: 'text', text: `  (gen ${_h.atGen}) wants ${_h.currentDesire || '\u2014'}; believes ${_h.shiftedView || '\u2014'}`, style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.4' } }); }
        }
    } else {
        rows.push({ type: 'text', text: 'No mid-range state yet.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.5', marginBottom: '6px' } });
        rows.push({ type: 'button', text: 'Force Generate', iconId: 'zap', style: { fontSize: '11px' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (!f) return; const tc = await api.v1.storyStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_GEN_COUNT, 0) as number; api.v1.ui.toast('Generating…', { id: 'ce-mid', autoClose: false, type: 'info' }); const ok = await generateMidRange(f, cfg, tc); api.v1.ui.toast(ok ? 'Updated.' : 'Failed.', { id: 'ce-mid', type: ok ? 'success' : 'error', autoClose: ok ? 2000 : 3000 }); if (ok) await refreshCharEditModal(); } });
    }
    return rows;
}

// ── Primary Relationship (Dynamic Profile tab) ───────────────────────────
// [v2.17.0] "Enable in AI Context" checkbox removed — that's now the top
// toggle bar's "Relationship" button (char.primaryRelationship.enabled is
// the same field, just controlled from one place instead of two).
function buildRelationshipSection(char: CharacterRecord, cfg: GlobalConfig): UIPart[] {
    const rel = char.primaryRelationship;
    const threadItems: UIPart[] = rel.threads.filter(Boolean).map(function(thread, i) {
        const ti = i; return { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '4px', marginBottom: '2px' }, content: [
            { type: 'textInput', initialValue: thread, style: { flex: '1 1 0', fontSize: '12px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (f) { f.primaryRelationship.threads[ti] = v; await saveCharacter(f); } } },
            { type: 'button', iconId: 'x', style: { margin: 0 }, callback: async function() { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (f) { f.primaryRelationship.threads.splice(ti, 1); await saveCharacter(f); await refreshCharEditModal(); } } }
        ] } as UIPart;
    });
    const tkTh = `ce_tmp_rth_${char.id}`;

    return [
        { type: 'button', text: rel.targetName === '__player__' ? '👑 Player Character' : (rel.targetName ? `👤 ${rel.targetName}` : 'Select Character...'), style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '4px', textAlign: 'left', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)' }, callback: async function() {
            const others = await loadCharacterListForPicker(char.id);
            const pm = await openEngineModal({ title: 'Relationship Target', size: 'small', content: [
                { type: 'button', text: '✕ Clear', style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '8px', color: '#ff6b6b' }, callback: async function() { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (f) { f.primaryRelationship.targetName = ''; await saveCharacter(f); } pm.close(); await refreshCharEditModal(); } },
                { type: 'button', text: '👑 Player Character (protagonist)', style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '8px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,180,50,0.1)', color: '#ffb432', border: '1px solid rgba(255,180,50,0.2)' }, callback: async function() {
                    const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (!f) return;
                    f.primaryRelationship.targetName = '__player__';
                    if (!f.primaryRelationship.enabled) f.primaryRelationship.enabled = true;
                    await saveCharacter(f); pm.close(); await refreshCharEditModal();
                } },
                ...others.map(function(m) {
                    return { type: 'button', text: m.name, style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '4px', backgroundColor: rel.targetName === m.name ? 'rgba(126,200,160,0.2)' : undefined }, callback: async function() {
                        const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (!f) return;
                        f.primaryRelationship.targetName = m.name; await saveCharacter(f); pm.close(); await refreshCharEditModal();
                    } } as UIPart;
                })
            ]});
        } } as UIPart,
        { type: 'column', style: { gap: '2px', marginTop: '8px', marginBottom: '8px' }, content: (function() {
            let archDef = findArchetypeDef(cfg, rel);
            let stageName = resolveArchetypeStage(cfg, rel);
            let hasStages = !!(archDef && archDef.stages && archDef.stages.length);
            let curStageIdx = (typeof rel.stageIndex === 'number') ? rel.stageIndex : 0;
            let archCol: UIPart[] = [
                { type: 'text', text: 'Archetype', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.6' } },
                { type: 'button', text: rel.archetype || '(Select Archetype)', style: { margin: 0, textAlign: 'left', fontSize: '12px' }, callback: async function() {
                    let items: PickItem[] = (cfg.relationshipArchetypes || []).map(function(d) { return { id: d.id, label: d.name + (d.stages && d.stages.length ? '  (' + d.stages.length + ' stages)' : ''), selected: rel.archetypeId === d.id || rel.archetype === d.name }; });
                    await openSearchPicker('Archetype', items, async function(id) {
                        const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (!f) return;
                        let picked = (cfg.relationshipArchetypes || []).find(function(d) { return d.id === id; });
                        if (picked) { f.primaryRelationship.archetypeId = picked.id; f.primaryRelationship.archetype = picked.name; f.primaryRelationship.stageIndex = 0; await saveCharacter(f); }
                        await refreshCharEditModal();
                    });
                } }
            ];
            if (hasStages) {
                archCol.push({ type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px', marginTop: '4px' }, content: [
                    { type: 'text', text: 'Stage:', style: { fontSize: '11px', width: '44px', opacity: '0.7' } },
                    { type: 'button', text: '\u25c0', style: { margin: 0, width: '32px' }, callback: async function() { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (f) { let m = Math.max(0, Math.min((archDef!.stages.length - 1), curStageIdx - 1)); f.primaryRelationship.stageIndex = m; await saveCharacter(f); await refreshCharEditModal(); } } },
                    { type: 'text', text: (curStageIdx + 1) + '/' + archDef!.stages.length + ' \u2014 ' + (stageName || ''), style: { flex: '1', fontSize: '11px', textAlign: 'center', color: '#7ec8a0' } },
                    { type: 'button', text: '\u25b6', style: { margin: 0, width: '32px' }, callback: async function() { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (f) { let m = Math.max(0, Math.min((archDef!.stages.length - 1), curStageIdx + 1)); f.primaryRelationship.stageIndex = m; await saveCharacter(f); await refreshCharEditModal(); } } }
                ] } as UIPart);
            }
            return archCol;
        })() } as UIPart,
        { type: 'textInput', label: 'How It Started', initialValue: rel.howItStarted, placeholder: 'Origin of the dynamic...', onChange: async function(v: string) { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (f) { f.primaryRelationship.howItStarted = v; await saveCharacter(f); } } } as UIPart,
        { type: 'text', text: 'Threads', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.6', marginTop: '8px', marginBottom: '2px' } } as UIPart,
        ...threadItems,
        { type: 'row', style: { gap: '4px', marginBottom: '8px' }, content: [
            { type: 'textInput', placeholder: 'Add thread...', storageKey: `temp:${tkTh}`, style: { flex: '1 1 0' } },
            { type: 'button', iconId: 'plus', style: { margin: 0 }, callback: async function() { const v = await api.v1.tempStorage.get(tkTh) as string || ''; if (!v.trim()) return; const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (f) { f.primaryRelationship.threads.push(v.trim()); await saveCharacter(f); await api.v1.tempStorage.remove(tkTh); await refreshCharEditModal(); } } }
        ] } as UIPart,
        { type: 'multilineTextInput', label: 'Current Status', initialValue: rel.currentStatus, placeholder: 'Observable surface behavior — how do they act toward each other right now?', style: { minHeight: '50px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (f) { f.primaryRelationship.currentStatus = v; await saveCharacter(f); } } } as UIPart,
        { type: 'multilineTextInput', label: 'Trajectory', initialValue: rel.trajectory, placeholder: 'The force pushing it — what event or tension is driving change?', style: { minHeight: '40px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (f) { f.primaryRelationship.trajectory = v; await saveCharacter(f); } } } as UIPart,
        { type: 'multilineTextInput', label: 'Summary', initialValue: rel.summary, placeholder: 'The core knot — what do they each need that the other cannot give?', style: { minHeight: '60px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (f) { f.primaryRelationship.summary = v; await saveCharacter(f); } } } as UIPart,
        { type: 'button', text: 'Regenerate Relationship', iconId: 'refresh-cw', style: { width: '100%', marginTop: '8px', fontSize: '11px' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (!f) return; const tc = await api.v1.storyStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_GEN_COUNT, 0) as number; api.v1.ui.toast('Generating…', { id: 'ce-rel', autoClose: false, type: 'info' }); const ok = await generateRelationshipUpdate(f, cfg, tc); api.v1.ui.toast(ok ? 'Updated.' : 'Failed.', { id: 'ce-rel', type: ok ? 'success' : 'error', autoClose: 2000 }); if (ok) await refreshCharEditModal(); } } as UIPart
    ];
}

// ── TAB: Overview ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
async function buildCharOverviewTab(char: CharacterRecord, cfg: GlobalConfig, charId: string, mut: (fn: (c: CharacterRecord) => void) => Promise<void>): Promise<UIPart[]> {
    const parts: UIPart[] = [];
    const idx = await loadIndex();
    const myMeta = idx.find(function(m) { return m.id === charId; });
    const currentLocationId = myMeta ? myMeta.currentLocationId : undefined;
    const entIdx = await loadEntityIndex();
    const locName = currentLocationId ? (entIdx.find(function(m) { return m.id === currentLocationId; })?.name || 'Unknown') : 'No Location';

    parts.push({ type: 'textInput', placeholder: 'Character Name', initialValue: char.name, style: { fontSize: '16px', fontWeight: 'bold', marginBottom: '12px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) {
        await mut(function(c) { c.name = v; });
        const fresh = await loadCharacter(charId);
        if (fresh && fresh.entityId) { let nameEnt = await loadEntity(fresh.entityId); if (nameEnt) { nameEnt.name = v; await saveEntity(nameEnt); } }
    } } as UIPart);

    parts.push(sectionHeader('Status'));
    parts.push(controlRow(
        { type: 'button', text: char.active ? 'Active' : 'Inactive', style: { minWidth: '100px', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: char.active ? 'rgba(126,200,160,0.2)' : 'rgba(255,107,107,0.2)', color: char.active ? '#7ec8a0' : '#ff6b6b' }, callback: async function() { await mut(function(c) { c.active = !c.active; }); await refreshCharEditModal(); } } as UIPart,
        'Included in context injection at all. Off = as if this character doesn\u2019t exist.'
    ));
    parts.push(controlRow(
        { type: 'button', text: char.scenePresent ? 'In Scene' : 'Away', style: { minWidth: '100px', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: char.scenePresent ? 'rgba(126,200,160,0.15)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)', color: char.scenePresent ? '#7ec8a0' : '#888' }, callback: async function() { await mut(function(c) { c.scenePresent = !c.scenePresent; }); await refreshCharEditModal(); } } as UIPart,
        'Manual override for scene presence. Resets automatically on location change.'
    ));
    parts.push(controlRow(
        { type: 'button', text: (char as any).isStatic ? 'Static' : 'Dynamic', style: { minWidth: '100px', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: (char as any).isStatic ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)' : 'rgba(136,204,255,0.15)', color: (char as any).isStatic ? '#888' : '#88ccff' }, callback: async function() {
            await mut(function(c) {
                (c as any).isStatic = !(c as any).isStatic;
                const nowDyn = !(c as any).isStatic;
                c.charContextEnabled = nowDyn;
                c.autoUpdateEnabled = nowDyn;
                c.autoThoughtsEnabled = nowDyn;
                c.hooksEnabled = nowDyn;
                if (c.primaryRelationship) c.primaryRelationship.enabled = nowDyn;
            });
            await refreshCharEditModal();
        } } as UIPart,
        'Master switch for all background AI updates and their injection. Individual controls live on the Dynamic Profile tab.'
    ));
    parts.push(
        ((char as any).isProtagonist) ? { type: 'text', text: '', style: { height: '0px' } } as UIPart : { type: 'column', style: { gap: '2px', marginBottom: '10px' }, content: [
            { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px' }, content: [
                { type: 'text', text: 'Dynamic priority', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.7', flexShrink: '0' } },
                { type: 'button', text: (typeof (char as any).dynamicPriorityRank === 'number' && (char as any).dynamicPriorityRank > 0) ? ('Rank #' + (char as any).dynamicPriorityRank) : 'Unranked', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '10px', textAlign: 'left', backgroundColor: (typeof (char as any).dynamicPriorityRank === 'number' && (char as any).dynamicPriorityRank > 0) ? 'rgba(232,168,124,0.15)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)', color: (typeof (char as any).dynamicPriorityRank === 'number' && (char as any).dynamicPriorityRank > 0) ? '#e8a87c' : '#888' }, callback: async function() {
                    await openDynamicRankPicker(charId, async function() { await refreshCharEditModal(); await refreshSidebar(); });
                } }
            ] },
            // [v2.26.0, per user] Helper text explaining maxDynamicCharacters lives here
            // now — it previously had no in-context explanation at all.
            { type: 'text', text: 'Only the top-ranked characters, up to the max set in Settings \u2192 Dynamic Updates Timing, actually run in the background each turn \u2014 everyone else waits. Recommend limiting how many dynamic characters are present at once, or setting a max there, to avoid context bloat.', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.55', lineHeight: '1.3' } }
        ] }
    );

    parts.push(sectionHeader('Location & Journal'));
    parts.push({ type: 'button', text: locName, iconId: 'map-pin', style: { width: '100%', margin: 0, marginBottom: '6px', fontSize: '11px', textAlign: 'left' }, callback: async function() {
        const freshEntIdx = await loadEntityIndex();
        // [BUGFIX v2.26.0, per user] Was `n.type !== 'character'` — excluded characters
        // but let items and narrative threads show up as location options too. parentId
        // (what this picker sets) is purely spatial nesting, so only type==='location'
        // entities are ever valid targets.
        const spatialNodes = freshEntIdx.filter(function(n: any) { return n.type === 'location'; });
        const pickerContent = [
            { type: 'button', text: '✕ No Location', style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '8px' }, callback: async function() {
                const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (!f) { pm.close(); return; }
                if (f.entityId) { let locEnt = await loadEntity(f.entityId); if (locEnt) { locEnt.parentId = null; await saveEntity(locEnt); } }
                await saveCharacter(f); await recalculateScenePresence(); pm.close(); await refreshCharEditModal();
            } }
        ];
        spatialNodes.filter(Boolean).forEach(function(l: any) {
            pickerContent.push({ type: 'button', text: l.name, style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '2px', textAlign: 'left', backgroundColor: currentLocationId === l.id ? 'rgba(126,200,160,0.2)' : undefined }, callback: async function() {
                const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (!f) { pm.close(); return; }
                if (f.entityId) { let locEnt2 = await loadEntity(f.entityId); if (locEnt2) { locEnt2.parentId = l.id; await saveEntity(locEnt2); } }
                await saveCharacter(f); await recalculateScenePresence(); pm.close(); await refreshCharEditModal();
            } } as UIPart);
        });
        const pm = await openEngineModal({ title: 'Set Location', size: 'medium', content: pickerContent });
    } } as UIPart);
    parts.push({ type: 'button', text: 'Open Journal', iconId: 'book-open', style: { width: '100%', margin: 0, marginBottom: '6px', fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(232,168,124,0.12)', color: '#e8a87c' }, callback: async function() { try { await openCharJournalModal(charId); } catch (e) {} } } as UIPart);

    parts.push(sectionHeader('System'));
    let charBodyIsMissing = true;
    if (char.entityId) { let checkEnt = await loadEntity(char.entityId); if (checkEnt) charBodyIsMissing = false; }
    if (charBodyIsMissing) {
        parts.push({ type: 'button', text: 'Generate Missing Physical Body', iconId: 'tool', style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '8px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,180,50,0.1)', border: '1px solid rgba(255,180,50,0.3)', color: '#ffb432' }, callback: async function() {
            if (typeof makeDefaultEntity === 'function') {
                let repairEnt = makeDefaultEntity(char.name);
                repairEnt.type = 'character';
                repairEnt.parentId = null;
                await saveEntity(repairEnt);
                const f = await loadCharacter(char.id);
                if (f) { f.entityId = repairEnt.id; await saveCharacter(f); await refreshCharEditModal(); if (typeof refreshSidebar === 'function') await refreshSidebar(); }
            }
        } } as UIPart);
    }
    // BUNDLED FIX [v2.17.0]: this button previously called confirmDeleteChar
    // (a PERMANENT, irreversible deleteCharacter()) even though its own Help
    // text — and the identical Roster card button — describe the reversible
    // killCharacter() (Inactive + drop items + move to Graveyard, restorable).
    // Now correctly calls killCharacter, matching the roster's own Kill button
    // and the caption below.
    parts.push(controlRow(
        { type: 'button', text: 'Kill', iconId: 'archive', style: { minWidth: '100px', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,180,50,0.08)', border: '1px solid rgba(255,180,50,0.25)', color: '#ffb432' }, callback: async function() { await killCharacter(char.id); await refreshCharEditModal(); await refreshSidebar(); } } as UIPart,
        'Sets Inactive, drops carried items at their last location, moves the body to a Graveyard location. Reversible \u2014 move them out and reactivate to restore.'
    ));
    parts.push(controlRow(
        { type: 'button', text: 'Delete Character', iconId: 'trash-2', style: { minWidth: '100px', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', color: '#ff6b6b', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,107,107,0.1)', border: '1px solid rgba(255,107,107,0.3)' }, callback: async function() { if (typeof confirmDeleteChar === 'function') await confirmDeleteChar(char.id, char.name); } } as UIPart,
        'Permanently deletes the character record. Cannot be undone.'
    ));

    parts.push(sectionHeader('Equipment'));
    parts.push(...(await buildEquipmentRows(char)));

    parts.push(sectionHeader('Conditions'));
    parts.push(...buildConditionsRows(char, cfg));

    parts.push(sectionHeader('Factions'));
    parts.push(...buildFactionRelationshipRows(char, cfg, charId));

    return parts;
}

// ── TAB: Static Profile ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
async function buildCharStaticTab(char: CharacterRecord, cfg: GlobalConfig, charId: string, mut: (fn: (c: CharacterRecord) => void) => Promise<void>): Promise<UIPart[]> {
    function getBiographicalPreviews(c: CharacterRecord) {
        const idLeader = [(c.species || '').trim(), (c.gender || '').trim()].filter(Boolean).join(' ');
        const idMid = [idLeader, (c.age || '').trim(), (c.occupationRole || '').trim()].filter(Boolean).join(', ');
        let loreLine = (c.name || 'Unnamed').trim();
        if (idMid) loreLine += ' \u2014 ' + idMid;
        return { anLine: loreLine };
    }
    async function updateBiographicalPreviews() {
        const fresh = await loadCharacter(charId);
        if (!fresh) return;
        const previews = getBiographicalPreviews(fresh);
        await api.v1.ui.updateParts([{ id: 'ae-an-preview', text: 'Lorebook: ' + previews.anLine }]).catch(function() {});
    }
    const initialPreviews = getBiographicalPreviews(char);

    const staticContent: UIPart[] = [];

    staticContent.push({
        type: 'multilineTextInput', label: 'Concept Dump (Raw Notes)',
        placeholder: 'Dump ideas, profiles, references — informs all static field generations. Not injected into live context.',
        initialValue: char.conceptDump || '', style: { minHeight: '80px', marginBottom: '8px' },
        onChange: async function(v: string) { await mut(function(c) { c.conceptDump = v; }); }
    } as UIPart);

    staticContent.push({ type: 'row', style: { gap: '6px', marginBottom: '12px' }, content: [
        { type: 'button', text: 'Generate All From Concept Dump', iconId: 'zap', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,180,50,0.15)', color: '#ffb432', border: '1px solid rgba(255,180,50,0.3)' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
            const f0 = await loadCharacter(charId); if (!f0) return;
            if (!(f0.conceptDump || '').trim()) { api.v1.ui.toast('Add notes to Concept Dump first.', { type: 'warning' }); return; }
            api.v1.ui.toast('Generating all fields…', { id: 'ce-genall', autoClose: false, type: 'info' });
            const fields = await generateCharacterFields(f0.name, f0.conceptDump);
            // [v2.20.0 GENDIAG] A single transient error (e.g. AbortError) no longer fails
            // this outright — executeYoinkGeneration now retries once internally. If it
            // STILL comes back null, point at the diagnostics viewer instead of a bare
            // "Failed." with no next step.
            if (!fields) { api.v1.ui.toast('Failed \u2014 tap \ud83e\ude7a Diagnostics for details.', { id: 'ce-genall', type: 'error', autoClose: 4000 }); return; }
            await mut(function(c) {
                if (fields.species) c.species = fields.species;
                if (fields.age) c.age = fields.age;
                if (fields.gender) c.gender = fields.gender;
                if (fields.occupationRole) c.occupationRole = fields.occupationRole;
                if (fields.briefDescription) c.briefDescription = fields.briefDescription;
                if (fields.physicalDescription) c.physicalDescription = fields.physicalDescription;
                if (fields.personalityCore) c.personalityCore = fields.personalityCore;
                if (fields.voiceAndMannerisms) c.voiceAndMannerisms = fields.voiceAndMannerisms;
                if (fields.background) c.background = fields.background;
                if (fields.coreValues && fields.coreValues.length) c.coreValues = fields.coreValues;
            });
            api.v1.ui.toast('Generated.', { id: 'ce-genall', type: 'success', autoClose: 1500 });
            await refreshCharEditModal();
        } },
        { type: 'button', text: '\ud83e\ude7a', style: { margin: 0, flex: '0 0 auto', minWidth: '36px' }, callback: async function() { await openGenDiagModal(); } }
    ] } as UIPart);

    staticContent.push({ type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px', marginBottom: '6px' }, content: [
        { type: 'textInput', placeholder: 'Age', initialValue: char.age || '', style: { flex: '1 1 0' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { await mut(function(c){ c.age = v; }); await updateBiographicalPreviews(); } },
        { type: 'textInput', placeholder: 'Gender', initialValue: char.gender || '', style: { flex: '1 1 0' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { await mut(function(c){ c.gender = v; }); await updateBiographicalPreviews(); } },
        (cfg.species && cfg.species.length > 0) ? { type: 'button', text: char.species?.trim() || 'Species', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', textAlign: 'left', backgroundColor: char.species?.trim() ? 'rgba(136,204,255,0.1)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12)', color: char.species?.trim() ? '#88ccff' : '#666' }, callback: async function() {
            const pm = await openEngineModal({ title: 'Set Species', size: 'small', content: [
                { type: 'button', text: '✕ Clear', style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '8px', color: '#ff6b6b' }, callback: async function() { await mut(function(c) { c.species = ''; }); pm.close(); await refreshCharEditModal(); } },
                ...(cfg.species || []).map(function(sp) {
                    const isCur = char.species === sp.name;
                    return { type: 'button', text: sp.name, style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '4px', textAlign: 'left', backgroundColor: isCur ? 'rgba(136,204,255,0.15)' : undefined, color: isCur ? '#88ccff' : undefined }, callback: async function() { await mut(function(c) { c.species = sp.name; }); pm.close(); await refreshCharEditModal(); } } as UIPart;
                })
            ]});
        } } as UIPart : { type: 'textInput', placeholder: 'Species', initialValue: char.species || '', style: { flex: '1 1 0' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { await mut(function(c) { c.species = v; }); await updateBiographicalPreviews(); } } as UIPart,
        { type: 'textInput', placeholder: 'Role / occupation', initialValue: char.occupationRole || '', style: { flex: '2 1 0' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { await mut(function(c){ c.occupationRole = v; }); await updateBiographicalPreviews(); } }
    ] } as UIPart);
    staticContent.push({ type: 'multilineTextInput', label: 'Brief Description', placeholder: 'One vivid sentence the generators must not contradict. Authoring anchor — not injected into context.', initialValue: char.briefDescription || '', style: { minHeight: '40px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { await mut(function(c){ c.briefDescription = v; }); await updateBiographicalPreviews(); } } as UIPart);
    staticContent.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Authoring anchor for field/intro generation. Not injected into context — static identity rides the lorebook entry.', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.45', marginTop: '4px', marginBottom: '8px' } } as UIPart);
