    staticContent.push({ type: 'box', style: { backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)', border: '1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', padding: '8px', borderRadius: '6px', marginBottom: '12px' }, content: [
        { type: 'text', text: 'Live Context Injection Preview', style: { fontSize: '10px', fontWeight: 'bold', color: 'var(--ae-accent)', marginBottom: '4px', textTransform: 'uppercase' } },
        { id: 'ae-an-preview', type: 'text', text: 'Lorebook: ' + initialPreviews.anLine, style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.9', marginBottom: '2px', fontFamily: 'monospace' } }
    ] } as UIPart);

    for (const fd of STATIC_FIELD_DEFS) {
        const label = cfg.fieldLabels[fd.key] || fd.label;
        const capturedFd = fd;
        const capBudget = cfg.fieldBudgets[fd.key] || fd.defaultBudget;
        const capInst = cfg.fieldInstructions[fd.key] || fd.defaultInstructions;
        const rawVal = (char as any)[capturedFd.key];
        const strVal = (rawVal !== null && rawVal !== undefined && !Array.isArray(rawVal)) ? String(rawVal) : '';
        staticContent.push(...buildGeneratableFieldBlock(char, cfg, charId, label, strVal, capInst, capBudget, async function(v: string) {
            await mut(function(c) { (c as any)[capturedFd.key] = v; });
        }));
    }

    const cvInitial = (char.coreValues || []).filter(Boolean).join('; ');
    staticContent.push(...buildGeneratableFieldBlock(char, cfg, charId, 'Core Values', cvInitial,
        'List 3–5 deeply held values that drive this character\'s decisions. Return them as a semicolon-separated list only.', 80,
        async function(v: string) { await mut(function(c) { c.coreValues = v.split(';').map(function(s) { return s.trim(); }).filter(Boolean); }); }
    ));

    for (const cf of cfg.customStaticFields.filter(Boolean)) {
        const capturedCf = cf;
        staticContent.push(...buildGeneratableFieldBlock(char, cfg, charId, capturedCf.label, char.customFieldValues[capturedCf.id] || '',
            capturedCf.instructions, cfg.fieldBudgets[capturedCf.id] || 150,
            async function(v: string) { await mut(function(c) { c.customFieldValues[capturedCf.id] = v; }); }
        ));
    }

    const tmpNickKey = `ce_tmp_nick_${char.id}`;
    const nickItems: UIPart[] = (char.nicknames || []).filter(Boolean).map(function(nick, i) { return { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '4px', marginBottom: '2px' }, content: [{ type: 'text', text: nick, style: { flex: '1 1 0', fontSize: '12px' } }, { type: 'button', iconId: 'x', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '10px' }, callback: async function() { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (!f) return; f.nicknames.splice(i, 1); await saveCharacter(f); await refreshCharEditModal(); } }] } as UIPart; });

    staticContent.push({ type: 'box', style: { borderTop: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', marginTop: '12px', paddingTop: '12px' }, content: (function() {
        const lbContent: UIPart[] = [];
        if (char.lorebookEntryId) {
            lbContent.push(
                { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px', marginBottom: '6px' }, content: [{ type: 'text', text: '✓ Lorebook entry linked', style: { fontSize: '12px', color: '#7ec8a0', flex: '1 1 0' } }] },
                { type: 'text', text: `Keys: ${getLorebookKeys(char).join(', ')}`, style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.55', marginBottom: '8px' } },
                { type: 'row', style: { gap: '6px' }, content: [
                    { type: 'button', text: 'Sync Static Core', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(126,200,160,0.1)', border: '1px solid rgba(126,200,160,0.3)' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() { await syncLorebookEntry(char.id); } },
                    { type: 'button', text: 'Unlink', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: async function() { const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (!f) return; f.lorebookEntryId = undefined; await saveCharacter(f); await refreshCharEditModal(); } }
                ] }
            );
        } else {
            lbContent.push(
                { type: 'text', text: "No lorebook entry. Creating one lets NAI natively inject this character's static profile when their name appears.", style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.6', marginBottom: '8px' } },
                { type: 'button', text: '+ Create & Link Lorebook Entry', style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '8px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(136,204,255,0.1)', border: '1px solid rgba(136,204,255,0.3)' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() { if (typeof createLinkedLorebookEntry === 'function') { await createLinkedLorebookEntry(char.id); await refreshCharEditModal(); } } }
            );
        }
        lbContent.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Nicknames / Aliases (added as lorebook keys):', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.6', marginTop: '12px', marginBottom: '4px' } });
        nickItems.forEach(function(item) { lbContent.push(item); });
        lbContent.push({ type: 'row', style: { gap: '4px' }, content: [
            { type: 'textInput', placeholder: 'Add nickname or alias...', storageKey: `temp:${tmpNickKey}`, style: { flex: '1 1 0' } },
            { type: 'button', iconId: 'plus', style: { margin: 0 }, callback: async function() { const v = await api.v1.tempStorage.get(tmpNickKey) as string || ''; if (!v.trim()) return; const f = await loadCharacter(char.id); if (!f) return; if (!f.nicknames.includes(v.trim())) f.nicknames.push(v.trim()); await saveCharacter(f); await api.v1.tempStorage.remove(tmpNickKey); await refreshCharEditModal(); } }
        ] });
        return lbContent;
    })()} as UIPart);

    return staticContent;
}

// ── TAB: Dynamic Profile ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
// [v2.17.0] Unified "Enabled" toggle bar replaces four scattered checkboxes.
// Ephemeral was already independent (autoThoughtsEnabled). Midrange,
// Relationship, and Hooks used to all share ONE flag (autoUpdateEnabled) —
// see the runDynamicEngine dispatch fix in the same patch: Relationship now
// runs on primaryRelationship.enabled alone, and hooksEnabled (present on
// every CharacterRecord since day one, serialized to the bridge, but NEVER
// actually read by any dispatch condition) now genuinely gates Hooks. Hooks
// moved to the top per request; stale "(engine reference)" labeling on
// Mid-range corrected — LOREFOLD (v2.9.0) already folds it into the
// lorebook, it just never updated this copy to say so.
function buildCharDynamicTab(char: CharacterRecord, cfg: GlobalConfig, charId: string): UIPart[] {
    const parts: UIPart[] = [];
    const rel = char.primaryRelationship;

    parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Enabled', style: { fontSize: '11px', fontWeight: 'bold', opacity: '0.6', marginBottom: '4px', textTransform: 'uppercase' } });
    parts.push({ type: 'row', style: { gap: '6px', marginBottom: '6px', flexWrap: 'wrap' }, content: [
        _ceToggleBtn('Ephemeral', !!char.autoThoughtsEnabled, async function() { const f = await loadCharacter(charId); if (!f) return; f.autoThoughtsEnabled = !f.autoThoughtsEnabled; await saveCharacter(f); await refreshCharEditModal(); }),
        _ceToggleBtn('Midrange', !!char.autoUpdateEnabled, async function() { const f = await loadCharacter(charId); if (!f) return; f.autoUpdateEnabled = !f.autoUpdateEnabled; await saveCharacter(f); await refreshCharEditModal(); }),
        _ceToggleBtn('Relationship', !!(rel && rel.enabled), async function() { const f = await loadCharacter(charId); if (!f || !f.primaryRelationship) return; f.primaryRelationship.enabled = !f.primaryRelationship.enabled; await saveCharacter(f); await refreshCharEditModal(); }),
        _ceToggleBtn('Hooks', !!char.hooksEnabled, async function() { const f = await loadCharacter(charId); if (!f) return; f.hooksEnabled = !f.hooksEnabled; await saveCharacter(f); await refreshCharEditModal(); })
    ] });
    parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Each controls whether that field keeps updating in the background. Ephemeral injects into the Author\u2019s Note; Midrange, Relationship, and high-pressure Hooks fold into this character\u2019s lorebook entry. Turning one off freezes its current content in place rather than clearing it.', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.5', lineHeight: '1.4', marginBottom: '10px' } });

    parts.push(sectionHeader('Hooks'));
    parts.push(...buildHooksSection(char, cfg));

    parts.push(sectionHeader('Ephemeral Thoughts (injects into the Author\u2019s Note)'));
    parts.push(...buildEphemeralRows(char, cfg));

    parts.push(sectionHeader('Mid-range State (folds into this character\u2019s lorebook entry)'));
    parts.push(...buildMidRangeRows(char, cfg));

    parts.push(sectionHeader('Primary Relationship'));
    parts.push(...buildRelationshipSection(char, cfg));

    parts.push(sectionHeader('Texting Persona (Character Chat)'));
    parts.push(...buildChatPersonaSection(char, cfg, charId));

    return parts;
}

// ── [v2.24.0 CHARCHAT-PERSONA] Texting persona editor ───────────────────
// Three enum rows and a notes box. Deliberately has NO generate button, unlike every
// other field on this tab — per user, this compiles into the next-message instruction,
// so it needs to stay one short line. A zap button here would produce a paragraph that
// is worse at the job and costs tokens on every single turn to be worse at it.
// Lives on Dynamic Profile rather than Static because it is a behaviour switch, not
// authored prose about who they are.
function _ccPersonaRow(char: CharacterRecord, charId: string, label: string, opts: CharChatOpt[], current: string, apply: (c: CharacterRecord, v: string) => void): UIPart {
    const cur = _charchatOpt(opts, current || 'auto');
    return { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '8px', marginBottom: '6px' }, content: [
        { type: 'text', text: label, style: { width: '72px', fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.6' } },
        { type: 'button', text: cur.label, style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, textAlign: 'left', fontSize: '12px' }, callback: async function() {
            const pk = await openEngineModal({ title: label, size: 'small', content: opts.map(function(o) {
                return { type: 'button', text: o.label, style: { width: '100%', margin: '2px 0', textAlign: 'left', fontSize: '12px', backgroundColor: o.id === cur.id ? 'rgba(126,200,160,0.2)' : undefined }, callback: async function() {
                    const f = await loadCharacter(charId); if (f) { if (!f.chatPersona) f.chatPersona = {}; apply(f, o.id); await saveCharacter(f); }
                    try { if (pk && !pk.isClosed()) pk.close(); } catch (ePk) {}
                    await refreshCharEditModal();
                } } as UIPart;
            }) });
        } }
    ] } as UIPart;
}

function buildChatPersonaSection(char: CharacterRecord, cfg: GlobalConfig, charId: string): UIPart[] {
    const cp = char.chatPersona || {};
    const on = cp.enabled !== false && !!char.chatPersona;
    const parts: UIPart[] = [];

    parts.push({ type: 'row', style: { gap: '6px', marginBottom: '6px' }, content: [
        _ceToggleBtn(on ? 'Persona On' : 'Persona Off', on, async function() {
            const f = await loadCharacter(charId); if (!f) return;
            if (!f.chatPersona) f.chatPersona = { enabled: true, style: 'auto', verbosity: 'auto', emoji: 'auto' };
            else f.chatPersona.enabled = (f.chatPersona.enabled === false);
            await saveCharacter(f); await refreshCharEditModal();
        })
    ] } as UIPart);
    parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'How this character texts, compiled into one line on the chat\u2019s next-message instruction. Off (or every axis on Auto) means the model derives a style from their profile on its own \u2014 which is usually the right answer, so only override what you actively disagree with. Verbosity also sets the reply token cap.', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.5', lineHeight: '1.4', marginBottom: '10px' } } as UIPart);

    if (!on) return parts;

    parts.push(_ccPersonaRow(char, charId, 'Style',     CHARCHAT_STYLE_OPTS,     cp.style || 'auto',     function(c, v) { if (c.chatPersona) c.chatPersona.style = v; }));
    parts.push(_ccPersonaRow(char, charId, 'Length',    CHARCHAT_VERBOSITY_OPTS, cp.verbosity || 'auto', function(c, v) { if (c.chatPersona) c.chatPersona.verbosity = v; }));
    parts.push(_ccPersonaRow(char, charId, 'Emoji',     CHARCHAT_EMOJI_OPTS,     cp.emoji || 'auto',     function(c, v) { if (c.chatPersona) c.chatPersona.emoji = v; }));
    parts.push({ type: 'multilineTextInput', label: 'Extra notes (optional)', placeholder: 'never uses full stops; always signs off with a nickname\u2026', initialValue: cp.notes || '', style: { minHeight: '44px', marginTop: '6px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) {
        const f = await loadCharacter(charId); if (!f) return; if (!f.chatPersona) f.chatPersona = {}; f.chatPersona.notes = v; await saveCharacter(f);
    } } as UIPart);

    // Live preview of the exact string that reaches the model — the same function the
    // context builder calls, not a re-description of it.
    const preview = buildCharChatPersonaClause(char);
    parts.push({ type: 'text', text: preview ? ('Sent as: ' + preview) : 'Sent as: (nothing \u2014 every axis is on Auto, so the global rubric applies)', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.45', marginTop: '8px', fontStyle: 'italic', whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' } } as UIPart);
    parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Reply cap: ' + charChatMaxTokensFor(char, cfg) + ' tokens.', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.45', marginTop: '2px' } } as UIPart);
    return parts;
}

// ── TAB: Visuals ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// [v2.17.0] Dropped the "Tag Subscriptions" block that used to sit here —
// confirmed dead: it reads cfg.actionTemplates, a field CE-STRIP v2.0.x
// removed from GlobalConfig entirely (same "dead-but-non-crashing" bug
// class already documented and fixed once for the Item Template editor;
// this character-modal copy was missed in that earlier pass). _ctsAllTags
// was permanently empty, so the section never rendered for any character —
// verified zero behavior change from removing it.
function buildCharVisualsTab(char: CharacterRecord, cfg: GlobalConfig, charId: string, mut: (fn: (c: CharacterRecord) => void) => Promise<void>): UIPart[] {
    return [
        { type: 'text', text: 'Used for all character image generations. Tags like: hair color, eye color, clothing.', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.5', marginBottom: '6px' } },
        { type: 'multilineTextInput', label: 'Base Character Visuals', placeholder: '1girl, brown hair, blue eyes, red dress...', initialValue: char.visuals || '', style: { minHeight: '55px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { await mut(function(c) { c.visuals = v; }); } } as UIPart,
        { type: 'text', text: 'Tags to suppress in all this character\'s images.', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.5', marginBottom: '6px', marginTop: '10px' } },
        { type: 'multilineTextInput', label: 'Character Unwanted Content', placeholder: 'lowres, bad anatomy, extra limbs...', initialValue: char.uc || '', style: { minHeight: '40px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { await mut(function(c) { c.uc = v; }); } } as UIPart
    ];
}

async function buildCharEditContent(charId: string): Promise<UIPart[]> {
    const char = await loadCharacter(charId); if (!char) return [{ type: 'text', text: 'Character not found.' }];

    // --- DATA SAFETY PATCH (Fixes "filter of undefined" on new characters) ---
    char.hooks = char.hooks || [];
    char.ephemeralHistory = char.ephemeralHistory || [];
    char.nicknames = char.nicknames || [];
    char.coreValues = char.coreValues || [];
    if (!char.primaryRelationship) {
        char.primaryRelationship = { targetName: '', enabled: false, archetype: '', howItStarted: '', threads: [], currentStatus: '', trajectory: '', summary: '', milestones: [] };
    }
    char.primaryRelationship.threads = char.primaryRelationship.threads || [];
    char.primaryRelationship.milestones = char.primaryRelationship.milestones || [];
    if (!char.customFieldValues) char.customFieldValues = {};
    if (!char.sheetValues) char.sheetValues = {};
    // ------------------------------------------------------------------------

    const cfg = await loadConfig();
    async function mut(fn: (c: CharacterRecord) => void): Promise<void> { const f = await loadCharacter(charId); if (!f) return; fn(f); await saveCharacter(f); await refreshSidebar(); }

    const activeTab = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(`ce_tab_${charId}`, 'overview') as string;
    const parts: UIPart[] = [];
    parts.push(charEditTabBar(charId, activeTab));

    if (activeTab === 'static') {
        parts.push(...(await buildCharStaticTab(char, cfg, charId, mut)));
    } else if (activeTab === 'dynamic') {
        parts.push(...buildCharDynamicTab(char, cfg, charId));
    } else if (activeTab === 'visuals') {
        parts.push(...buildCharVisualsTab(char, cfg, charId, mut));
    } else {
        parts.push(...(await buildCharOverviewTab(char, cfg, charId, mut)));
    }

    // Padding for smooth scrolling at the bottom
    parts.push({ type: 'text', text: ' ', style: { marginBottom: '48px' } });
    return parts;
}

// [REMOVED] Legacy character sheet UI block is retired to prioritize narrative-driven profiles.

// ============================================================================
// [CE-STRIP v2.6.0 CTX-CUT] TEMPLATE BUILDER UI SYSTEM — PHYSICALLY DELETED.
// MACRO_DICTIONARIES, DUMMY_DATA, _resPreview, copyMacroToClipboard,
// buildMacroButtons, buildTemplateEditor, getGlobalTemplateUIParts all removed
// (verified zero remaining callers of each before removal — the Drama tab's
// "⚙️ Context Templates" section, their only consumer, is gone too). The two
// surviving injections (character thoughts, critical hooks) still run through
// parseMacroTemplate() against cfg.contextTemplates.{npc,criticalHook} — just
// with hardcoded DEFAULT_TEMPLATES values and no UI exposing them for editing.
// ============================================================================

// ============================================================================
// SECTION 21 — SIDEBAR: DRAMA TAB
// buildDramaTabContent: NPC hooks, narrative arcs, web links.
// ============================================================================

async function buildDramaTabContent(): Promise<UIPart[]> {
    const allChars = await loadAllCharacters();
    let parts: UIPart[] = [];

    // [v0.9.17] Resolve the player's display name so __player__ targets show a real name.
    const _dramaCfg = await loadConfig();
    const _dramaProtag = allChars.find(function(c) { return (c as any).isProtagonist; });
    const _playerDisplayName = _dramaProtag ? _dramaProtag.name : ((_dramaCfg as any).protagonistName || 'Player');

    // --- 1. THE HOOK QUEUE (COLLAPSIBLE) ---
    let hookParts: UIPart[] = [
        { type: 'text', text: 'Hooks are active dramatic tensions involving characters. Pressure 85+ (Critical) injects directly into the Author\u2019s Note alongside that character\u2019s thoughts. Below 85%, hooks are tracked here but not currently injected into context.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.6', marginBottom: '12px', lineHeight: '1.4' } }
    ];
    let allHooks: { charId: string, charName: string, hook: UnresolvedHook }[] = [];
    
    for (const c of allChars) {
        if (!c.active || !c.hooks) continue;
        for (const h of c.hooks) {
            // Under the new rules, this will realistically only find 1 active hook per character
            if (!h.resolved) allHooks.push({ charId: c.id, charName: c.name, hook: h });
        }
    }

    allHooks.sort(function(a, b) { return b.hook.pressureLevel - a.hook.pressureLevel; });

    if (allHooks.length === 0) {
        hookParts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'No active hooks. The tea is cold.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.5', fontStyle: 'italic', marginBottom: '8px', textAlign: 'center' } });
    } else {
        for (const item of allHooks) {
            const h = item.hook;
            
            // Color Logic & Glow
            let pColor = '#f1c40f'; // Yellow (< 60)
            let shadow = 'none';
            if (h.pressureLevel >= 85) {
                pColor = '#ff6b6b'; // Red (Critical)
                shadow = '0 0 10px rgba(255, 107, 107, 0.3)';
            } else if (h.pressureLevel >= 60) {
                pColor = '#ffb432'; // Orange (Urgent)
                shadow = '0 0 6px rgba(255, 180, 50, 0.15)';
            }

            hookParts.push({ type: 'box', style: { backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)', padding: '8px', marginBottom: '8px', borderLeft: `3px solid ${pColor}`, borderRadius: '4px', boxShadow: shadow }, content: [
                
                // ROW 1: Title, %, Edit, Delete
                { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { marginBottom: '4px', gap: '4px' }, content: [
                    { type: 'text', text: `${item.charName} ➝ ${h.targetName === '__player__' ? _playerDisplayName : (h.targetName || 'Unknown')}`, style: { fontWeight: 'bold', fontSize: '13px', flex: '1 1 0', color: '#e8a87c', whiteSpace: 'nowrap', overflow: 'hidden', textOverflow: 'ellipsis' } },
                    { type: 'text', text: `${h.pressureLevel}%`, style: { fontSize: '11px', color: pColor, fontWeight: 'bold', backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)', padding: '2px 6px', borderRadius: '4px' } },
                    { type: 'button', iconId: 'edit-2', style: { margin: 0, padding: '2px 4px', backgroundColor: 'transparent' }, callback: async function() { await openCharEditModal(item.charId); } },
                    { type: 'button', iconId: 'trash-2', style: { margin: 0, padding: '2px 4px', backgroundColor: 'transparent', color: '#ff6b6b' }, callback: async function() {
                        const f = await loadCharacter(item.charId);
                        if (f && f.hooks) {
                            f.hooks = f.hooks.filter(function(x) { return x.id !== h.id; });
                            await saveCharacter(f);
                            await refreshSidebar(); 
                        }
                    }}
                ]},
                
                // ROW 2: Description
                { type: 'text', text: h.description, style: { fontSize: '12px', opacity: '0.85', lineHeight: '1.4', marginBottom: '8px' } },
                
                // ROW 3: Slider & Manual Force-Update Button
                { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '8px' }, content: [
                    { type: 'sliderInput', min: 0, max: 100, step: 5, initialValue: h.pressureLevel, style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0 }, onChange: async function(v: number) {
                        const f = await loadCharacter(item.charId);
                        if (f && f.hooks) {
                            const targetHook = f.hooks.find(function(x) { return x.id === h.id; });
                            if (targetHook) {
                                targetHook.pressureLevel = v;
                                await saveCharacter(f);
                                // Note: Slider saves backend state silently to avoid UI crash. 
                                // User clicks 🔄 to actually trigger the color/text refresh.
                            }
                        }
                    }},
                    { type: 'button', text: '🔄 Update', style: { margin: 0, padding: '4px 8px', fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                        const f = await loadCharacter(item.charId);
                        if (!f) return;
                        const cfg = await loadConfig();
                        const tc = await api.v1.storyStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_GEN_COUNT, 0) as number;
                        
                        api.v1.ui.toast(`Scanning scene for ${f.name}...`, { id: 'hk-upd', autoClose: false, type: 'info' });
                        const ok = await generateHookUpdates(f, cfg, tc); // Calls the background engine manually
                        api.v1.ui.toast(ok ? 'Tension Updated.' : 'No changes detected.', { id: 'hk-upd', type: ok ? 'success' : 'warning', autoClose: 2000 });
                        
                        // Redraws the sidebar to apply the new colors/text
                        await refreshSidebar();
                    }}
                ]}
            ]});
        }
    }

    parts.push({ type: 'collapsibleSection', title: `🔥 The Hook Queue (${allHooks.length})`, initialCollapsed: false, storageKey: 'temp:drama_hooks', content: hookParts });

// --- 2. THE NPC WEB (COLLAPSIBLE) ---
    const npcWeb = await loadNpcWeb();
    let webParts: UIPart[] = [
        { type: 'text', text: 'Bilateral dynamics between characters. When both characters are present in the scene, priority 70+ injects as an Imperative (top of context), while lower priorities inject as Background Drama.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.6', marginBottom: '12px', lineHeight: '1.4' } }
    ];

    // Helper to fetch character names for the UI buttons
    function getCharName(id: string) {
        const c = allChars.find(function(x) { return x.id === id; });
        return c ? c.name : 'Select...';
    }

    for (let i = 0; i < npcWeb.length; i++) {
        const link = npcWeb[i];
        
        // NEW: Check if both characters are currently in the scene!
        const cA = allChars.find(function(x) { return x.id === link.charA_id; });
        const cB = allChars.find(function(x) { return x.id === link.charB_id; });
        const bothPresent = !!(cA && cA.scenePresent && cB && cB.scenePresent);
        
        // Green if active in scene, Blue if background
        const webBorderColor = bothPresent ? '#7ec8a0' : '#88ccff'; 
        const webShadow = bothPresent ? '0 0 8px rgba(126,200,160,0.2)' : 'none';

        // Modal helper to select a character
        async function selectChar(isCharA: boolean) {
            const pm = await openEngineModal({
                title: 'Select Character',
                size: 'small',
                content: allChars.map(function(c) {
                    return { type: 'button', text: c.name, style: { margin: '2px', width: '100%', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.02)' }, callback: async function() {
                        const web = await loadNpcWeb();
                        if (isCharA) web[i].charA_id = c.id;
                        else web[i].charB_id = c.id;
                        await saveNpcWeb(web);
                        pm.close();
                        await refreshSidebar();
                    } } as UIPart;
                })
            });
        }

        webParts.push({ type: 'box', style: { backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)', padding: '8px', marginBottom: '8px', borderLeft: `3px solid ${webBorderColor}`, boxShadow: webShadow, borderRadius: '4px' }, content: [
            
            // ROW 1: Character A ⇄ Character B + Delete
            { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { marginBottom: '6px', gap: '4px' }, content: [
                { type: 'button', text: getCharName(link.charA_id), style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', padding: '4px', color: (cA && cA.scenePresent) ? '#7ec8a0' : undefined }, callback: async function() { await selectChar(true); } },
                { type: 'text', text: '⇄', style: { fontSize: '14px', opacity: '0.6', margin: '0 2px' } },
                { type: 'button', text: getCharName(link.charB_id), style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', padding: '4px', color: (cB && cB.scenePresent) ? '#7ec8a0' : undefined }, callback: async function() { await selectChar(false); } },
                { type: 'button', iconId: 'trash-2', style: { margin: 0, padding: '2px 4px', backgroundColor: 'transparent', color: '#ff6b6b' }, callback: async function() {
                    const web = await loadNpcWeb();
                    web.splice(i, 1);
                    await saveNpcWeb(web);
                    await refreshSidebar();
                }}
            ]},
            
            // ROW 2: The Dynamic Input
            { type: 'textInput', placeholder: 'Describe their dynamic (e.g., Bitter rivals...)', initialValue: link.dynamic, style: { fontSize: '12px', marginBottom: '6px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) {
                const web = await loadNpcWeb();
                web[i].dynamic = v;
                await saveNpcWeb(web);
            }},
            
            // ROW 3: The Priority Slider
            { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px' }, content: [
                { type: 'text', text: 'Priority', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.6' } },
                { type: 'sliderInput', min: 0, max: 100, step: 10, initialValue: link.priority, showValue: false, style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0 }, onChange: async function(v: number) {
                    const web = await loadNpcWeb();
                    web[i].priority = v;
                    await saveNpcWeb(web);
                }},
                { type: 'text', text: `${link.priority}`, style: { fontSize: '10px', fontWeight: 'bold', width: '24px', textAlign: 'right', color: webBorderColor } }
            ]}
        ]});
    }

    // Add New Link Button
    webParts.push({ type: 'button', text: '+ Add Web Link', iconId: 'plus', style: { width: '100%', fontSize: '11px', marginTop: '4px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(136,204,255,0.1)' }, callback: async function() {
        const web = await loadNpcWeb();
        web.push({ id: api.v1.uuid(), charA_id: '', charB_id: '', dynamic: '', priority: 30 });
        await saveNpcWeb(web);
        await refreshSidebar();
    }});

    parts.push({ type: 'collapsibleSection', title: `🕸️ The NPC Web (${npcWeb.length})`, initialCollapsed: true, storageKey: 'temp:drama_npcweb', content: webParts });
    // --- 3. NARRATIVE THREADS (QUEST TREE) ---
    const entIdx = await loadEntityIndex();
    const narratives = entIdx.filter(function(n) { return n.type === 'narrative'; });
    let storyParts: UIPart[] = [
        { type: 'text', text: 'Active story threads. Their descriptions inject into the Scene Drama block (bottom of context) to remind the AI of ongoing plots when they are active.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.6', marginBottom: '12px', lineHeight: '1.4' } }
    ];

    // Recursive Tree Builder
    async function renderNarrativeTree(narrativeParentId: string | null, depth: number) {
        const children = narratives.filter(function(n) { return (n.narrativeParentId || null) === narrativeParentId; });
        for (const child of children) {
            const hasChildren = narratives.some(function(n) { return n.narrativeParentId === child.id; });
            
            // Emoji logic based on storyState
            let stateEmoji = '🔒';
            let nameColor = '#888';
            if (child.storyState === 'active') { stateEmoji = '🔥'; nameColor = '#ffb432'; }
            else if (child.storyState === 'completed') { stateEmoji = '✅'; nameColor = '#7ec8a0'; }

            storyParts.push({
                type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { paddingLeft: `${depth * 14}px`, marginBottom: '4px' }, content: [
                    { type: 'text', text: stateEmoji, style: { marginRight: '6px', fontSize: '12px' } },
                    { type: 'text', text: child.name, style: { flex: '1 1 0', fontSize: '12px', color: nameColor, fontWeight: depth === 0 ? 'bold' : 'normal' } },
                    { type: 'button', iconId: 'edit', style: { margin: 0, padding: '2px', backgroundColor: 'transparent' }, callback: async function() { await openEntityEditModal(child.id); } }
                ]
            });

            if (hasChildren) await renderNarrativeTree(child.id, depth + 1);
        }
    }

    await renderNarrativeTree(null, 0);

    if (narratives.length === 0) {
        storyParts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'No narrative threads created yet.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.5', fontStyle: 'italic', textAlign: 'center', marginBottom: '8px' } });
    }

    storyParts.push({ type: 'button', text: '+ New Narrative Thread', iconId: 'plus', style: { marginTop: '8px', fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(232, 168, 124, 0.1)' }, callback: async function() {
        const ent = makeDefaultEntity('New Thread');
        ent.type = 'narrative';
        ent.storyState = 'locked';
        await saveEntity(ent);
        await openEntityEditModal(ent.id);
        await refreshSidebar();
    }});

    parts.push({ type: 'collapsibleSection', title: `📜 Narrative Threads (${narratives.length})`, initialCollapsed: false, storageKey: 'temp:drama_narratives', content: storyParts });
    
    // [CE-STRIP v2.6.0 CTX-CUT] "⚙️ Context Templates" section removed — user: "we
    // shouldn't have the Context Template in the drama tab anymore or the injections
    // tied to it." See CE-INDEX PASS 9 for the full cut (location/quest injection
    // gone too, template-editor UI stack physically deleted).

    // [v1.13.1 FACMGR-FIX] Holding Document authoring relocated to Factions Manager
    // (landing page) — it defines the shared Faction Resource schema that faction list
    // lives right next to now, instead of being split across two workspaces.
    parts.push({ type: 'box', style: { padding: '8px 10px', marginBottom: '8px', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', borderRadius: '6px' }, content: [
        { type: 'text', text: '\ud83c\udff0 The Holding Document has moved to the Factions Manager workspace (landing page).', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.7' } } as UIPart
    ] } as UIPart);

    return parts;
}

// ============================================================================
// SECTION 22 — SIDEBAR: WORLD / ENTITIES TAB
// [CHANGE] renderSceneHUD() -> queueSceneStateBroadcast() in travel callbacks.
// ============================================================================

async function buildEntitiesTab(): Promise<UIPart[]> {
    const parts: UIPart[] = [];
    
    // 1. Fetch the active search query for entities from temporary storage
    const searchQuery = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault('temp:ae_entity_search', '') as string;
    
    // Top Row: Create Entity Button
    parts.push({ 
        type: 'button', 
        text: 'Create Entity', iconId: 'plus', 
        style: { marginBottom: '8px' }, 
        callback: async function() { 
            const ent = makeDefaultEntity('New Entity');
            await saveEntity(ent);
            await openEntityEditModal(ent.id);
            await refreshSidebar();
        } 
    });

    // 2. Add the Search Bar component
    parts.push({
        type: 'textInput', 
        placeholder: '🔍 Search entities...', 
        initialValue: searchQuery,
        style: { marginBottom: '12px' }, 
        onChange: async function(v: string) {
            // Save the query and re-render the UI
            await api.v1.tempStorage.set('temp:ae_entity_search', v);
            await refreshSidebar();
        }
    });

    // Load the master entity index
    const entIdx = await loadEntityIndex();
    
    // 3. Filter the index based on the search query
    let displayEntIdx = entIdx;
    if (searchQuery) {
        const sq = searchQuery.toLowerCase();
        displayEntIdx = displayEntIdx.filter(m => (m.name || '').toLowerCase().includes(sq));
    }
    
    // Empty state message (Optional but recommended)
    if (displayEntIdx.length === 0) {
        parts.push({ 
            type: 'text', 
            text: searchQuery ? 'No entities match your search.' : 'No entities yet.', 
            style: { fontSize: '12px', opacity: '0.6', marginBottom: '8px' } 
        });
    }
    
    // Helper to swap order in the index array
    async function moveEntity(id: string, direction: -1 | 1) {
        const currentIndex = await loadEntityIndex();
        const childMeta = currentIndex.find(function(m) { return m.id === id; });
        if (!childMeta) return;

        // Get siblings in their current exact order
        const siblings = currentIndex.filter(function(m) { return m.parentId === childMeta.parentId; });
        const sibIdx = siblings.findIndex(function(m) { return m.id === id; });

        if (direction === -1 && sibIdx > 0) {
            // Move Up (Swap with previous sibling)
            const targetId = siblings[sibIdx - 1].id;
            const pos1 = currentIndex.findIndex(function(m) { return m.id === id; });
            const pos2 = currentIndex.findIndex(function(m) { return m.id === targetId; });
            const temp = currentIndex[pos1]; currentIndex[pos1] = currentIndex[pos2]; currentIndex[pos2] = temp;
            await saveEntityIndex(currentIndex);
            await refreshSidebar();
        } else if (direction === 1 && sibIdx < siblings.length - 1) {
            // Move Down (Swap with next sibling)
            const targetId = siblings[sibIdx + 1].id;
            const pos1 = currentIndex.findIndex(function(m) { return m.id === id; });
            const pos2 = currentIndex.findIndex(function(m) { return m.id === targetId; });
            const temp = currentIndex[pos1]; currentIndex[pos1] = currentIndex[pos2]; currentIndex[pos2] = temp;
            await saveEntityIndex(currentIndex);
            await refreshSidebar();
        }
    }

    if (searchQuery) {
        // Render a flat list when searching, since tree hierarchy parents might not match the search
        for (const child of displayEntIdx) {
            const icon = (child as any).icon || ENTITY_TYPE_ICONS[child.type] || '●';
            parts.push({
                type: 'row', alignment: 'center',
                style: { marginBottom: '4px', borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05)', paddingBottom: '4px' },
                content: [
                    { type: 'text', text: icon, style: { marginRight: '6px', fontSize: '14px' } },
                    { type: 'text', text: child.name, style: { flex: '1 1 0', fontSize: '12px', opacity: child.type === 'item' ? '0.7' : '1' } },
                    { type: 'button', iconId: 'edit', style: { margin: 0, padding: '4px', backgroundColor: 'transparent' }, callback: async function() { await openEntityEditModal(child.id); } }
                ]
            });
        }
    } else {
        // Async Recursive Tree Builder with Collapse Memory
        async function renderEntityTree(parentId: string | null, depth: number) {
            const children = entIdx.filter(function(m) { return m.parentId === parentId; });
            
            for (let i = 0; i < children.length; i++) {
                const child = children[i];
                const hasChildren = entIdx.some(function(m) { return m.parentId === child.id; });
                const isCollapsed = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(`ce_col_${child.id}`, false);

                const icon = (child as any).icon || ENTITY_TYPE_ICONS[child.type] || '●';
                
                const rowContent: UIPart[] = [];
                
                // 1. The Collapse Toggle Chevron
                if (hasChildren) {
                    rowContent.push({
                        type: 'button', iconId: isCollapsed ? 'chevron-right' : 'chevron-down',
                        style: { margin: '0 4px 0 0', padding: '2px', backgroundColor: 'transparent' },
                        callback: async function() {
                            await api.v1.tempStorage.set(`ce_col_${child.id}`, !isCollapsed);
                            await refreshSidebar();
                        }
                    });
                } else {
                    rowContent.push({ type: 'text', text: '', style: { minWidth: '24px', marginRight: '4px' } });
                }
                
                // 2. The Icon & Name
                rowContent.push({ type: 'text', text: icon, style: { marginRight: '6px', fontSize: '14px' } });
                rowContent.push({ type: 'text', text: child.name, style: { flex: '1 1 0', fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: depth === 0 ? 'bold' : 'normal', opacity: child.type === 'item' ? '0.7' : '1' } });
                
                // 3. Sorting Chevrons (Up / Down)
                const isFirst = i === 0;
                const isLast = i === children.length - 1;
                
                rowContent.push({
                    type: 'button', iconId: 'chevron-up', disabled: isFirst,
                    style: { margin: 0, padding: '2px', backgroundColor: 'transparent', opacity: isFirst ? '0.1' : '0.5' },
                    callback: async function() { await moveEntity(child.id, -1); }
                });
                
                rowContent.push({
                    type: 'button', iconId: 'chevron-down', disabled: isLast,
                    style: { margin: '0 4px 0 0', padding: '2px', backgroundColor: 'transparent', opacity: isLast ? '0.1' : '0.5' },
                    callback: async function() { await moveEntity(child.id, 1); }
                });

                // 4. The Edit Button
                rowContent.push({ type: 'button', iconId: 'edit', style: { margin: 0, padding: '4px', backgroundColor: 'transparent' }, callback: async function() { await openEntityEditModal(child.id); } });

                // Push the assembled row
                parts.push({
                    type: 'row', alignment: 'center',
                    style: { paddingLeft: `${depth * 14}px`, marginBottom: '4px', borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05)', paddingBottom: '4px' },
                    content: rowContent
                });
                
                // 5. Recurse!
                if (hasChildren && !isCollapsed) {
                    await renderEntityTree(child.id, depth + 1);
                }
            }
        }
        
        // Kick off the recursion starting at the Root level (null)
        await renderEntityTree(null, 0);
    }

    if (entIdx.length === 0) {
        parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'No nodes created yet.', style: { fontSize: '12px', opacity: '0.6' } });
    }

    // ── LOST & FOUND: entities with broken parent references ────────────
    let orphanEnts = entIdx.filter(function(m) {
        return m.parentId !== null && !entIdx.find(function(p) { return p.id === m.parentId; });
    });
    if (orphanEnts.length > 0) {
        let lostParts: UIPart[] = [
            { type: 'text', text: 'These entities have a parent that no longer exists. Move to Root or edit to reparent.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.6', marginBottom: '8px' } }
        ];
        for (let orphan of orphanEnts) {
            let captOrphanId = orphan.id;
            let oIcon = ENTITY_TYPE_ICONS[orphan.type] || '❓';
            lostParts.push({ type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px', marginBottom: '4px', padding: '6px 8px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,180,50,0.07)', borderRadius: '4px', border: '1px solid rgba(255,180,50,0.2)' }, content: [
                { type: 'text', text: oIcon, style: { fontSize: '13px', flexShrink: '0' } },
                { type: 'text', text: orphan.name, style: { flex: '1 1 0', fontSize: '12px', color: '#ffb432' } },
                { type: 'button', text: 'Root', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '10px', padding: '2px 8px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.06)' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                    let fe = await loadEntity(captOrphanId); if (!fe) return;
                    fe.parentId = null; await saveEntity(fe); await refreshSidebar();
                } },
                { type: 'button', iconId: 'edit', style: { margin: 0, padding: '4px', backgroundColor: 'transparent' }, callback: async function() { await openEntityEditModal(captOrphanId); } }
            ] });
        }
        parts.push({ type: 'collapsibleSection', title: '⚠️ Lost Entities (' + orphanEnts.length + ')', initialCollapsed: false, storageKey: 'temp:ce_lost_ents', content: lostParts });
    }

    return parts;
}

// ============================================================================
// ENTITY EDIT MODAL
// ============================================================================

async function openEntityEditModal(id: string): Promise<void> {
    const ent = await loadEntity(id);
    if (!ent) return;

    const allNodes = await loadEntityIndex();
    const cfg = await loadConfig(); 
    let parts: UIPart[] = [];

    // [CE-STRIP v2.1.5] skillOptions builder removed — only consumer (Entity skillBonuses editor) removed above.

    // --- ALWAYS VISIBLE (Top Level) ---
    parts.push({ type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px', marginBottom: '4px' }, content: [
        { type: 'textInput', label: 'Entity Name', initialValue: ent.name, style: { flex: '1 1 0' }, onChange: async function(val: string) { ent.name = val; await saveEntity(ent); await refreshSidebar(); } },
        { type: 'textInput', label: 'Icon', placeholder: '🌍', initialValue: ent.icon || '', style: { width: '52px', flexShrink: '0', textAlign: 'center' }, onChange: async function(val: string) { ent.icon = val.trim() || undefined; await saveEntity(ent); await refreshSidebar(); queueSceneStateBroadcast(); } },
        { type: 'button', text: '⧉ Copy', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', flexShrink: '0', backgroundColor: 'rgba(136,204,255,0.1)', border: '1px solid rgba(136,204,255,0.3)', color: '#88ccff' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
            await copyEntity(ent.id, false);
        } },
        { type: 'button', text: '⧉+ Deep', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', flexShrink: '0', backgroundColor: 'rgba(232,168,124,0.1)', border: '1px solid rgba(232,168,124,0.3)', color: '#e8a87c' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
            await copyEntity(ent.id, true);
        } }
    ] });

    const typeOpts = [
        { id: 'location', icon: '🌍', label: 'Location' },
        { id: 'item', icon: '🎒', label: 'Item' },
        { id: 'narrative', icon: '📜', label: 'Narrative' },
        { id: 'character', icon: '👤', label: 'Character' }
    ];
    
    parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Entity Type', style: { fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 'bold', marginBottom: '4px', marginTop: '8px' } });
    parts.push({ type: 'row', style: { gap: '4px', marginBottom: '12px' }, content: typeOpts.map(function(opt) { 
        const isActive = ent.type === opt.id; 
        return { 
            type: 'button', text: `${opt.icon} ${opt.label}`, 
            style: { 
                flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', 
                backgroundColor: isActive ? 'rgba(126,200,160,0.22)' : 'transparent', 
                border: isActive ? '1px solid rgba(126,200,160,0.55)' : '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', 
                fontWeight: isActive ? 'bold' : 'normal' 
            }, 
            callback: async function() { ent.type = opt.id as any; await saveEntity(ent); await openEntityEditModal(ent.id); await refreshSidebar(); } 
        } as UIPart; 
    }) });

    // --- NARRATIVE SPECIFIC CONTROLS ---
    if (ent.type === 'narrative') {
        parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Story State', style: { fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 'bold', marginBottom: '4px', marginTop: '8px', color: '#e8a87c' } });
        parts.push({ type: 'row', style: { gap: '4px', marginBottom: '8px' }, content: [
            { type: 'button', text: '🔒 Locked', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: ent.storyState === 'locked' ? 'rgba(136,136,136,0.2)' : 'transparent', border: ent.storyState === 'locked' ? '1px solid #888' : '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)' }, callback: async function() { ent.storyState = 'locked'; await saveEntity(ent); await openEntityEditModal(ent.id); await refreshSidebar(); } },
            { type: 'button', text: '🔥 Active', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: ent.storyState === 'active' ? 'rgba(255,180,50,0.2)' : 'transparent', border: ent.storyState === 'active' ? '1px solid #ffb432' : '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)' }, callback: async function() { ent.storyState = 'active'; await saveEntity(ent); await openEntityEditModal(ent.id); await refreshSidebar(); } },
            { type: 'button', text: '✅ Done', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: ent.storyState === 'completed' ? 'rgba(126,200,160,0.2)' : 'transparent', border: ent.storyState === 'completed' ? '1px solid #7ec8a0' : '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)' }, callback: async function() { ent.storyState = 'completed'; await saveEntity(ent); await openEntityEditModal(ent.id); await refreshSidebar(); } }
        ]});

        const narrativeNodes = allNodes.filter(function(n) { return n.type === 'narrative' && n.id !== ent.id; });
        const narrParentName = ent.narrativeParentId ? (narrativeNodes.find(function(n) { return n.id === ent.narrativeParentId; })?.name || 'Unknown') : 'None (Root Plot)';
        
        parts.push({ type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '8px', marginBottom: '12px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(232, 168, 124, 0.05)', padding: '8px', borderRadius: '4px' }, content: [
            { type: 'text', text: `Plot Parent: ${narrParentName}`, style: { fontSize: '11px', flex: '1 1 0', color: '#e8a87c', fontWeight: 'bold' } },
            { type: 'button', text: 'Set Parent', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: async function() {
                const pm = await openEngineModal({ id: 'ce-nparent-picker', title: 'Nest Under Plotline', size: 'medium', content: [
                    { type: 'button', text: '✕ None (Make Root Plot)', style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '8px' }, callback: async function() { ent.narrativeParentId = null; await saveEntity(ent); pm.close(); await openEntityEditModal(ent.id); await refreshSidebar(); } },
                    ...narrativeNodes.map(function(m) { return { type: 'button', text: `📜 ${m.name}`, style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '2px', textAlign: 'left' }, callback: async function() { ent.narrativeParentId = m.id; await saveEntity(ent); pm.close(); await openEntityEditModal(ent.id); await refreshSidebar(); } } as UIPart; })
                ]});
            }}
        ]});

        // --- QUEST TARGET ---
        const allEntForTarget = await loadEntityIndex();
        const qtMeta = ent.questTarget ? allEntForTarget.find(function(m) { return m.id === ent.questTarget; }) : null;
        const qtDisplay = qtMeta ? (ENTITY_TYPE_ICONS[qtMeta.type] || '●') + ' ' + qtMeta.name : 'None set';
        parts.push({ type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '8px', marginBottom: '8px', padding: '8px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(136,204,255,0.05)', borderRadius: '4px', border: '1px solid rgba(136,204,255,0.1)' }, content: [
            { type: 'text', text: '🎯 Quest Target:', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.7', flexShrink: '0' } },
            { type: 'text', text: qtDisplay, style: { flex: '1 1 0', fontSize: '12px', color: qtMeta ? '#88ccff' : '#888' } },
            ...(ent.questTarget ? [{ type: 'button', text: '✕', style: { margin: 0, padding: '2px 8px', fontSize: '11px', color: '#ff6b6b', backgroundColor: 'transparent' }, callback: async function() {
                const fe = await loadEntity(ent.id); if (!fe) return;
                fe.questTarget = ''; await saveEntity(fe); await openEntityEditModal(ent.id);
            } } as UIPart] : []),
            { type: 'button', text: 'Set', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(136,204,255,0.08)', color: '#88ccff' }, callback: async function() {
                await api.v1.tempStorage.set('temp:ce_qt_search', '');
                async function drawQtPicker(pm3: any) {
                    const term3 = ((await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault('temp:ce_qt_search', '')) as string).toLowerCase();
                    const pickable3 = allEntForTarget.filter(function(m) { return m.id !== ent.id && (!term3 || m.name.toLowerCase().includes(term3)); });
                    const content3: UIPart[] = [
                        { type: 'textInput', placeholder: '🔍 Search all entities...', initialValue: term3, onChange: async function(v: string) { await api.v1.tempStorage.set('temp:ce_qt_search', v); await drawQtPicker(pm3); } } as UIPart,
                        ...pickable3.map(function(m) { return { type: 'button', text: (ENTITY_TYPE_ICONS[m.type] || '●') + ' ' + m.name, style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '2px', textAlign: 'left' }, callback: async function() {
                            pm3.close();
                            const fe3 = await loadEntity(ent.id); if (!fe3) return;
                            fe3.questTarget = m.id; await saveEntity(fe3); await openEntityEditModal(ent.id);
                        } } as UIPart; })
                    ];
                    if (pm3 && !pm3.isClosed()) { await pm3.update({ content: content3 }); }
                    else { pm3 = await openEngineModal({ id: 'ce-qt-picker', title: 'Set Quest Target', size: 'medium', content: content3 }); }
                }
                let pm3: any = null;
                await drawQtPicker(pm3);
            } }
        ] });
    }

    // --- 1. CORE DESCRIPTION ---
    let coreParts: UIPart[] = [];
    const parentName = ent.parentId ? (allNodes.find(function(m){ return m.id === ent.parentId; })?.name || 'Unknown') : 'None (Root Level)';
    
    coreParts.push({ type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '8px', marginBottom: '12px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)', padding: '8px', borderRadius: '4px' }, content: [
        { type: 'text', text: 'Parent:', style: { fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 'bold' } },
        { type: 'button', text: '❓', style: { margin: 0, padding: '2px 8px', fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: 'transparent', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2)', opacity: '0.7' }, callback: async function() {
            await api.v1.ui.modal.open({ 
                title: 'About Parents & Children', size: 'small', 
                content: [ { type: 'text', markdown: true, text: 'The Engine uses a strict parent/child hierarchy.\n\n- **Locations**: If a Room is parented to a Building, entering the Room automatically moves the player down the tree.\n- **Items/Characters**: Assigning a location as a parent places them inside that location.' } ] 
            });
        } },
        { type: 'button', text: parentName, style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', flex: '1 1 0' }, callback: async function() {
            await openPickerModal({
                title: 'Nest Under Entity',
                items: allNodes.filter(function(m) { return m.id !== ent.id; }),
                getId: function(m) { return m.id; },
                getLabel: function(m) { return m.name; },
                getIcon: function(m) { return m.icon || '\ud83d\udccd'; },
                getSublabel: function(m) { return m.type; },
                selectedId: ent.parentId || undefined,
                searchable: true,
                pinnedOptions: [
                    { id: '__none__', label: 'None (Make Root Level)', icon: '\u2715', onSelect: async function() { ent.parentId = null; await saveEntity(ent); await openEntityEditModal(ent.id); await refreshSidebar(); } }
                ],
                onSelect: async function(m) { ent.parentId = m.id; await saveEntity(ent); await openEntityEditModal(ent.id); await refreshSidebar(); }
            });
        } }
    ] });

    if (ent.type === 'item') {
        coreParts.push({ 
            type: 'checkboxInput', 
            label: '🎒 Equipped to Parent (Targetable State)', 
            initialValue: !!(ent as any).isEquipped, 
            onChange: async function(val: boolean) { 
                const fe = await loadEntity(ent.id);
                if (!fe) return;

                // [BUGFIX v2.51.7 EQUIP-STATE-SYNC, per user: "the entity edit modal
                // seems to be disconnected from the other two and is the only one that
                // inserts the item into the character's context"] fe.parentId is the
                // character's ENTITY id (the body), never the CharacterRecord's own
                // storage id -- loadCharacter(fe.parentId) here was always a miss (see
                // buildEntityDetailPayload's ownerCharId resolution above for the correct
                // pattern), so this always fell into the "non-character parent" fallback
                // and wrote equippedItemIds onto the wrong object -- a generic EntityRecord
                // field with zero readers anywhere in this file, confirmed by grep, not
                // assumed. Now resolves the real CharacterRecord by entityId match, then
                // delegates to aeSetEquip (Section 19) -- the same canonical equip/unequip
                // the bridge HUD and AE_EQUIP_ITEM message handler already use -- so
                // isEquipped (read by the bridge's image-prompt equip-append) and
                // equippedItemIds (read by buildCharDynamicBlock's context line) can no
                // longer drift apart from this surface.
                let parentChar: CharacterRecord | null = null;
                if (fe.parentId) {
                    const _allChars = await loadAllCharacters();
                    parentChar = _allChars.find(function(c) { return c.entityId === fe.parentId; }) || null;
                }
                if (parentChar) {
                    await aeSetEquip(fe, parentChar, val);
                    await broadcastCharacterData();
                    await broadcastSceneState();
                } else {
                    // Genuinely a non-character parent (e.g. a container/location) -- no
                    // CharacterRecord to sync equippedItemIds onto. isEquipped still lands
                    // on the item itself via aeSetEquip(fe, null, val).
                    await aeSetEquip(fe, null, val);
                }
            }         });
    }

    // --- SILENT TOGGLE (top-level, no header) ---
    // [CE-STRIP v2.1.5] Silent Interaction / Vehicle checkboxes removed — isSilent was
    // never read anywhere; isVehicle had no consumer beyond this toggle and the display
    // fields already removed above.

    coreParts.push({ type: 'multilineTextInput', label: 'Description', initialValue: ent.description, style: { minHeight: '80px' }, onChange: async function(val) { ent.description = val; await saveEntity(ent); } });
    if (ent.type === 'location') {
        // [CE-STRIP v2.6.0 CTX-CUT] Old text claimed this description "exists in AN if
        // present" — false now that location injection is gone entirely. Description
        // is lorebook + image-gen only going forward.
        coreParts.push({ type: 'multilineTextInput', label: '🎨 Location Visuals', placeholder: 'Image tags for how this place looks (e.g. "stone tavern interior, fireplace, wooden beams"). Used by image generations specific to this location.', initialValue: (ent as any).locationVisuals || '', style: { minHeight: '50px' }, onChange: async function(val: string) { (ent as any).locationVisuals = val; await saveEntity(ent); } });
    } else if (ent.type === 'item') {
        // [CE-STRIP v2.6.0 CTX-CUT] Corrected — item names were NEVER listed in the AN
        // (that claim was already stale before this pass; buildCharInjection, the only
        // function that ever did that, has been unused-in-pipeline since v0.9.8.4).
        // buildSceneLorebookActivation is the real, current behavior.
        coreParts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Equipped items fold into the wearer\u2019s own lorebook entry (name + description), rebuilt every generation. Unequipping removes them. Toggle via World Settings \u2192 Lorebook Additions.', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.6', marginTop: '2px', marginBottom: '8px' } });
    }

    parts.push({ type: 'collapsibleSection', title: '📝 Core Details', initialCollapsed: false, storageKey: `temp:ce_core_${ent.id}`, content: coreParts });

    // [WP-1] ENTITY LOREBOOK
    if (ent.type !== 'character') {
        const loreParts: UIPart[] = [];
        const loreLinked = !!ent.lorebookEntryId;
        loreParts.push({ type: 'multilineTextInput', label: '📖 Lorebook Entry', placeholder: 'Extended info NOT already in the description — history, secrets, rules, reputation. Injected only when the name or an added key is mentioned (Sync after editing).', initialValue: ent.lorebookText || '', style: { minHeight: '70px' }, onChange: async function(val: string) { ent.lorebookText = val; await saveEntity(ent); } });
        loreParts.push({ type: 'text', text: loreLinked ? '✅ Linked — injects when a key below appears in the story.' : 'Not linked. Create an entry to inject this entity into context when its name (or a key) appears.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.6', marginBottom: '6px' } });
        loreParts.push({ type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px', marginBottom: '6px' }, content: [
            { type: 'button', text: loreLinked ? '🔄 Sync' : '➕ Create Lorebook', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: async function() { if (ent.lorebookEntryId) { await syncEntityLorebookEntry(ent.id); } else { await createLinkedEntityLorebookEntry(ent.id); } await openEntityEditModal(ent.id); } }
        ].concat(loreLinked ? [{ type: 'button', text: '🔗 Unlink', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', color: '#ff6b6b', backgroundColor: 'transparent' }, callback: async function() { await unlinkEntityLorebookEntry(ent.id); await openEntityEditModal(ent.id); } } as UIPart] : []) });
        loreParts.push({ type: 'text', text: '🔑 Keys: ' + [ent.name].concat(ent.lorebookTags || []).join(', '), style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.8', marginBottom: '4px' } });
        (ent.lorebookTags || []).forEach(function(tg, ti) {
            const captTi = ti;
            loreParts.push({ type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '4px' }, content: [
                { type: 'text', text: '• ' + tg, style: { fontSize: '11px', flex: '1 1 0' } },
                { type: 'button', text: '✕', style: { margin: 0, padding: '2px 6px', fontSize: '10px', color: '#ff6b6b', backgroundColor: 'transparent' }, callback: async function() { let fe = await loadEntity(ent.id); if (!fe) return; fe.lorebookTags = (fe.lorebookTags || []).filter(function(_t, i) { return i !== captTi; }); await saveEntity(fe); if (fe.lorebookEntryId) await syncEntityLorebookEntry(fe.id, true); await openEntityEditModal(fe.id); } }
            ] });
        });
        loreParts.push({ type: 'button', text: '+ Add Key', style: { margin: '4px 0 0 0', fontSize: '11px', width: '100%' }, callback: async function() {
            let addModal: any; let pending = '';
            addModal = await openEngineModal({ id: 'ae-lore-key-add', title: 'Add Lorebook Key', size: 'small', content: [
                { type: 'text', text: 'Extra trigger word or phrase. The entity name is always a key.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.6', marginBottom: '6px' } },
                { type: 'textInput', placeholder: 'e.g. the old mill', initialValue: '', onChange: function(v: string) { pending = v; } },
                { type: 'button', text: 'Add', style: { width: '100%', marginTop: '6px' }, callback: async function() { let t = (pending || '').trim(); if (t) { let fe = await loadEntity(ent.id); if (fe) { if (!fe.lorebookTags) fe.lorebookTags = []; if (fe.lorebookTags.indexOf(t) < 0) fe.lorebookTags.push(t); await saveEntity(fe); if (fe.lorebookEntryId) await syncEntityLorebookEntry(fe.id, true); } } await addModal.close(); await openEntityEditModal(ent.id); } }
            ] });
        } });
        parts.push({ type: 'collapsibleSection', title: '📖 Lorebook', initialCollapsed: true, storageKey: `temp:ce_lore_${ent.id}`, content: loreParts });
    }
    
    // --- 4. CONNECTIONS ---
    const implicitRows: UIPart[] = [];
    if (ent.parentId) { 
        const pMeta = allNodes.find(function(m) { return m.id === ent.parentId; }); 
        if (pMeta) implicitRows.push({ type: 'text', text: `↑ Go back to ${pMeta.name} (Parent)`, style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.6', marginLeft: '8px', marginBottom: '2px' } }); 
    }
    const children = allNodes.filter(function(m) { return m.parentId === ent.id; });
    for (const child of children) {
        const captChild = child;
        const childEntForGate = await loadEntity(child.id);
        // [CE-STRIP v2.1.5] childIsGated lock indicator removed — .gated has no enforcement guard anymore.
        implicitRows.push({ type: 'text', text: '↓ Enter ' + captChild.name + ' (Child)', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.7', marginLeft: '8px', marginBottom: '2px' } });
    }
    
    let connParts: UIPart[] = [
        // [CE-STRIP v2.1.5] Self-lock toggle removed — .gated had no enforcement guard
        // left anywhere (the entity_locked guard it refers to no longer exists), so this
        // was a cosmetic lock icon with zero effect.
        // [CE-STRIP v2.0.0] "+ Entry Action" button removed — entryActionId/travel-cost
        // editing cut with Actions + Travel.
        { type: 'box', style: { marginBottom: '12px', padding: '6px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.02)', borderRadius: '4px' }, content: [
            { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px', marginBottom: '4px' }, content: [
                { type: 'text', text: 'Implicit Tree Connections:', style: { fontSize: '11px', fontWeight: 'bold' } },
                { type: 'button', text: '❓', style: { margin: 0, padding: '2px 6px', fontSize: '10px', backgroundColor: 'transparent', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2)', opacity: '0.7' }, callback: async function() {
                    await api.v1.ui.modal.open({ title: 'Implicit vs Explicit Connections', size: 'medium', content: [ { type: 'text', markdown: true, text: 'The engine automatically creates **Implicit** "Up" and "Down" connections based on parents and children (e.g., moving from the House down to the Bedroom).\n\n**Explicit** Connections are custom travel routes to entities that aren\'t strictly parents/children (e.g., a teleporter or road).' } ] });
                } }
            ] },
            ...(implicitRows.length > 0 ? implicitRows : [{ type: 'text', text: 'No parent or children.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.4', marginLeft: '8px', marginBottom: '2px' } } as UIPart])
        ]}
    ];

    ent.connectedEntityIds.filter(Boolean).forEach(function(conn, i) {
        const targetMeta = allNodes.find(function(m) { return m.id === conn.targetId; });
        const targetName = targetMeta?.name || `Unknown (${conn.targetId.substring(0, 8)})`; 
        
        connParts.push({ type: 'box', style: { padding: '8px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)', marginBottom: '4px' }, content: [
            { type: 'textInput', label: `→ ${targetName} Label`, initialValue: conn.label, placeholder: 'e.g. "Head to the market"', onChange: async function(v: string) { ent.connectedEntityIds[i].label = v; await saveEntity(ent); } },

            // [CE-STRIP v2.1.5] Requires Vehicle / Silent Travel checkboxes, the Travel
            // Action button, and the Lock/Open toggle all removed — travel-cost/vehicle/
            // gate mechanics cut, no enforcement guard reads any of them anymore.

            { type: 'button', text: 'Remove', style: { color: '#ff6b6b', marginTop: '4px' }, callback: async function() { ent.connectedEntityIds.splice(i, 1); await saveEntity(ent); await openEntityEditModal(ent.id); } }
        ] });
    });

    const existingTargetIds = new Set(ent.connectedEntityIds.map(function(c) { return c.targetId; }));
    const pickableConns = allNodes.filter(function(m) { return m.id !== ent.id && !existingTargetIds.has(m.id); });
    if (pickableConns.length > 0) {
        connParts.push({ type: 'button', text: '+ Add Explicit Connection', style: { marginTop: '6px', fontSize: '11px' }, callback: async function() {
            const pickerModal = await openEngineModal({ id: 'ce-conn-picker', size: 'medium', title: 'Pick Destination', content: [
                ...pickableConns.map(function(m) { return { type: 'button', text: `📍 ${m.name}`, style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '4px', textAlign: 'left' }, callback: async function() { pickerModal.close(); ent.connectedEntityIds.push({ targetId: m.id, label: `Go to ${m.name}`, resourceCost: 0 }); await saveEntity(ent); await openEntityEditModal(ent.id); } } as UIPart; })
            ] });
        } });
    }
    parts.push({ type: 'collapsibleSection', title: `🔗 Connections (${ent.connectedEntityIds.length})`, initialCollapsed: true, storageKey: `temp:ce_conn_${ent.id}`, content: connParts });
    
    // [CE-STRIP v2.1.5] Entity-level Skill Bonuses editor removed — dead Actions/skillBonuses remnant.
    // --- 6. ENCOUNTERS --- [v0.9.25 E4] Removed — replaced by action system
    // --- 6. CHARACTERS ---
    const charIdx = await loadIndex();
    const chars = await loadAllCharacters();
    const presentChars = chars.filter(function(c) { return c.currentLocationId === ent.id; });
    let charParts: UIPart[] = [];
    // --- Present characters (read-only, auto-synced) ---
    charParts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Present (auto-synced from entity tree)', style: { fontWeight: 'bold', fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.6', marginBottom: '4px' } });
    if (presentChars.length === 0) {
        charParts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'None currently.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.4' } });
    } else {
        presentChars.forEach(function(c) { charParts.push({ type: 'text', text: '• ' + c.name, style: { fontSize: '12px', marginLeft: '8px', marginBottom: '2px' } }); });
    }
    
    // --- 7. EXPORT / DELETE ---
    parts.push({ type: 'row', style: { gap: '8px', marginTop: '16px' }, content: [
        { type: 'button', text: 'Delete Node', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', color: '#ff6b6b' }, callback: async function() { if (typeof confirmDeleteEntity === 'function') { await confirmDeleteEntity(ent.id, ent.name); } editingEntityId = null; } }
    ] });

    await openEngineModal({ id: 'entity-edit-modal', title: `Edit: ${ent.name}`, size: 'large', content: parts });
}

// ============================================================================
// ENTITY DELETION & GRAVEYARD PROTECTION
// ============================================================================


async function confirmDeleteEntity(id: string, name: string): Promise<void> {
    const pm = await openEngineModal({
        title: 'Confirm Deletion',
        size: 'small',
        content: [
            { type: 'text', text: `Are you sure you want to remove ${name}?`, style: { marginBottom: '12px' } },
            
            // THE GRAVEYARD SHUNT
            { type: 'button', text: '⚰️ Send to Graveyard (Keep data, hide from play)', style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '8px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(136,136,136,0.2)' }, callback: async function() {
                const allEnts = await loadEntityIndex();
                let gyMeta = allEnts.find(function(e) { return e.name === 'Graveyard' && e.type === 'location'; });
                
                // Forge the Graveyard if it doesn't exist
                if (!gyMeta) {
                    const gy = typeof makeDefaultEntity === 'function' ? makeDefaultEntity('Graveyard') : { id: generateId(), name: 'Graveyard' };
                    gy.type = 'location';
                    gy.parentId = null;
                    await saveEntity(gy);
                    gyMeta = { id: gy.id, name: gy.name, type: gy.type, parentId: null };
                }
                
                const ent = await loadEntity(id);
                if (ent) {
                    ent.parentId = gyMeta.id;
                    await saveEntity(ent);
                }
                
                pm.close();
                if (typeof editingEntityId !== 'undefined' && editingEntityId === id) await openEntityEditModal(id);
                await refreshSidebar();
            }},
            
            // THE ORPHAN PROTECTOR
            { type: 'button', text: '🗑️ Permanently Delete', style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '8px', color: '#ff6b6b', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,107,107,0.1)' }, callback: async function() {
                const allEnts = await loadEntityIndex();
                const children = allEnts.filter(function(e) { return e.parentId === id; });
                
                // Failsafe: Shunt all internal items/characters back to Root
                for (const childMeta of children) {
                    const child = await loadEntity(childMeta.id);
                    if (child) {
                        child.parentId = null; 
                        await saveEntity(child);
                    }
                }
                
                // Now permanently delete the target node
                if (typeof deleteEntity === 'function') await deleteEntity(id);
                pm.close();
                
                // Close modal if deleting the one we are actively editing
                if (typeof editingEntityId !== 'undefined' && editingEntityId === id) {
                    const em = await openEngineModal({id: 'entity-edit-modal', title: 'Closed', content: []});
                    em.close();
                }
                await refreshSidebar();
            }},
            { type: 'button', text: 'Cancel', style: { width: '100%' }, callback: async function() { pm.close(); } }
        ]
    });
}

// ============================================================================
// SECTION 23 — WORLDBUILDING MODAL (New Setup Hub)
// ============================================================================

var worldbuildingModalHandle: any = null;

async function refreshWorldbuildingModal(): Promise<void> {
    if (worldbuildingModalHandle && !worldbuildingModalHandle.isClosed()) {
        await worldbuildingModalHandle.update({ content: await buildWorldbuildingContent() });
        return;
    }
    // [CE-STRIP v2.11.0] World Settings now renders inside the merged Settings
    // workspace (buildSettingsWorkspace) instead of its own standalone modal —
    // refresh whichever workspace is currently open instead.
    await refreshWorkspace();
}

// ── World-Build Wizard: engine-native interface ──────────────────────────
// [vNEXT] Engine-only interface for the wizard (the bridge HUD will mirror every
// function later). Tabbed so future groups (Characters, Factions, Species, ...)
// slot in without the modal growing unmanageable. Data lives in storyStorage
// (chats) and config (sections/project fields); the modal reloads fresh data on
// every redraw rather than holding a snapshot.
// [v0.9.8.2] iconId replaces emoji labels; tab order: setup, chats, memory,
// species, factions, locations, characters, intro, drama.
var WIZARD_TABS: { id: string; label: string; iconId: string }[] = [
    { id: 'live',       label: 'Chat',       iconId: 'star'            },
    { id: 'memory',     label: 'Memory',     iconId: 'file-text'       },
    { id: 'species',    label: 'Species',    iconId: 'activity'        },
    { id: 'factions',   label: 'Factions',   iconId: 'shield'          },
    // [CE-STRIP v2.1.6] 'bestiary'/'items' wizard tab entries removed — Bestiary + Item Templates cut.
    { id: 'locations',  label: 'Locations',  iconId: 'map-pin'         },
    { id: 'characters', label: 'Characters', iconId: 'user'            },
    { id: 'intro',      label: 'Intro',      iconId: 'film'            },
    { id: 'drama',      label: 'Drama',      iconId: 'zap'             },
    { id: 'help',       label: 'Help',       iconId: 'help'            }
];

// [v1.6.1] All-Schedules modal — every character's daily timetable in one place,
// now read/write. Was read-only (see prior comment below); this reuses the exact
// same row mechanics as each character's own Daily Schedule section (same
// loadCharacter/saveCharacter/openPickerModal calls) so both surfaces stay on one
// source of truth — nothing here is a separate copy of the schedule data.
// One pass over the character index + one location-index load per render; nothing
// here runs unless the user opens it, so it adds zero runtime scan cost.

async function openWizardModal(): Promise<void> {
    let pm: any;

    async function redraw(): Promise<void> {
        if (pm && typeof pm.isClosed === 'function' && pm.isClosed()) return;
        let content = await buildWizardContent();
        if (pm && !pm.isClosed()) { await pm.update({ content: content }); }
    }

    function tabBar(activeTab: string): UIPart {
        return { type: 'row', style: { gap: '3px', flexWrap: 'wrap', marginBottom: '10px', borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)', paddingBottom: '4px' }, content: WIZARD_TABS.map(function(t) {
            let on = activeTab === t.id;
            // [v0.9.8.2] iconId on each tab button; text provides the accessible label.
        return { type: 'button', iconId: t.iconId as any, text: t.label, style: { flex: '1 1 auto', minWidth: '76px', margin: 0, padding: '4px 3px', fontSize: '10px', fontWeight: on ? 'bold' : 'normal', borderBottom: on ? '2px solid #88ccff' : '2px solid transparent', borderRadius: '4px 4px 0 0', backgroundColor: on ? 'rgba(136,204,255,0.12)' : 'transparent', opacity: on ? '1' : '0.65' }, callback: async function() { await api.v1.tempStorage.set(STORAGE_WIZ_TAB, t.id); await redraw(); } } as UIPart;
        }) };
    }

    async function buildWizardContent(): Promise<UIPart[]> {
        let cfg = await loadConfig();
        let chats = await loadWizardChats();
        let ceEntries = await listWizChatEntries();   // [v2.6.0] CE Chats lorebook entries, offered as extra context sources on every generator tab
        let activeId = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_WIZ_ACTIVE_CHAT, '') as string;
        let active = chats.find(function(c) { return c.id === activeId; }) || null;
        let topics = ((cfg as any).wizardTopics && (cfg as any).wizardTopics.length) ? (cfg as any).wizardTopics : DEFAULT_WIZARD_TOPICS;
        let activeTab = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_WIZ_TAB, 'live') as string;
        if (activeTab === 'story') { activeTab = 'setup'; } // [v0.9.8.2] legacy redirect
        if (activeTab === 'chats') { activeTab = 'live'; }  // [v2.19.0 WIZARD-2.0] removed Chats tab -> land on Chat
        let parts: UIPart[] = [];
        parts.push(tabBar(activeTab));

        if (activeTab === 'live') {
            // [v2.5.0 CE-CHATS] in-document wizard chat controls; refresh via the modal's
            // own redraw(), and close the modal (pm) before persona-pick / resume.
            let liveParts = await buildLiveChatTab(redraw, async function() { try { if (pm && !pm.isClosed()) await pm.close(); } catch (_eLc) {} });
            for (let __lp = 0; __lp < liveParts.length; __lp++) parts.push(liveParts[__lp]);
        // [v2.19.0 WIZARD-2.0] The classic "Chats" tab (multi-chat authoring) is removed
        // from the wizard UI; the in-document "Chat" tab (buildLiveChatTab) is the sole
        // chat method now. DEAD-PENDING-REMOVAL, kept in place because they still back the
        // bridge-mode generator surface and read existing saves: loadWizardChats /
        // saveWizardChats / createWizardChat / deleteWizardChat / exportWizardChats,
        // runWizardMemoryFanout, and the AE_WIZ_NEW_CHAT / AE_WIZ_DELETE_CHAT /
