        // AE_WIZ_COMMIT_MEMORY handlers. Generator context-source checklists still surface
        // any classic chats an existing save carries; new stories simply have none.
        } else if (activeTab === 'memory') {
            // ── MEMORY SECTIONS ──
            // [v2.11.0] Context sources are now a shared, top-level checklist (mirrors
            // Species/Factions below) instead of implicitly using whichever chat happens
            // to be "active". Every section's own Regen button reads this same selection —
            // check/uncheck sources here as you go, then Regen a section to (re)generate
            // it from the current selection.
            let memSrcKey = STORAGE_WIZ_TAB_SRC + 'memory';
            let memStoredSrcRaw = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(memSrcKey, '') as string;
            let memStoredSrcIds: string[] = [];
            try { let mj = JSON.parse(memStoredSrcRaw || '[]'); if (Array.isArray(mj)) memStoredSrcIds = mj.filter(Boolean); } catch (eMemSrc) { memStoredSrcIds = []; }
            memStoredSrcIds = memStoredSrcIds.filter(function(id) { return (chats.some(function(c) { return c.id === id; }) || ceEntries.some(function(e) { return e.id === id; })); });
            let memEffSrcIds = memStoredSrcIds.length ? memStoredSrcIds : (active ? [active.id] : []);

            parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Enabled sections are assembled into the static Memory block (Style → Author’s Note) on commit. Check one or more context sources below, then Regen a section to generate it from that selection.', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.55', marginBottom: '8px' } });

            parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Context sources' + (memStoredSrcIds.length ? '' : (active ? ' — none checked, using active chat “' + active.title + '”' : ' — none, using project concept only')) + ':', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.7', marginBottom: '2px' } });
            if (chats.length === 0) {
                parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'No chats yet — generation uses project concept only.', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.45', fontStyle: 'italic', marginBottom: '8px' } });
            } else {
                chats.forEach(function(pc) {
                    let onSrc = memStoredSrcIds.indexOf(pc.id) >= 0;
                    parts.push({ type: 'checkboxInput', label: pc.title, initialValue: onSrc, onChange: async function(val: boolean) {
                        let curRaw = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(memSrcKey, '') as string;
                        let curIds: string[] = [];
                        try { let pj = JSON.parse(curRaw || '[]'); if (Array.isArray(pj)) curIds = pj.filter(Boolean); } catch (eMemSet) { curIds = []; }
                        if (val && curIds.indexOf(pc.id) < 0) curIds.push(pc.id);
                        else if (!val) curIds = curIds.filter(function(x) { return x !== pc.id; });
                        await api.v1.tempStorage.set(memSrcKey, JSON.stringify(curIds));
                        await redraw();
                    } } as UIPart);
                });
                parts.push({ type: 'text', text: '(Check one or more. Leave all unchecked to use the active chat.)', style: { fontSize: '9px', opacity: '0.4', marginBottom: '8px' } });
            }
            _wizCeSourceCheckboxParts(ceEntries, memStoredSrcIds, memSrcKey, redraw).forEach(function(ccp) { parts.push(ccp); });
            parts.push(wizContextPreviewPart(memEffSrcIds));

            (cfg.wizardSections || []).forEach(function(s: WizardMemorySection, si: number) {
                let hintKey = STORAGE_WIZ_SEC_HINT + s.id;
                parts.push({ type: 'box', style: { backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)', padding: '7px', borderRadius: '5px', marginBottom: '6px' }, content: [
                    { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px', marginBottom: '3px' }, content: [
                        { type: 'checkboxInput', label: '', initialValue: !!s.enabled, onChange: async function(val: boolean) { await mutConfig(function(c) { c.wizardSections[si].enabled = val; }); } } as UIPart,
                        { type: 'textInput', initialValue: s.label, style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 'bold' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { await mutConfig(function(c) { c.wizardSections[si].label = v; }); } },
                        { type: 'text', text: s.target === 'an' ? 'AN' : 'MEM', style: { fontSize: '9px', opacity: '0.5', flexShrink: '0' } },
                        { type: 'button', text: '↑', style: { margin: 0, padding: '2px 5px', fontSize: '11px', opacity: si === 0 ? '0.25' : '0.8' }, callback: async function() { if (si === 0) return; await mutConfig(function(c) { let a = c.wizardSections; let t = a[si - 1]; a[si - 1] = a[si]; a[si] = t; }); await redraw(); } },
                        { type: 'button', text: '↓', style: { margin: 0, padding: '2px 5px', fontSize: '11px', opacity: si >= (cfg.wizardSections || []).length - 1 ? '0.25' : '0.8' }, callback: async function() { let len = (cfg.wizardSections || []).length; if (si >= len - 1) return; await mutConfig(function(c) { let a = c.wizardSections; let t = a[si + 1]; a[si + 1] = a[si]; a[si] = t; }); await redraw(); } },
                        { type: 'button', iconId: 'trash', style: { margin: 0, padding: '2px' }, callback: async function() { await mutConfig(function(c) { c.wizardSections.splice(si, 1); }); await redraw(); } }
                    ] },
                    { type: 'multilineTextInput', initialValue: s.content || '', placeholder: '(generated on commit; editable)', style: { minHeight: '40px', marginBottom: '3px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { await mutConfig(function(c) { c.wizardSections[si].content = v; }); } } as UIPart,
                    { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '4px', marginBottom: '3px' }, content: [
                        { type: 'textInput', placeholder: 'Regen hint (optional)', initialValue: '', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '10px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { await api.v1.tempStorage.set(hintKey, v); } },
                        { type: 'button', text: '⚡ Regen', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '10px', padding: '3px 8px' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                            let hint = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(hintKey, '') as string;
                            api.v1.ui.toast('Regenerating “' + s.label + '”…', { id: 'wiz-regen', autoClose: false, type: 'info' });
                            let r = await regenerateWizardSection(s.id, memEffSrcIds, hint);
                            api.v1.ui.toast(r ? ('Regenerated “' + s.label + '”.') : 'Regeneration failed.', { id: 'wiz-regen', type: r ? 'success' : 'error', autoClose: 2000 });
                            await redraw();
                        } }
                    ] },
                    { type: 'textInput', initialValue: s.instructions || '', placeholder: 'Scope instructions', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.8' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { await mutConfig(function(c) { c.wizardSections[si].instructions = v; }); } }
                ] });
            });
            parts.push({ type: 'button', text: '+ Add Section', style: { marginTop: '2px', fontSize: '11px' }, callback: async function() {
                await mutConfig(function(c) { if (!c.wizardSections) c.wizardSections = []; c.wizardSections.push({ id: 'wsec_' + generateId(), label: 'New Section', enabled: false, content: '', instructions: 'Describe ONLY this section’s scope.', target: 'memory' }); });
                await redraw();
            } });
            parts.push({ type: 'button', text: '✅ Commit to Memory + Author’s Note', style: { width: '100%', marginTop: '6px', fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(126,200,160,0.12)', color: '#7ec8a0' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                let fresh = await loadConfig();
                let ok = await commitWizardMemory(fresh);
                api.v1.ui.toast(ok ? 'Committed to Memory and Author’s Note.' : 'Commit failed.', { type: ok ? 'success' : 'error', autoClose: 2000 });
            } });
            // [v1.22.3] "Sync All Lorebooks" moved to the sidebar landing page — it is a
            // whole-world maintenance action, not a Memory-generation step, and users kept
            // missing it at the bottom of an unrelated tab. See buildSidebar section 2b.
        } else if (activeTab === 'species' || activeTab === 'factions') {
            // ── SPECIES / FACTIONS (batch yoink generation + per-item regen) ──
            let kind = (activeTab === 'factions') ? 'faction' : 'species';
            let list: any[] = (kind === 'faction') ? (cfg.factions || []) : (cfg.species || []);
            // [v0.9.81] Per-tab context sources: MULTI-select (checkboxes, mirroring the
            // per-chat context model). Stored as a JSON id array per kind. Empty selection
            // falls back to the active chat; no active chat falls back to project concept only.
            let srcKey = STORAGE_WIZ_TAB_SRC + kind;
            let storedSrcRaw = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(srcKey, '') as string;
            let storedSrcIds: string[] = [];
            try { let parsedSrc = JSON.parse(storedSrcRaw || '[]'); if (Array.isArray(parsedSrc)) storedSrcIds = parsedSrc.filter(Boolean); } catch (eSrcParse) { storedSrcIds = []; }
            storedSrcIds = storedSrcIds.filter(function(id) { return (chats.some(function(c) { return c.id === id; }) || ceEntries.some(function(e) { return e.id === id; })); });
            let effSrcIds = storedSrcIds.length ? storedSrcIds : (active ? [active.id] : []);
            let countKey = STORAGE_WIZ_GEN_COUNT + kind;
            let countDraft = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(countKey, 3) as number;

            parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Generate ' + (kind === 'faction' ? 'factions' : 'species') + ' from the chosen context source plus project context. Existing entries are fed in so new ones won\'t duplicate them. Results are STAGED for review \u2014 nothing is written to your world or the lorebook until you commit.', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.55', marginBottom: '8px' } });

            // Context sources (multi-select checkboxes, mirroring the per-chat context model).
            parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Context sources' + (storedSrcIds.length ? '' : (active ? ' — none checked, using active chat “' + active.title + '”' : ' — none, using project concept only')) + ':', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.7', marginBottom: '2px' } });
            if (chats.length === 0) {
                parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'No chats yet — generation uses project concept only.', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.45', fontStyle: 'italic', marginBottom: '8px' } });
            } else {
                chats.forEach(function(pc) {
                    let onSrc = storedSrcIds.indexOf(pc.id) >= 0;
                    parts.push({ type: 'checkboxInput', label: pc.title, initialValue: onSrc, onChange: async function(val: boolean) {
                        let curRaw = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(srcKey, '') as string;
                        let curIds: string[] = [];
                        try { let pj = JSON.parse(curRaw || '[]'); if (Array.isArray(pj)) curIds = pj.filter(Boolean); } catch (eSrcSet) { curIds = []; }
                        if (val && curIds.indexOf(pc.id) < 0) curIds.push(pc.id);
                        else if (!val) curIds = curIds.filter(function(x) { return x !== pc.id; });
                        await api.v1.tempStorage.set(srcKey, JSON.stringify(curIds));
                        await redraw();
                    } } as UIPart);
                });
                parts.push({ type: 'text', text: '(Check one or more. Leave all unchecked to use the active chat.)', style: { fontSize: '9px', opacity: '0.4', marginBottom: '8px' } });
            }
            _wizCeSourceCheckboxParts(ceEntries, storedSrcIds, srcKey, redraw).forEach(function(ccp) { parts.push(ccp); });

            // [v1.22.0 PREVIEW] Show exactly what the generator will receive.
            parts.push(wizContextPreviewPart(effSrcIds));

            parts.push({ type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px', marginBottom: '10px' }, content: [
                { type: 'text', text: 'How many:', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.7', flexShrink: '0' } },
                { type: 'numberInput', initialValue: countDraft, style: { width: '64px', margin: 0 }, onChange: async function(v: number) { await api.v1.tempStorage.set(countKey, Math.max(1, Math.min(12, v || 1))); } },
                { type: 'button', text: '⚡ Generate', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(136,204,255,0.15)', color: '#88ccff' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                    let n = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(countKey, 3) as number;
                    api.v1.ui.toast('Generating ' + n + ' ' + kind + '(s)…', { id: 'wiz-batch', autoClose: false, type: 'info' });
                    // [v1.22.0 STAGING] Stage for review; commit is a separate, explicit step.
                    let stagedIds = await stageEntityBatch(kind, n, effSrcIds);
                    api.v1.ui.toast(stagedIds.length > 0 ? ('Staged ' + stagedIds.length + ' ' + kind + '(s) \u2014 review below.') : 'Generation failed.', { id: 'wiz-batch', type: stagedIds.length > 0 ? 'success' : 'error', autoClose: 2500 });
                    await redraw();
                } }
            ] });

            // [v1.22.0 STAGING] Staged drafts for this kind, above the committed list.
            let spStageParts = await wizStagingParts(kind, redraw);
            spStageParts.forEach(function(sp) { parts.push(sp); });

            parts.push({ type: 'button', text: '+ Add blank ' + (kind === 'faction' ? 'faction' : 'species'), style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '10px', fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.85' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                await addBlankWizardEntity(kind);
                await redraw();
            } });

            if (list.length === 0) {
                parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'None yet.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.4', fontStyle: 'italic', marginBottom: '6px' } });
            } else {
                list.forEach(function(item: any, ii: number) {
                    let hintKey = STORAGE_WIZ_ITEM_HINT + item.id;
                    let boxContent: UIPart[] = [
                        { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px', marginBottom: '3px' }, content: [
                            { type: 'textInput', initialValue: item.name, style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 'bold' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { await mutConfig(function(c) { let arr: any[] = (kind === 'faction') ? c.factions : c.species; if (arr[ii]) arr[ii].name = v; }); } },
                            { type: 'button', iconId: 'trash', style: { margin: 0, padding: '2px' }, callback: async function() {
                                let capId = item.id;
                                if (kind === 'faction') { await unlinkFactionLorebookEntry(capId).catch(function() {}); }
                                else { await unlinkSpeciesLorebookEntry(capId).catch(function() {}); }
                                await mutConfig(function(c) { let arr: any[] = (kind === 'faction') ? c.factions : c.species; let idx = arr.findIndex(function(x: any) { return x.id === capId; }); if (idx >= 0) arr.splice(idx, 1); });
                                await redraw();
                            } }
                        ] },
                        { type: 'multilineTextInput', initialValue: item.description || '', placeholder: '(lore description)', style: { minHeight: '44px', marginBottom: '3px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { await mutConfig(function(c) { let arr: any[] = (kind === 'faction') ? c.factions : c.species; if (arr[ii]) arr[ii].description = v; }); } } as UIPart,
                        { type: 'textInput', initialValue: (item.lorebookTags || []).join(', '), placeholder: 'Lorebook tags (comma-separated)', style: { margin: '0 0 3px 0', fontSize: '10px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { await mutConfig(function(c) { let arr: any[] = (kind === 'faction') ? c.factions : c.species; if (arr[ii]) arr[ii].lorebookTags = v.split(',').map(function(s2: string) { return s2.trim(); }).filter(Boolean); }); } },
                        { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '4px', marginBottom: '2px' }, content: [
                            { type: 'textInput', placeholder: 'Regen hint (optional)', initialValue: '', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '10px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { await api.v1.tempStorage.set(hintKey, v); } },
                            { type: 'button', text: '⚡ Regen', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '10px', padding: '3px 8px' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                                let hint = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(hintKey, '') as string;
                                api.v1.ui.toast('Regenerating “' + item.name + '”…', { id: 'wiz-ireg', autoClose: false, type: 'info' });
                                let r = await regenerateWizardEntity(kind, item.id, effSrcIds, hint);
                                api.v1.ui.toast(r ? ('Regenerated “' + item.name + '”.') : 'Regeneration failed.', { id: 'wiz-ireg', type: r ? 'success' : 'error', autoClose: 2000 });
                                await redraw();
                            } },
                            { type: 'button', text: '🔗 Sync Lore', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '10px', padding: '3px 8px' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                                if (kind === 'faction') await syncFactionLorebookEntry(item.id); else await syncSpeciesLorebookEntry(item.id);
                            } }
                        ] }
                    ];
                    if (kind === 'faction') {
                        boxContent.push({ type: 'textInput', initialValue: (item.relationshipStates || []).join(' → '), placeholder: 'Standing track (lowest → highest)', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.8' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { await mutConfig(function(c) { if (c.factions[ii]) c.factions[ii].relationshipStates = v.split('→').map(function(s2: string) { return s2.trim(); }).filter(Boolean); }); } });
                        const fNeutral = (typeof (item as any).neutralIndex === 'number') ? (item as any).neutralIndex : factionNeutralIndex(item as any);
                        boxContent.push({ type: 'row', style: { marginTop: '4px', gap: '4px' }, content: [
                            { type: 'text', text: 'Neutral/"unaffiliated" state (filtered from rosters):', style: { flex: '1 1 0', fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.6', alignSelf: 'center' } } as UIPart,
                            { type: 'numberInput', initialValue: fNeutral, style: { width: '56px', margin: 0 }, onChange: async function(v: number) { await mutConfig(function(c) { if (c.factions[ii]) { const mx = Math.max(0, (c.factions[ii].relationshipStates || []).length - 1); (c.factions[ii] as any).neutralIndex = Math.max(0, Math.min(mx, Number(v) || 0)); } }); } } as UIPart
                        ] });
                    }
                    parts.push({ type: 'box', style: { backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)', padding: '7px', borderRadius: '5px', marginBottom: '6px' }, content: boxContent });
                });
            }
        // [CE-STRIP v2.1.6] Wizard 'bestiary' and 'items' tabs removed — Bestiary + Item Templates cut.
        } else if (activeTab === 'locations') {
            // ── LOCATIONS (two-pass tree: scope top-level, then step into any node) ──
            let lkind = 'locations';
            // Context sources (multi-select, same model as species/factions).
            let lSrcKey = STORAGE_WIZ_TAB_SRC + lkind;
            let lStoredRaw = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(lSrcKey, '') as string;
            let lStoredIds: string[] = [];
            try { let lpj = JSON.parse(lStoredRaw || '[]'); if (Array.isArray(lpj)) lStoredIds = lpj.filter(Boolean); } catch (eLSrc) { lStoredIds = []; }
            lStoredIds = lStoredIds.filter(function(id) { return (chats.some(function(c) { return c.id === id; }) || ceEntries.some(function(e) { return e.id === id; })); });
            let lEffIds = lStoredIds.length ? lStoredIds : (active ? [active.id] : []);

            // Current parent navigation (Pass 2 step-into).
            let lParentId = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_WIZ_LOC_PARENT, '') as string;
            let lParentEnt = lParentId ? await loadEntity(lParentId) : null;
            if (lParentId && !lParentEnt) { lParentId = ''; await api.v1.tempStorage.set(STORAGE_WIZ_LOC_PARENT, ''); }
            let lChildDepth = lParentId ? ((await computeEntityTier(lParentId)) + 1) : 0;

            // Breadcrumb / step-up.
            parts.push({ type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px', marginBottom: '6px' }, content: [
                { type: 'text', text: lParentEnt ? ('📍 Inside: ' + lParentEnt.name) : '🌍 World root (top-level)', style: { flex: '1 1 0', fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 'bold', color: '#88ccff' } }
            ].concat(lParentEnt ? [{ type: 'button', text: '↑ Up', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '10px', padding: '3px 8px' }, callback: async function() {
                let up = (lParentEnt && lParentEnt.parentId) ? lParentEnt.parentId : '';
                await api.v1.tempStorage.set(STORAGE_WIZ_LOC_PARENT, up);
                await redraw();
            } } as UIPart] : []) });
            parts.push({ type: 'text', text: lParentEnt ? ('Generating sub-locations of “' + lParentEnt.name + '”.') : ('Generating top-level locations. Step into any location below to build its sub-locations.'), style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.55', marginBottom: '8px' } });

            // [CE-STRIP v2.0.0] Tier travel rule editor (cost/time/narrate) removed — dead
            // without Travel. lChildDepth is retained only in case a future awareness-tier
            // concept needs it; currently unused past this point.
            void lChildDepth;

            // Context sources (multi-select checkboxes).
            parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Context sources' + (lStoredIds.length ? '' : (active ? ' — none checked, using active chat “' + active.title + '”' : ' — none, project concept only')) + ':', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.7', marginBottom: '2px' } });
            if (chats.length === 0) {
                parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'No chats yet — generation uses project concept only.', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.45', fontStyle: 'italic', marginBottom: '8px' } });
            } else {
                chats.forEach(function(pc) {
                    let onSrc = lStoredIds.indexOf(pc.id) >= 0;
                    parts.push({ type: 'checkboxInput', label: pc.title, initialValue: onSrc, onChange: async function(val: boolean) {
                        let curRaw = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(lSrcKey, '') as string;
                        let curIds: string[] = [];
                        try { let lpj2 = JSON.parse(curRaw || '[]'); if (Array.isArray(lpj2)) curIds = lpj2.filter(Boolean); } catch (eLSrc2) { curIds = []; }
                        if (val && curIds.indexOf(pc.id) < 0) curIds.push(pc.id);
                        else if (!val) curIds = curIds.filter(function(x) { return x !== pc.id; });
                        await api.v1.tempStorage.set(lSrcKey, JSON.stringify(curIds));
                        await redraw();
                    } } as UIPart);
                });
                parts.push({ type: 'text', text: '(Check one or more. Leave all unchecked to use the active chat.)', style: { fontSize: '9px', opacity: '0.4', marginBottom: '8px' } });
            }
            _wizCeSourceCheckboxParts(ceEntries, lStoredIds, lSrcKey, redraw).forEach(function(ccp) { parts.push(ccp); });

            // Generate + add-blank.
            let lCountKey = STORAGE_WIZ_GEN_COUNT + lkind;
            let lCountDraft = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(lCountKey, 3) as number;
            // [v1.22.0 PREVIEW] Show exactly what the generator will receive.
            parts.push(wizContextPreviewPart(lEffIds));
            parts.push({ type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px', marginBottom: '8px' }, content: [
                { type: 'text', text: 'How many:', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.7', flexShrink: '0' } },
                { type: 'numberInput', initialValue: lCountDraft, style: { width: '64px', margin: 0 }, onChange: async function(v: number) { await api.v1.tempStorage.set(lCountKey, Math.max(1, Math.min(12, v || 1))); } },
                { type: 'button', text: '⚡ Generate', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(136,204,255,0.15)', color: '#88ccff' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                    let n = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(lCountKey, 3) as number;
                    let pId = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_WIZ_LOC_PARENT, '') as string;
                    api.v1.ui.toast('Generating ' + n + ' location(s)…', { id: 'wiz-loc', autoClose: false, type: 'info' });
                    // [v1.22.0 STAGING] Stage for review; the draft carries its parentId, so
                    // committing later still files it under the right branch of the tree.
                    let lStaged = await stageLocationBatch(n, pId || null, lEffIds);
                    api.v1.ui.toast(lStaged.length > 0 ? ('Staged ' + lStaged.length + ' location(s) \u2014 review below.') : 'Generation failed.', { id: 'wiz-loc', type: lStaged.length > 0 ? 'success' : 'error', autoClose: 2500 });
                    await redraw();
                } }
            ] });

            // [v1.22.0 STAGING] Staged location drafts, above the committed children list.
            let lStageParts = await wizStagingParts('location', redraw);
            lStageParts.forEach(function(lsp) { parts.push(lsp); });

            parts.push({ type: 'button', text: '+ Add blank location', style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '10px', fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.85' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                let pId = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_WIZ_LOC_PARENT, '') as string;
                await addBlankWizardLocation(pId || null);
                await redraw();
            } });

            // Children list (locations under the current parent).
            let lIdx = await loadEntityIndex();
            let lKids = lIdx.filter(function(m) { return m.type === 'location' && m.parentId === (lParentId || null); });
            if (lKids.length === 0) {
                parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'No locations here yet.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.4', fontStyle: 'italic', marginBottom: '6px' } });
            } else {
                for (let lk = 0; lk < lKids.length; lk++) {
                    let kidMeta = lKids[lk];
                    let kidEnt = await loadEntity(kidMeta.id);
                    if (!kidEnt) continue;
                    let kidId = kidMeta.id;
                    let kidName = kidEnt.name;
                    let lHintKey = STORAGE_WIZ_ITEM_HINT + kidId;
                    let grandCount = lIdx.filter(function(m) { return m.type === 'location' && m.parentId === kidId; }).length;
                    parts.push({ type: 'box', style: { backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)', padding: '7px', borderRadius: '5px', marginBottom: '6px' }, content: [
                        { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px', marginBottom: '3px' }, content: [
                            { type: 'textInput', initialValue: kidEnt.name, style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 'bold' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { let fe = await loadEntity(kidId); if (!fe) return; fe.name = v; await saveEntity(fe); } },
                            { type: 'button', text: '↳ Into' + (grandCount ? (' (' + grandCount + ')') : ''), style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '10px', padding: '3px 8px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(136,204,255,0.12)', color: '#88ccff' }, callback: async function() { await api.v1.tempStorage.set(STORAGE_WIZ_LOC_PARENT, kidId); await redraw(); } },
                            { type: 'button', iconId: 'trash', style: { margin: 0, padding: '2px' }, callback: async function() { await deleteEntity(kidId); await redraw(); } }
                        ] },
                        { type: 'multilineTextInput', initialValue: kidEnt.description || '', placeholder: 'Scene description (AN — short, what you sense on arrival)', style: { minHeight: '38px', marginBottom: '3px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { let fe = await loadEntity(kidId); if (!fe) return; fe.description = v; await saveEntity(fe); } } as UIPart,
                        { type: 'multilineTextInput', initialValue: (kidEnt as any).lorebookText || '', placeholder: '📖 Lorebook (comprehensive — history, significance, secrets)', style: { minHeight: '52px', marginBottom: '3px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { let fe = await loadEntity(kidId); if (!fe) return; (fe as any).lorebookText = v; await saveEntity(fe); } } as UIPart,
                        { type: 'button', text: (kidEnt as any).lorebookEntryId ? '🔗 Sync lorebook entry' : '+ Create lorebook entry', style: { width: '100%', margin: '0 0 3px 0', fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.85' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() { let fe = await loadEntity(kidId); if (!fe) return; if ((fe as any).lorebookEntryId) await syncEntityLorebookEntry(kidId, false).catch(function() {}); else await createLinkedEntityLorebookEntry(kidId).catch(function() {}); await redraw(); } } as UIPart,
                        { type: 'textInput', initialValue: (kidEnt as any).locationVisuals || '', placeholder: '🎨 Image tags (booru + plain language) — for the image pipeline', style: { margin: '0 0 3px 0', fontSize: '10px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { let fe = await loadEntity(kidId); if (!fe) return; (fe as any).locationVisuals = v; await saveEntity(fe); } },
                        { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '4px' }, content: [
                            { type: 'textInput', placeholder: 'Regen hint (optional)', initialValue: '', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '10px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { await api.v1.tempStorage.set(lHintKey, v); } },
                            { type: 'button', text: '⚡ Regen', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '10px', padding: '3px 8px' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                                let hint = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(lHintKey, '') as string;
                                api.v1.ui.toast('Regenerating “' + kidName + '”…', { id: 'wiz-lreg', autoClose: false, type: 'info' });
                                let r = await regenerateWizardLocation(kidId, lEffIds, hint);
                                api.v1.ui.toast(r ? ('Regenerated “' + kidName + '”.') : 'Regeneration failed.', { id: 'wiz-lreg', type: r ? 'success' : 'error', autoClose: 2000 });
                                await redraw();
                            } }
                        ] }
                    ] });
                }
            }
        } else if (activeTab === 'characters') {
            // ── CHARACTERS (seed-and-go: name + comprehensive dump -> fields -> create) ──
            let ckind = 'characters';
            let cSrcKey = STORAGE_WIZ_TAB_SRC + ckind;
            let cStoredRaw = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(cSrcKey, '') as string;
            let cStoredIds: string[] = [];
            try { let cpj = JSON.parse(cStoredRaw || '[]'); if (Array.isArray(cpj)) cStoredIds = cpj.filter(Boolean); } catch (eCSrc) { cStoredIds = []; }
            cStoredIds = cStoredIds.filter(function(id) { return (chats.some(function(c) { return c.id === id; }) || ceEntries.some(function(e) { return e.id === id; })); });
            let cEffIds = cStoredIds.length ? cStoredIds : (active ? [active.id] : []);

            parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Generate characters from the selected context. Each gets a comprehensive concept dump organising everything the chat establishes about them; their dramatis-personae and static fields are then derived from that dump. New characters appear in the Characters tab — edit and regenerate individual fields there.', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.55', marginBottom: '8px' } });

            // Context sources (multi-select checkboxes).
            parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Context sources' + (cStoredIds.length ? '' : (active ? ' — none checked, using active chat “' + active.title + '”' : ' — none, project concept only')) + ':', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.7', marginBottom: '2px' } });
            if (chats.length === 0) {
                parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'No chats yet — generation uses project concept only.', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.45', fontStyle: 'italic', marginBottom: '8px' } });
            } else {
                chats.forEach(function(pc) {
                    let onSrc = cStoredIds.indexOf(pc.id) >= 0;
                    parts.push({ type: 'checkboxInput', label: pc.title, initialValue: onSrc, onChange: async function(val: boolean) {
                        let curRaw = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(cSrcKey, '') as string;
                        let curIds: string[] = [];
                        try { let cpj2 = JSON.parse(curRaw || '[]'); if (Array.isArray(cpj2)) curIds = cpj2.filter(Boolean); } catch (eCSrc2) { curIds = []; }
                        if (val && curIds.indexOf(pc.id) < 0) curIds.push(pc.id);
                        else if (!val) curIds = curIds.filter(function(x) { return x !== pc.id; });
                        await api.v1.tempStorage.set(cSrcKey, JSON.stringify(curIds));
                        await redraw();
                    } } as UIPart);
                });
                parts.push({ type: 'text', text: '(Check one or more. Leave all unchecked to use the active chat.)', style: { fontSize: '9px', opacity: '0.4', marginBottom: '8px' } });
            }
            _wizCeSourceCheckboxParts(ceEntries, cStoredIds, cSrcKey, redraw).forEach(function(ccp) { parts.push(ccp); });

            // Generate N (each character runs several budget-free passes).
            let cCountKey = STORAGE_WIZ_GEN_COUNT + ckind;
            let cCountDraft = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(cCountKey, 2) as number;
            // [v1.22.2 PREVIEW] Show exactly what the generator will receive.
            parts.push(wizContextPreviewPart(cEffIds));
            parts.push({ type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px', marginBottom: '8px' }, content: [
                { type: 'text', text: 'How many:', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.7', flexShrink: '0' } },
                { type: 'numberInput', initialValue: cCountDraft, style: { width: '64px', margin: 0 }, onChange: async function(v: number) { await api.v1.tempStorage.set(cCountKey, Math.max(1, Math.min(8, v || 1))); } },
                { type: 'button', text: '⚡ Generate', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(136,204,255,0.15)', color: '#88ccff' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                    let n = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(cCountKey, 2) as number;
                    api.v1.ui.toast('Generating ' + n + ' character(s) \u2014 a few passes each, please wait\u2026', { id: 'wiz-char', autoClose: false, type: 'info' });
                    // [v1.22.2 CHAR-STAGE] Stage name + concept for review; fields are derived on commit.
                    let cStaged = await stageCharacterBatch(n, cEffIds);
                    api.v1.ui.toast(cStaged.length > 0 ? ('Staged ' + cStaged.length + ' character(s) \u2014 review below.') : 'Generation failed.', { id: 'wiz-char', type: cStaged.length > 0 ? 'success' : 'error', autoClose: 2500 });
                    await redraw();
                } }
            ] });

            // [v1.22.2 CHAR-STAGE] Staged character drafts, above the committed roster.
            let cStageParts = await wizStagingParts('character', redraw);
            cStageParts.forEach(function(csp) { parts.push(csp); });

            // Manual add by name (ensures a specific character is generated).
            let cNameKey = 'ae_wiz_char_addname';
            let cNameDraft = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(cNameKey, '') as string;
            parts.push({ type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px', marginBottom: '10px' }, content: [
                { type: 'textInput', initialValue: cNameDraft, placeholder: 'Add a specific character by name…', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { await api.v1.tempStorage.set(cNameKey, v); } },
                { type: 'button', text: '+ Generate', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', padding: '4px 10px' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                    let nm = ((await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(cNameKey, '') as string) || '').trim();
                    if (!nm) { api.v1.ui.toast('Enter a name first.', { type: 'error', autoClose: 2000 }); return; }
                    api.v1.ui.toast('Generating “' + nm + '”…', { id: 'wiz-char1', autoClose: false, type: 'info' });
                    let ok = await runWizardCharacterSingle(nm, cEffIds);
                    api.v1.ui.toast(ok ? ('Created “' + nm + '”.') : 'Generation failed.', { id: 'wiz-char1', type: ok ? 'success' : 'error', autoClose: 2500 });
                    if (ok) await api.v1.tempStorage.set(cNameKey, '');
                    await redraw();
                } }
            ] });

            // Existing character names (dedup visibility; managed in the Characters tab).
            let cCharIdx = await loadIndex();
            if (cCharIdx.length === 0) {
                parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'No characters yet.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.4', fontStyle: 'italic' } });
            } else {
                parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Characters (' + cCharIdx.length + ') — generation avoids repeating these:', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.6', marginBottom: '4px' } });
                cCharIdx.forEach(function(cm) {
                    parts.push({ type: 'text', text: (cm.isProtagonist ? '★ ' : '• ') + cm.name + (cm.occupationRole ? (' — ' + cm.occupationRole) : ''), style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.85', marginBottom: '2px' } });
                });
            }
        } else if (activeTab === 'drama') {
            // ── DRAMA (seed hooks, NPC web, narrative threads) ──
            // [vNEXT] Seeds the three drama primitives the sidebar Drama tab + dynamic
            // engine maintain. ONE shared context-source select feeds all three generators.
            let dkind = 'drama';
            let dSrcKey = STORAGE_WIZ_TAB_SRC + dkind;
            let dStoredRaw = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(dSrcKey, '') as string;
            let dStoredIds: string[] = [];
            try { let dpj = JSON.parse(dStoredRaw || '[]'); if (Array.isArray(dpj)) dStoredIds = dpj.filter(Boolean); } catch (eDSrc) { dStoredIds = []; }
            dStoredIds = dStoredIds.filter(function(id) { return (chats.some(function(c) { return c.id === id; }) || ceEntries.some(function(e) { return e.id === id; })); });
            let dEffIds = dStoredIds.length ? dStoredIds : (active ? [active.id] : []);
            let dramaChars = await loadAllCharacters();

            parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Seed the dramatic engine across the cast: directed hooks, bilateral web dynamics, and narrative threads. Generators read the cast plus the chosen context. Full editing of each lives in the sidebar Drama tab — this establishes the opening state.', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.55', marginBottom: '8px' } });

            if (dramaChars.length === 0) {
                parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'No characters yet — create the cast in the Characters tab before seeding hooks or web dynamics.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.5', fontStyle: 'italic', marginBottom: '8px' } });
            }

            // Shared context sources (multi-select).
            parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Context sources' + (dStoredIds.length ? '' : (active ? ' — none checked, using active chat “' + active.title + '”' : ' — none, project concept only')) + ':', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.7', marginBottom: '2px' } });
            if (chats.length === 0) {
                parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'No chats yet — generation uses project concept only.', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.45', fontStyle: 'italic', marginBottom: '8px' } });
            } else {
                chats.forEach(function(pc) {
                    let onDSrc = dStoredIds.indexOf(pc.id) >= 0;
                    parts.push({ type: 'checkboxInput', label: pc.title, initialValue: onDSrc, onChange: async function(val: boolean) {
                        let dCurRaw = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(dSrcKey, '') as string;
                        let dCurIds: string[] = [];
                        try { let dpj2 = JSON.parse(dCurRaw || '[]'); if (Array.isArray(dpj2)) dCurIds = dpj2.filter(Boolean); } catch (eDSrc2) { dCurIds = []; }
                        if (val && dCurIds.indexOf(pc.id) < 0) dCurIds.push(pc.id);
                        else if (!val) dCurIds = dCurIds.filter(function(x) { return x !== pc.id; });
                        await api.v1.tempStorage.set(dSrcKey, JSON.stringify(dCurIds));
                        await redraw();
                    } } as UIPart);
                });
                parts.push({ type: 'text', text: '(Shared by all three generators below. Leave all unchecked to use the active chat.)', style: { fontSize: '9px', opacity: '0.4', marginBottom: '10px' } });
            }
            _wizCeSourceCheckboxParts(ceEntries, dStoredIds, dSrcKey, redraw).forEach(function(ccp) { parts.push(ccp); });

            // ===== 1. HOOKS =====
            parts.push({ type: 'text', text: '🔥 Hooks', style: { fontWeight: 'bold', fontSize: '13px', marginTop: '4px', marginBottom: '3px', color: '#e8a87c' } });
            parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'One directed opening tension per character (pressure 20–50, matching what the engine spawns mid-play). Check who to seed, then generate.', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.55', marginBottom: '6px' } });

            let hookSelRaw = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_WIZ_HOOK_CHARS, '') as string;
            let hookSelIds: string[] = [];
            try { let hsp = JSON.parse(hookSelRaw || '[]'); if (Array.isArray(hsp)) hookSelIds = hsp.filter(Boolean); } catch (eHookSel) { hookSelIds = []; }
            hookSelIds = hookSelIds.filter(function(id) { return dramaChars.some(function(c) { return c.id === id; }); });
            let hookCandidates = dramaChars.filter(function(c) { return c.active; });

            hookCandidates.forEach(function(hc) {
                let curHook = (hc.hooks && hc.hooks.length) ? hc.hooks[0] : null;
                let onHook = hookSelIds.indexOf(hc.id) >= 0;
                let hookSubtitle = curHook ? ('▸ ' + (curHook.targetName === '__player__' ? 'the player' : (curHook.targetName || '?')) + ' · ' + curHook.pressureLevel + '% — ' + curHook.description) : '(no hook yet)';
                let hookBox: UIPart[] = [
                    { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px' }, content: [
                        { type: 'checkboxInput', label: '', initialValue: onHook, onChange: async function(val: boolean) {
                            let hCurRaw = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_WIZ_HOOK_CHARS, '') as string;
                            let hCurIds: string[] = [];
                            try { let hsp2 = JSON.parse(hCurRaw || '[]'); if (Array.isArray(hsp2)) hCurIds = hsp2.filter(Boolean); } catch (eHookSel2) { hCurIds = []; }
                            if (val && hCurIds.indexOf(hc.id) < 0) hCurIds.push(hc.id);
                            else if (!val) hCurIds = hCurIds.filter(function(x) { return x !== hc.id; });
                            await api.v1.tempStorage.set(STORAGE_WIZ_HOOK_CHARS, JSON.stringify(hCurIds));
                            await redraw();
                        } } as UIPart,
                        { type: 'text', text: (hc.isProtagonist ? '★ ' : '') + hc.name, style: { flex: '1 1 0', fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 'bold' } },
                        { type: 'button', text: '⚡ Reseed', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '10px', padding: '3px 8px' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                            api.v1.ui.toast('Seeding hook for ' + hc.name + '…', { id: 'wiz-hook1', autoClose: false, type: 'info' });
                            let hOk = await runWizardHookSingle(hc.id, dEffIds, '');
                            api.v1.ui.toast(hOk ? ('Hook seeded for ' + hc.name + '.') : 'No clean tension found.', { id: 'wiz-hook1', type: hOk ? 'success' : 'warning', autoClose: 2500 });
                            await redraw();
                        } }
                    ] },
                    { type: 'text', text: hookSubtitle, style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: curHook ? '0.8' : '0.4', fontStyle: curHook ? 'normal' : 'italic', marginTop: '2px', lineHeight: '1.3' } }
                ];
                if (curHook) {
                    hookBox.push({ type: 'button', text: '✕ Clear hook', style: { margin: '3px 0 0 0', fontSize: '9px', padding: '2px 6px', backgroundColor: 'transparent', color: '#ff6b6b', opacity: '0.85' }, callback: async function() {
                        let fh = await loadCharacter(hc.id);
                        if (fh) { fh.hooks = []; await saveCharacter(fh); }
                        await redraw();
                    } });
                }
                parts.push({ type: 'box', style: { backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)', padding: '7px', borderRadius: '5px', marginBottom: '5px' }, content: hookBox });
            });

            if (hookCandidates.length > 0) {
                parts.push({ type: 'button', text: '⚡ Seed hooks for checked characters', style: { width: '100%', margin: '2px 0 16px 0', fontSize: '11px', fontWeight: 'bold', backgroundColor: 'rgba(136,204,255,0.15)', color: '#88ccff' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                    let hbRaw = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_WIZ_HOOK_CHARS, '') as string;
                    let hbIds: string[] = [];
                    try { let hsp3 = JSON.parse(hbRaw || '[]'); if (Array.isArray(hsp3)) hbIds = hsp3.filter(Boolean); } catch (eHookSel3) { hbIds = []; }
                    if (hbIds.length === 0) { api.v1.ui.toast('Check at least one character first.', { type: 'info', autoClose: 2000 }); return; }
                    api.v1.ui.toast('Seeding ' + hbIds.length + ' hook(s)…', { id: 'wiz-hooks', autoClose: false, type: 'info' });
                    let hbMade = await runWizardHooksBatch(hbIds, dEffIds);
                    api.v1.ui.toast(hbMade > 0 ? ('Seeded ' + hbMade + ' hook(s).') : 'No clean tensions found.', { id: 'wiz-hooks', type: hbMade > 0 ? 'success' : 'warning', autoClose: 2500 });
                    await redraw();
                } });
            }

            // ===== 2. NPC WEB =====
            parts.push({ type: 'text', text: '🕸 NPC Web', style: { fontWeight: 'bold', fontSize: '13px', marginTop: '4px', marginBottom: '3px', color: '#88ccff' } });
            parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Bilateral dynamics between cast members. Generated pairs are mapped to real characters; self-pairs and duplicates are skipped.', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.55', marginBottom: '6px' } });

            let webCountKey = STORAGE_WIZ_GEN_COUNT + 'web';
            let webCountDraft = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(webCountKey, 3) as number;
            parts.push({ type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px', marginBottom: '8px' }, content: [
                { type: 'text', text: 'How many:', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.7', flexShrink: '0' } },
                { type: 'numberInput', initialValue: webCountDraft, style: { width: '64px', margin: 0 }, onChange: async function(v: number) { await api.v1.tempStorage.set(webCountKey, Math.max(1, Math.min(12, v || 1))); } },
                { type: 'button', text: '⚡ Generate', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(136,204,255,0.15)', color: '#88ccff' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                    if (dramaChars.length < 2) { api.v1.ui.toast('Need at least two characters.', { type: 'error', autoClose: 2000 }); return; }
                    let wn = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(webCountKey, 3) as number;
                    api.v1.ui.toast('Generating ' + wn + ' web dynamic(s)…', { id: 'wiz-web', autoClose: false, type: 'info' });
                    let wMade = await runWizardWebBatch(wn, dEffIds);
                    api.v1.ui.toast(wMade > 0 ? ('Added ' + wMade + ' web link(s).') : 'No new links resolved.', { id: 'wiz-web', type: wMade > 0 ? 'success' : 'warning', autoClose: 2500 });
                    await redraw();
                } }
            ] });

            let dramaWeb = await loadNpcWeb();
            if (dramaWeb.length === 0) {
                parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'No web links yet.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.4', fontStyle: 'italic', marginBottom: '14px' } });
            } else {
                dramaWeb.forEach(function(wl) {
                    let wlA = dramaChars.find(function(c) { return c.id === wl.charA_id; });
                    let wlB = dramaChars.find(function(c) { return c.id === wl.charB_id; });
                    let wlHintKey = STORAGE_WIZ_ITEM_HINT + wl.id;
                    parts.push({ type: 'box', style: { backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)', padding: '7px', borderRadius: '5px', marginBottom: '5px' }, content: [
                        { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '4px', marginBottom: '3px' }, content: [
                            { type: 'text', text: (wlA ? wlA.name : '?') + ' ⇄ ' + (wlB ? wlB.name : '?'), style: { flex: '1 1 0', fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 'bold', color: '#88ccff' } },
                            { type: 'text', text: wl.priority + '%', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.6' } },
                            { type: 'button', iconId: 'trash', style: { margin: 0, padding: '2px' }, callback: async function() {
                                let wFresh = await loadNpcWeb();
                                let wIdx = wFresh.findIndex(function(x) { return x.id === wl.id; });
                                if (wIdx >= 0) { wFresh.splice(wIdx, 1); await saveNpcWeb(wFresh); }
                                await redraw();
                            } }
                        ] },
                        { type: 'text', text: wl.dynamic || '(no dynamic yet)', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: wl.dynamic ? '0.85' : '0.4', fontStyle: wl.dynamic ? 'normal' : 'italic', lineHeight: '1.3', marginBottom: '4px' } },
                        { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '4px' }, content: [
                            { type: 'textInput', placeholder: 'Regen hint (optional)', initialValue: '', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '10px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { await api.v1.tempStorage.set(wlHintKey, v); } },
                            { type: 'button', text: '⚡ Regen', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '10px', padding: '3px 8px' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                                let wHint = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(wlHintKey, '') as string;
                                api.v1.ui.toast('Regenerating dynamic…', { id: 'wiz-webreg', autoClose: false, type: 'info' });
                                let wr = await regenerateWebLink(wl.id, dEffIds, wHint);
                                api.v1.ui.toast(wr ? 'Dynamic updated.' : 'Regeneration failed.', { id: 'wiz-webreg', type: wr ? 'success' : 'error', autoClose: 2000 });
                                await redraw();
                            } }
                        ] }
                    ] });
                });
                parts.push({ type: 'box', style: { marginBottom: '14px' }, content: [] });
            }

            // ===== 3. NARRATIVE THREADS =====
            parts.push({ type: 'text', text: '📜 Narrative Threads', style: { fontWeight: 'bold', fontSize: '13px', marginTop: '4px', marginBottom: '3px', color: '#ffb432' } });
            parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Opening plot threads (quests, mysteries, obligations). Created at the top level — nest and re-state them in the sidebar Drama tab afterward.', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.55', marginBottom: '6px' } });

            let narrCountKey = STORAGE_WIZ_GEN_COUNT + 'narrative';
            let narrCountDraft = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(narrCountKey, 3) as number;
            parts.push({ type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px', marginBottom: '8px' }, content: [
                { type: 'text', text: 'How many:', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.7', flexShrink: '0' } },
                { type: 'numberInput', initialValue: narrCountDraft, style: { width: '64px', margin: 0 }, onChange: async function(v: number) { await api.v1.tempStorage.set(narrCountKey, Math.max(1, Math.min(12, v || 1))); } },
                { type: 'button', text: '⚡ Generate', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,180,50,0.15)', color: '#ffb432' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                    let nn = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(narrCountKey, 3) as number;
                    api.v1.ui.toast('Generating ' + nn + ' thread(s)…', { id: 'wiz-narr', autoClose: false, type: 'info' });
                    let nMade = await runWizardNarrativesBatch(nn, dEffIds);
                    api.v1.ui.toast(nMade > 0 ? ('Created ' + nMade + ' thread(s).') : 'Generation failed.', { id: 'wiz-narr', type: nMade > 0 ? 'success' : 'error', autoClose: 2500 });
                    await redraw();
                } }
            ] });

            parts.push({ type: 'button', text: '+ Add blank thread', style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '8px', fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.85' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                await addBlankWizardNarrative();
                await redraw();
            } });

            let dramaNarrIdx = await loadEntityIndex();
            let dramaNarratives = dramaNarrIdx.filter(function(n) { return n.type === 'narrative' && (n.narrativeParentId || null) === null; });
            if (dramaNarratives.length === 0) {
                parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'No top-level threads yet.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.4', fontStyle: 'italic' } });
            } else {
                dramaNarratives.forEach(function(nm) {
                    let nStateEmoji = nm.storyState === 'active' ? '🔥' : (nm.storyState === 'completed' ? '✅' : '🔒');
                    let nHintKey = STORAGE_WIZ_ITEM_HINT + nm.id;
                    parts.push({ type: 'box', style: { backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)', padding: '7px', borderRadius: '5px', marginBottom: '5px' }, content: [
                        { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px', marginBottom: '3px' }, content: [
                            { type: 'text', text: nStateEmoji, style: { fontSize: '12px' } },
                            { type: 'textInput', initialValue: nm.name, style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 'bold' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { let nf = await loadEntity(nm.id); if (nf) { nf.name = v; await saveEntity(nf); } } },
                            { type: 'button', iconId: 'edit', style: { margin: 0, padding: '2px' }, callback: async function() { await openEntityEditModal(nm.id); } },
                            { type: 'button', iconId: 'trash', style: { margin: 0, padding: '2px' }, callback: async function() {
                                await deleteEntity(nm.id);
                                await redraw();
                            } }
                        ] },
                        { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '4px' }, content: [
                            { type: 'textInput', placeholder: 'Regen hint (optional)', initialValue: '', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '10px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { await api.v1.tempStorage.set(nHintKey, v); } },
                            { type: 'button', text: '⚡ Regen', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '10px', padding: '3px 8px' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                                let nHint = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(nHintKey, '') as string;
                                api.v1.ui.toast('Regenerating “' + nm.name + '”…', { id: 'wiz-narrreg', autoClose: false, type: 'info' });
                                let nr = await regenerateNarrativeThread(nm.id, dEffIds, nHint);
                                api.v1.ui.toast(nr ? ('Updated “' + nm.name + '”.') : 'Regeneration failed.', { id: 'wiz-narrreg', type: nr ? 'success' : 'error', autoClose: 2000 });
                                await redraw();
                            } }
                        ] }
                    ] });
                });
            }

        } else if (activeTab === 'intro') {
            // ── INTRO / OPENING (unified location picker, generate & insert) ──
            // [v0.9.86] Cast presence removed — set character locations in their character cards.
            let ikind = 'intro';
            let introLocId = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_WIZ_INTRO_LOC, '') as string;
            let introLocEnt = introLocId ? await loadEntity(introLocId) : null;
            if (introLocId && !introLocEnt) { introLocId = ''; await api.v1.tempStorage.set(STORAGE_WIZ_INTRO_LOC, ''); }

            parts.push({ type: 'text', text: '🎬 Opening scene', style: { fontWeight: 'bold', fontSize: '13px', marginBottom: '2px' } });
            parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Choose the opening location and brainstorming context, then generate a draft opening. Review, edit, or regenerate it below before committing it into the story. Set which characters are present via their character cards.', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.55', marginBottom: '10px' } });

            // Location: unified picker button.
            parts.push({ type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '8px', marginBottom: '10px' }, content: [
                { type: 'text', text: '📍 Location:', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.7', flexShrink: '0' } },
                { type: 'button',
                  text: introLocEnt ? introLocEnt.name : 'Pick location…',
                  style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', textAlign: 'left',
                           backgroundColor: introLocEnt ? 'rgba(136,204,255,0.15)' : 'transparent',
                           color: introLocEnt ? '#88ccff' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.5)',
                           border: '1px solid ' + (introLocEnt ? '#88ccff' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.2)') },
                  callback: async function() {
                    let iLocIdx = (await loadEntityIndex()).filter(function(m) { return m.type === 'location'; });
                    let curILocId = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_WIZ_INTRO_LOC, '') as string;
                    await openPickerModal({
                        title: 'Intro location',
                        items: iLocIdx,
                        getId:       function(m) { return m.id; },
                        getLabel:    function(m) { return m.name; },
                        getIcon:     function(m) { return m.icon || '📍'; },
                        getSublabel: function(m) {
                            if (!m.parentId) return 'top-level';
                            let par = iLocIdx.find(function(x) { return x.id === m.parentId; });
                            return par ? ('in ' + par.name) : '';
                        },
                        selectedId:    curILocId || undefined,
                        emptyText:     'No locations yet — build some in the Locations tab first.',
                        pinnedOptions: curILocId ? [{ id: '__clear__', label: 'Clear selection', icon: '✕', onSelect: async function() { await api.v1.tempStorage.set(STORAGE_WIZ_INTRO_LOC, ''); await redraw(); } }] : [],
                        onSelect: async function(lm) { await api.v1.tempStorage.set(STORAGE_WIZ_INTRO_LOC, lm.id); await redraw(); }
                    });
                  } } as UIPart
            ] });

            // Context sources (multi-select checkboxes).
            let iSrcKey = STORAGE_WIZ_TAB_SRC + ikind;
            let iStoredRaw = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(iSrcKey, '') as string;
            let iStoredIds: string[] = [];
            try { let ipj = JSON.parse(iStoredRaw || '[]'); if (Array.isArray(ipj)) iStoredIds = ipj.filter(Boolean); } catch (eISrc) { iStoredIds = []; }
            iStoredIds = iStoredIds.filter(function(id) { return (chats.some(function(c) { return c.id === id; }) || ceEntries.some(function(e) { return e.id === id; })); });
            let iEffIds = iStoredIds.length ? iStoredIds : (active ? [active.id] : []);
            parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Context sources' + (iStoredIds.length ? '' : (active ? ' — using “' + active.title + '”' : ' — project concept only')) + ':', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.7', marginBottom: '2px' } });
            if (chats.length > 0) {
                chats.forEach(function(pc) {
                    let onSrc = iStoredIds.indexOf(pc.id) >= 0;
                    parts.push({ type: 'checkboxInput', label: pc.title, initialValue: onSrc, onChange: async function(val: boolean) {
                        let curRaw = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(iSrcKey, '') as string;
                        let curIds: string[] = [];
                        try { let ipj2 = JSON.parse(curRaw || '[]'); if (Array.isArray(ipj2)) curIds = ipj2.filter(Boolean); } catch (eISrc2) { curIds = []; }
                        if (val && curIds.indexOf(pc.id) < 0) curIds.push(pc.id);
                        else if (!val) curIds = curIds.filter(function(x) { return x !== pc.id; });
                        await api.v1.tempStorage.set(iSrcKey, JSON.stringify(curIds));
                        await redraw();
                    } } as UIPart);
                });
            }
            _wizCeSourceCheckboxParts(ceEntries, iStoredIds, iSrcKey, redraw).forEach(function(ccp) { parts.push(ccp); });

            // [v1.6.3 INTRO-STAGE] Staged workflow: generate a draft, review / edit / regenerate
            // it in-tab, then commit into the story — matching the other wizard tabs.
            let introDraft = await loadIntroDraft();
            let introHasDraft = !!(introDraft && ((introDraft.prose || '') as string).trim());

            parts.push({ type: 'button', text: introHasDraft ? '🔄 Regenerate opening draft' : '🎬 Generate opening draft', style: { width: '100%', margin: '10px 0 0 0', fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 'bold', backgroundColor: 'rgba(136,204,255,0.18)', color: '#88ccff' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                let locPick = await api.v1.tempStorage.getOrDefault(STORAGE_WIZ_INTRO_LOC, '') as string;
                if (!locPick) { api.v1.ui.toast('Pick an intro location first.', { type: 'error', autoClose: 2500 }); return; }
                api.v1.ui.toast('Writing the opening…', { id: 'wiz-intro', autoClose: false, type: 'info' });
                let okGen = await generateIntroDraft(locPick, iEffIds);
                api.v1.ui.toast(okGen ? 'Draft ready — review and edit below.' : 'Intro generation failed.', { id: 'wiz-intro', type: okGen ? 'success' : 'error', autoClose: 3000 });
                await redraw();
            } });

            if (introHasDraft) {
                parts.push({ type: 'text', text: '📝 Draft opening — edit freely, then commit:', style: { fontSize: '11px', fontWeight: 'bold', marginTop: '12px', marginBottom: '4px', color: '#88ccff' } });
                parts.push({ type: 'multilineTextInput', initialValue: String(introDraft.prose || ''), placeholder: 'The opening prose\u2026', style: { minHeight: wizTextareaHeight(String(introDraft.prose || ''), 160, 420), fontSize: '12px', lineHeight: '1.5' }, onChange: async function(v: string) {
                    let cur = await loadIntroDraft();
                    if (!cur || typeof cur !== 'object') cur = { locationId: '', prose: '' };
                    cur.prose = v;
                    await api.v1.storyStorage.set(STORAGE_WIZ_INTRO_DRAFT, JSON.stringify(cur)).catch(function() {});
                } } as UIPart);
                parts.push({ type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px', marginTop: '8px' }, content: [
                    { type: 'button', text: '\u2705 Commit to story', style: { flex: '2 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 'bold', backgroundColor: 'rgba(126,200,160,0.22)', color: '#7ec8a0', border: '1px solid rgba(126,200,160,0.5)' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                        api.v1.ui.toast('Inserting the opening\u2026', { id: 'wiz-intro-commit', autoClose: false, type: 'info' });
                        let okC = await commitIntroDraft();
                        api.v1.ui.toast(okC ? 'Opening inserted into the story.' : 'Commit failed.', { id: 'wiz-intro-commit', type: okC ? 'success' : 'error', autoClose: 3000 });
                        await redraw();
                    } },
                    { type: 'button', text: '\ud83d\uddd1 Discard', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', color: '#ff6b6b', backgroundColor: 'transparent', border: '1px solid rgba(255,107,107,0.3)' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                        await api.v1.storyStorage.remove(STORAGE_WIZ_INTRO_DRAFT).catch(function() {});
                        await api.v1.tempStorage.remove(STORAGE_WIZ_INTRO_DRAFT).catch(function() {});
                        api.v1.ui.toast('Draft discarded.', { type: 'info', autoClose: 1800 });
                        await redraw();
                    } }
                ] });
            }
        } else if (activeTab === 'help') {
            // ── HELP & RULES [v0.9.8.3] [v1.24.0 CLEANUP] Four Fs / resolution bands / Test
            // Roller moved to Action Studio's Help popup (openActionStudioHelp) — that's
            // where the mechanic is actually being authored. Icon Library stays here as a
            // build-time reference. ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
            parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Looking for the Four Fs, resolution bands, or a test roller? See Action Studio → Help.', style: { fontSize: '12px', opacity: '0.75', lineHeight: '1.5', marginBottom: '10px' } });

            // — Icon Library —
            let iconIds: string[] = ['play','pause','save','download','upload','edit','delete','trash','add','plus','settings','info','warning','error','alert','success','check','home','user','search','refresh','reload','copy','eye','eye-off','hide','show','lock','unlock','mail','email','file','folder','image','code','send','close','x','chevron-right','chevron-left','chevron-up','chevron-down','right','left','up','down','list','grid','star','heart','favorite','filter','calendar','clock','time','zap','lightning','square','hexagon','help','trending-up','trending-down','file-minus','file-plus','file-text','folder-plus','folder-minus','activity','alertOctagon','alertTriangle','align-center','align-justify','align-left','align-right','anchor','archive','arrow-down','arrow-down-circle','arrow-down-left','arrow-down-right','arrow-left','arrow-left-circle','arrow-right','arrow-right-circle','arrow-up','arrow-up-circle','arrow-up-left','arrow-up-right','at-sign','award','bar-chart','bar-chart-2','battery','batteryCharging','bell','bell-off','bold','book','bookOpen','bookmark','box','breifcase','camera','cameraOff','check-circle','check-square','chevrons-down','chevrons-left','chevrons-right','chevrons-up','circle','clipboard','cloud','cloud-drizzle','cloud-lightning','cloud-off','cloud-rain','cloud-snow','coffee','columns','command','compass','corner-down-left','corner-down-right','corner-left-down','corner-left-up','corner-right-down','corner-right-up','corner-up-left','corner-up-right','cpu','crop','crosshair','database','disc','divide','divide-circle','divide-square','dollar-sign','download-cloud','droplet','edit-2','edit-3','external-link','fast-forward','feather','film','flag','frown','gift','globe','hard-drive','hash','headphones','help-circle','inbox','italic','key','layers','layout','life-buoy','link','link-2','loader','login','logout','map','map-pin','maximize','maximize-2','meh','menu','message-circle','message-square','mic','mic-off','minimize','minimize-2','minus','minus-circle','minus-square','monitor','moon','more-horizontal','more-vertical','mouse-pointer','move','music','navigation-2','navigation','octagon','package','paperclip','pause-circle','pen-tool','percent','phone','pie-chart','play-circle','plus-circle','plus-square','pocket','power','printer','radio','refresh-cw','refresh-ccw','repeat','rewind','rotate-ccw','rotate-cw','rss','scissors','server','share','share-2','shield','shield-off','shopping-bag','shopping-cart','shuffle','sidebar','skip-back','skip-forward','slash','sliders','smartphone','smile','speaker','stop-circle','sun','sunrise','sunset','tablet','tag','target','terminal','thermometer','thumbs-down','thumbs-up','toggle-left','toggle-right','tool','trash-2','triangle','truck','tv','type','x-square','x-octagon','zap-off','zoom-in','zoom-out'];
            let iconBtns: UIPart[] = iconIds.map(function(ic) {
                return { type: 'button', iconId: ic as any, text: ic, style: { margin: '2px', fontSize: '10px', padding: '3px 7px', textAlign: 'left', backgroundColor: 'transparent', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', borderRadius: '4px', opacity: '0.8' }, callback: async function() {} } as UIPart;
            });
            parts.push({ type: 'collapsibleSection', title: 'Icon Library (' + iconIds.length + ' icons)', iconId: 'grid', initialCollapsed: true, storageKey: 'temp:wiz_help_icons', content: [
                { type: 'text', text: 'All Feather icons available via the NAI iconId enum. Use these string values for iconId on tabs, buttons, and collapsible sections.', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.6', marginBottom: '8px' } },
                { type: 'row', style: { flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: '2px' }, content: iconBtns }
            ] as any });
        }
        return parts;
    }

    let initialContent = await buildWizardContent();
    pm = await openEngineModal({ id: 'ae-wizard', title: 'World-Build Wizard', size: 'large', content: initialContent });
}

// [v1.13.0 FACRES-REORG, HISTORICAL] Factions Manager workspace. Was: faction list plus
// per-faction editable Faction Resource amounts plus a player-faction picker. [CE-STRIP
// v2.0.x] Both the Resources amounts and the picker are gone (data model removed for
// the former, Holding Document removed for the latter — see the removal notes inside
// the function). What's actually left, current: the faction list itself (name /
// description / relationship states / lorebook), full CRUD, nothing else.
async function buildFactionsWorkspace(): Promise<UIPart[]> {
    const cfg = await loadConfig();
    const parts: UIPart[] = [];

    // [REMOVED v2.30.0] Was an intro line describing the Holding Document and the
    // player-faction picker — both already CE-STRIPped (see the removal note right
    // below, which predates this cleanup and was never reflected up here). Nothing
    // below this point renders either of those things; the accurate description is
    // the "Define factions..." line a few lines down, which stays.

    // [CE-STRIP v2.0.x] Holding Document authoring + player-faction picker removed — Holding cut.

    // [CE-STRIP v2.0.x] Faction Resources schema/values removed — data model already gone.

    parts.push({ type: 'text', text: `⚔️ Factions (${(cfg.factions || []).length})`, style: { fontWeight: 'bold', fontSize: '13px', marginBottom: '6px', color: '#e8a87c' } } as UIPart);
    parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Define factions and their relationship tracks. Each character\'s standing with a faction is set from their own Edit Profile screen.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.6', marginBottom: '8px' } } as UIPart);

    for (let fci = 0; fci < (cfg.factions || []).length; fci++) {
        const fac = cfg.factions[fci];
        const captFci = fci; const captFacId = fac.id;

        const tmpFacKey = `wb_tmp_fac_${captFacId}`;
        const facLbContent: UIPart[] = [];
        if (fac.lorebookEntryId) {
            facLbContent.push(
                { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '6px', marginBottom: '6px' }, content: [{ type: 'text', text: '✓ Lorebook entry linked', style: { fontSize: '12px', color: '#7ec8a0', flex: '1 1 0' } }] },
                { type: 'text', text: `Keys: ${getFactionLorebookKeys(fac).join(', ')}`, style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.55', marginBottom: '8px' } },
                { type: 'row', style: { gap: '6px' }, content: [
                    { type: 'button', text: 'Sync Static Core', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(126,200,160,0.1)', border: '1px solid rgba(126,200,160,0.3)' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() { await syncFactionLorebookEntry(captFacId); } },
                    { type: 'button', text: 'Unlink', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: async function() { await unlinkFactionLorebookEntry(captFacId); await refreshSidebar(); } }
                ] }
            );
        } else {
            facLbContent.push(
                { type: 'text', text: "No lorebook entry. Create one to inject this faction's profile.", style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.6', marginBottom: '8px' } },
                { type: 'button', text: '+ Create & Link Lorebook Entry', style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '8px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(136,204,255,0.1)', border: '1px solid rgba(136,204,255,0.3)' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() { await createLinkedFactionLorebookEntry(captFacId); await refreshSidebar(); } }
            );
        }
        facLbContent.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Trigger Keys:', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.6', marginTop: '12px', marginBottom: '4px' } });
        (fac.lorebookTags || []).forEach(function(tg, ti) {
            facLbContent.push({ type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '4px', marginBottom: '2px' }, content: [
                { type: 'text', text: '• ' + tg, style: { flex: '1 1 0', fontSize: '12px' } },
                { type: 'button', iconId: 'x', style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '10px' }, callback: async function() { await mutConfig(function(c) { c.factions[captFci].lorebookTags!.splice(ti, 1); }); await refreshSidebar(); } }
            ] } as UIPart);
        });
        facLbContent.push({ type: 'row', style: { gap: '4px' }, content: [
            { type: 'textInput', placeholder: 'Add key...', storageKey: `temp:${tmpFacKey}`, style: { flex: '1 1 0' } },
            { type: 'button', iconId: 'plus', style: { margin: 0 }, callback: async function() { const v = await api.v1.tempStorage.get(tmpFacKey) as string || ''; if (!v.trim()) return; await mutConfig(function(c) { if (!c.factions[captFci].lorebookTags) c.factions[captFci].lorebookTags = []; if (!c.factions[captFci].lorebookTags!.includes(v.trim())) c.factions[captFci].lorebookTags!.push(v.trim()); }); await api.v1.tempStorage.remove(tmpFacKey); await refreshSidebar(); } }
        ] });

        // [CE-STRIP v2.0.x] Faction Resources display removed — data model already gone.

        parts.push({ type: 'box', style: { padding: '8px', marginBottom: '6px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)', borderRadius: '4px', borderLeft: '3px solid #e8a87c' }, content: [
            { type: 'textInput', label: 'Name', initialValue: fac.name || '', onChange: async function(v: string) { await mutConfig(function(c) { c.factions[captFci].name = v; }); } },
            { type: 'multilineTextInput', label: 'Description', initialValue: fac.description || '', style: { minHeight: '40px', marginTop: '4px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { await mutConfig(function(c) { c.factions[captFci].description = v; }); } },
            { type: 'text', text: 'Relationship States (cold \u2192 warm):', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.6', marginTop: '4px', marginBottom: '2px' } },
            aeRenderIndexedStatesEditor(fac.relationshipStates || [], async function(next) { await mutConfig(function(c) { c.factions[captFci].relationshipStates = next; }); }, refreshSidebar, 'Standing'),
            { type: 'box', style: { borderTop: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', marginTop: '12px', paddingTop: '12px' }, content: facLbContent },
            { type: 'button', text: 'Delete Faction', style: { marginTop: '8px', fontSize: '11px', color: '#ff6b6b', backgroundColor: 'transparent', border: '1px solid rgba(255,107,107,0.3)' }, callback: async function() { await mutConfig(function(c) { const di = (c.factions || []).findIndex(function(x: any) { return x.id === captFacId; }); if (di >= 0) c.factions.splice(di, 1); }); await refreshSidebar(); } }
        ] } as UIPart);
    }
    if ((cfg.factions || []).length === 0) parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'No factions defined.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.5', marginBottom: '8px' } } as UIPart);
    parts.push({ type: 'button', text: '+ Add Faction', style: { marginTop: '4px', width: '100%', fontSize: '11px' }, callback: async function() { await mutConfig(function(c) { if (!c.factions) c.factions = []; c.factions.push({ id: 'fac_' + Date.now(), name: 'New Faction', description: '', relationshipStates: ['Hostile', 'Wary', 'Neutral', 'Friendly', 'Allied'], lorebookTags: [] }); }); await refreshSidebar(); } } as UIPart);

    return parts;
}

// [CE-STRIP v2.11.0] Merged workspace — World Settings, Factions, and System
// Settings used to be three separate destinations (two standalone modals plus
// its own shell workspace); all three are peer sections in one scrollable
// workspace now. Each sub-builder's own collapsibleSections are concatenated
