// [v0.9.22 E5] Intercepts direct player TA-box input and composes any pending
// player flavor into inputText before it is written to the story document.
// Only fires for actual player key-submissions; not triggered by generate().
api.v1.hooks.register('onTextAdventureInput', async function(params: any) {
    try {
        let taFlavor = await api.v1.tempStorage.get(STORAGE_PENDING_FLAVOR) as string | undefined;
        if (taFlavor && taFlavor.trim()) {
            await api.v1.tempStorage.remove(STORAGE_PENDING_FLAVOR);
            let taInput = String((params && params.inputText) || '');
            return { inputText: composeActionPrompt(taInput, taFlavor.trim()) };
        }
    } catch (_e) {}
});

// ============================================================================
// SECTION 27 — NATIVE TOOLBAR HUD (bridge-less interface)
// A toolbar tray whose five buttons each open a native modal rendering the same
// SceneStatePayload the bridge consumes. Gated by cfg.interfaceMode. Renderer-only:
// every verb is shared with the bridge. NAI has no dropdown UIPart, so the bridge's
// three side-by-side <select>s become full-width picker-buttons via openPickerModal.
// ============================================================================

// Persistent Goal & Approach composer state — mirrors the bridge _composer* vars
// so picks survive a modal reopen within a session.
var _aeNavGoal: string = '';
var _aeNavAttr: string | null = null;
var _aeNavStake: string | null = null;
var _aeNavStakeAuto: boolean = true;
var _aeNavTarget: string = 'none';
var _aeNavLuck: number = 0;
var _aeMapInspectId: string = '';   // [v0.9.9.5] native map "Looking at" inspected location id
var _aeNavInit: boolean = false;    // [v0.9.9.6] action composer defaults applied once (so 'No check' persists)

function aeRenderIndexedStatesEditor(states: string[], onChange: (next: string[]) => Promise<void>, refreshFn: () => Promise<void>, label: string): UIPart {
    // [RESTORED v2.1.4] Generic ordered string-list editor (states/stages/standings/
    // enum values/etc). Lost during an earlier Holding-block deletion even though it
    // had external callers outside Holding (Faction relationshipStates, Relationship
    // Archetype stages) — rebuilt from those call sites' usage shape; no copy of the
    // original implementation survived in any project file, so this is a fresh build,
    // not a restoration of the original source.
    const rows: UIPart[] = states.map(function(s, i) {
        return { type: 'row', alignment: 'center', style: { gap: '4px', marginBottom: '3px' }, content: [
            { type: 'textInput', initialValue: s, style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) {
                const next = states.slice(); next[i] = v; states = next; await onChange(next);
            } } as UIPart,
            { type: 'button', iconId: 'chevron-up', style: { margin: 0, padding: '2px 6px' }, disabled: i === 0, callback: async function() {
                if (i === 0) return;
                const next = states.slice(); const tmp = next[i - 1]; next[i - 1] = next[i]; next[i] = tmp;
                await onChange(next); await refreshFn();
            } } as UIPart,
            { type: 'button', iconId: 'chevron-down', style: { margin: 0, padding: '2px 6px' }, disabled: i === states.length - 1, callback: async function() {
                if (i === states.length - 1) return;
                const next = states.slice(); const tmp = next[i + 1]; next[i + 1] = next[i]; next[i] = tmp;
                await onChange(next); await refreshFn();
            } } as UIPart,
            { type: 'button', iconId: 'trash-2', style: { margin: 0, padding: '2px 6px', color: '#ff6b6b' }, callback: async function() {
                const next = states.slice(); next.splice(i, 1); await onChange(next); await refreshFn();
            } } as UIPart
        ] } as UIPart;
    });
    rows.push({ type: 'button', text: '+ Add ' + label, style: { fontSize: '10px', margin: 0, marginTop: '2px' }, callback: async function() {
        const next = states.slice(); next.push('New ' + label); await onChange(next); await refreshFn();
    } } as UIPart);
    return { type: 'column', style: { gap: '0', marginBottom: '6px' }, content: rows } as UIPart;
}

function _aeHudHeader(text: string): UIPart {
    return { type: 'text', text: text, style: { fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 'bold', color: '#7ec8a0', marginTop: '10px', marginBottom: '4px' } } as UIPart;
}
function _aeHudInfo(text: string): UIPart {
    return { type: 'text', text: text, style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.65', marginBottom: '6px', lineHeight: '1.4' } } as UIPart;
}
function _aeHudSub(text: string): UIPart {
    return { type: 'text', text: text, style: { fontSize: '11px', fontWeight: 'bold', opacity: '0.7', marginTop: '6px', marginBottom: '2px', color: '#a9d4f5' } } as UIPart;
}
function _aeHudRow(content: UIPart[]): UIPart {
    return { type: 'row', style: { gap: '5px', marginBottom: '4px', alignItems: 'stretch' }, content: content } as UIPart;
}
function _aeHudClose(handleGetter: () => any): UIPart {
    return { type: 'button', text: 'Close', style: { marginTop: '12px' }, callback: async function() {
        let h = handleGetter(); try { if (h && !h.isClosed()) await h.close(); } catch (e) {}
    } } as UIPart;
}

// Smart Stakes default: the StakeDef whose defaultForAttrs includes the attr tag
// (# normalized on both sides). Mirrors the bridge composer exactly.
function _aeDefaultStakeFor(state: any, attrTag: string | null): string {
    let tag = String(attrTag || '').replace(/^#/, '').toLowerCase();
    if (!tag) return '';
    let match = (state.stakeDefs || []).filter(function(sd: any) {
        return (sd.defaultForAttrs || []).some(function(a: string) { return String(a).replace(/^#/, '').toLowerCase() === tag; });
    })[0];
    return match ? match.id : '';
}

// ── SHARED INSPECT / ITEM / NARRATIVE HELPERS ──────────────────────────────
// [v0.9.9.7] Used by the character inspection view, the top-level Inspect modal,
// and the Player modal's Inventory/Quests tabs -- one render path for "a list of
// items" or "a list of narratives" everywhere they appear in the native HUD.

function _aePressureLabel(p: number): string {
    if (p < 25) return 'Latent';
    if (p < 60) return 'Building';
    if (p < 85) return 'Urgent';
    return 'Critical';
}

// One-line dramatis persona for a single character: "Name (species, age, role) — brief".
function _aeCharDramatis(char: any): string {
    let idParts = [char.species, char.age, char.occupationRole].filter(function(x: any) { return x && String(x).trim(); });
    let header = idParts.length ? (char.name + ' (' + idParts.join(', ') + ')') : char.name;
    let brief = (char.briefDescription && String(char.briefDescription).trim()) ? '  \u2014  ' + String(char.briefDescription).trim() : '';
    return header + brief;
}

// [v0.9.9.7] Shared action-instance executor for any entity-attached action button
// (Action tab, item rows, narrative rows). Resolves the live instance, detects
// whether it needs a target picker, and runs it -- same resolve path RUN_ACTION_INSTANCE
// uses. closeFn (if given) is called right before the action actually runs, matching
// the close-then-act pattern used elsewhere in the native HUD.
// [CE-STRIP v2.1.6] aeRunEntityAction() removed — actionInstances cut, no callers left.

// Active-hooks list content (caller wraps in one 'Active Hooks (N)' collapsibleSection).
function _aeHookRows(hooks: any[], charId: string, refreshFn: () => Promise<void>): UIPart[] {
    if (!hooks || hooks.length === 0) return [_aeHudInfo('No active hooks.')];
    return hooks.map(function(h: any) {
        let targetLabel = h.targetName === '__player__' ? 'Player' : (h.targetName || 'Unknown');
        return { type: 'box', style: { padding: '8px 10px', marginBottom: '6px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(217,138,138,0.08)', border: '1px solid rgba(217,138,138,0.25)', borderRadius: '6px' }, content: [
            { type: 'text', text: '\ud83e\ude9d ' + targetLabel, style: { fontSize: '11px', fontWeight: 'bold', marginBottom: '2px' } } as UIPart,
            { type: 'text', text: h.description || '', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.85', lineHeight: '1.4', marginBottom: '4px' } } as UIPart,
            { type: 'text', text: _aePressureLabel(h.pressureLevel) + '  (' + h.pressureLevel + ')', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.6', marginBottom: '4px' } } as UIPart,
            { type: 'button', text: 'Resolve Hook', iconId: 'check', style: { width: '100%', fontSize: '11px', margin: 0 }, callback: async function() { await resolveCharHook(charId, h.id); await refreshFn(); } } as UIPart
        ] } as UIPart;
    });
}

// One collapsibleSection per item, always defaults closed. Equip toggle only ever
// targets the item's own owner/parent -- ownerCharId is resolved by the caller
// (the character whose inventory this is, or undefined for ownerless location items,
// which hides the toggle since there is no parent entity to toggle to).
function _aeItemSection(items: any[], ownerCharId: string | undefined, refreshFn: () => Promise<void>): UIPart[] {
    return (items || []).map(function(item: any) {
        let body: UIPart[] = [];
        body.push({ type: 'text', text: item.description || 'No description.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.8', lineHeight: '1.4', marginBottom: '6px' } } as UIPart);
        let equipTarget = item.isEquipped ? (item.equippedToCharId || ownerCharId) : ownerCharId;
        if (equipTarget) {
            body.push({ type: 'button', text: item.isEquipped ? 'Equipped' : 'Equip', iconId: item.isEquipped ? 'check-circle' : 'package', style: { width: '100%', fontSize: '11px', marginBottom: '4px', backgroundColor: item.isEquipped ? 'rgba(126,200,160,0.15)' : undefined, color: item.isEquipped ? '#7ec8a0' : undefined }, callback: async function() { await setItemEquip(equipTarget, item.id, !item.isEquipped); await refreshFn(); } } as UIPart);
        }
        // [CE-STRIP v2.1.6] Per-entity actionInstances run-buttons removed — actionInstances cut.
        body.push({ type: 'button', text: 'Edit Entity', iconId: 'tool', style: { width: '100%', fontSize: '11px', marginTop: '2px', opacity: '0.75' }, callback: async function() { try { await openEntityEditModal(item.id); } catch (e) {} } } as UIPart);
        return { type: 'collapsibleSection', title: aeIconPfx(item.icon) + item.name, initialCollapsed: true, storageKey: 'temp:ae_item_' + item.id, content: body } as UIPart;
    });
}

// One collapsibleSection per narrative, always defaults closed. storyState, tracked
// toggle (same STORAGE_TRACKED_NARRATIVE flag the bridge uses), target destination
// and a due-date countdown (from eventDayTarget), entity-attached actions, and an
// edit-modal button. curAbsDay is the clock's current absolute day (loaded once by
// the caller so a long list doesn't reload the clock per row).
function _aeNarrativeSection(narrs: any[], curAbsDay: number, refreshFn: () => Promise<void>): UIPart[] {
    return (narrs || []).map(function(n: any) {
        let body: UIPart[] = [];
        let stateLabel = n.storyState === 'active' ? '\ud83d\udd25 Active' : n.storyState === 'completed' ? '\u2705 Completed' : '\ud83d\udd12 Locked';
        if (n.isTracked) stateLabel = '\ud83c\udfaf Tracked  \u00b7  ' + stateLabel;
        body.push({ type: 'text', text: stateLabel, style: { fontSize: '11px', fontWeight: 'bold', marginBottom: '4px', color: n.isTracked ? '#7ec8a0' : '#a8a8b8' } } as UIPart);
        if (n.description) body.push({ type: 'text', text: n.description, style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.8', lineHeight: '1.4', marginBottom: '6px' } } as UIPart);
        if (n.questTargetName) body.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Target:  ' + n.questTargetName, style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.7', marginBottom: '2px' } } as UIPart);
        if (typeof n.eventDayTarget === 'number') {
            let due = Math.floor(n.eventDayTarget) - curAbsDay;
            let dueStr = due > 1 ? (due + ' days remaining') : due === 1 ? '1 day remaining' : due === 0 ? 'due today' : ('overdue by ' + (-due) + (due === -1 ? ' day' : ' days'));
            body.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Due:  ' + dueStr, style: { fontSize: '11px', marginBottom: '6px', color: due < 0 ? '#d98a8a' : '#e8c07d' } } as UIPart);
        }
        // [CE-STRIP v2.0.0] "Track Quest" button (toggleNarrativeTracking) and per-instance
        // action-run buttons removed — quest-tracker + Actions cut. This panel still
        // displays narrative/quest entities read-only pending the full Narrative removal pass.
        body.push({ type: 'button', text: 'Edit Entity', iconId: 'tool', style: { width: '100%', fontSize: '11px', marginTop: '2px', opacity: '0.75' }, callback: async function() { try { await openEntityEditModal(n.id); } catch (e) {} } } as UIPart);
        return { type: 'collapsibleSection', title: aeIconPfx(n.icon) + n.name, initialCollapsed: true, storageKey: 'temp:ae_narr_' + n.id, content: body } as UIPart;
    });
}

// Personal (per-character) resource rows with inline +/- steppers -- adjustCharResource
// runs directly in-worker, so there is no round-trip latency native has an edge here.
function _aeResourceRows(charId: string, resources: any[], refreshFn: () => Promise<void>): UIPart[] {
    if (!resources || resources.length === 0) return [_aeHudInfo('No personal resources.')];
    return resources.map(function(r: any) {
        let valLabel: string;
        if (r.type === 'pool') valLabel = String(r.value) + (typeof r.max === 'number' ? ' / ' + r.max : '');
        else valLabel = (r.states && r.states[r.value]) ? r.states[r.value] : String(r.value);
        return _aeHudRow([
            { type: 'text', text: r.name, style: { flex: '1 1 0', fontSize: '12px', alignSelf: 'center' } } as UIPart,
            { type: 'button', text: '\u2212', style: { width: '30px', margin: 0 }, callback: async function() { await adjustCharResource(charId, r.tag, -1); await broadcastSceneState(); await refreshFn(); } } as UIPart,
            { type: 'text', text: valLabel, style: { width: '70px', fontSize: '11px', textAlign: 'center', alignSelf: 'center' } } as UIPart,
            { type: 'button', text: '+', style: { width: '30px', margin: 0 }, callback: async function() { await adjustCharResource(charId, r.tag, 1); await broadcastSceneState(); await refreshFn(); } } as UIPart
        ]);
    });
}

// ── MAP ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

// ── CALENDAR / CLOCK ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
async function openMapModal(): Promise<void> {
    let mapHandle: any = null;

    // Resolve the outbound edge (child / sibling / connection) for a destination id.
    // Parent (return trip) has no edge and is free.
    function _mapEdge(g: any, id: string): any {
        let all: any[] = ([] as any[]).concat(g.children || [], g.siblings || [], g.connections || []);
        return all.filter(function(e: any) { return e.id === id; })[0] || null;
    }
    // Human cost string: time first ("2h"), then resource ("5 currency").
    function _mapCost(edge: any): string {
        if (!edge) return '';
        let bits: string[] = [];
        if (edge.timeCost && edge.timeCost > 0) bits.push(edge.timeCost + 'h');
        if (edge.resourceCost && edge.resourceTag) bits.push(edge.resourceCost + ' ' + String(edge.resourceTag).replace('#', ''));
        return bits.join('  +  ');
    }

    async function renderMap() {
        let state: any = await getSceneState();
        let parts: UIPart[] = [];
        if (!state) {
            parts.push(_aeHudInfo('No scene state available.'));
            parts.push(_aeHudClose(function() { return mapHandle; }));
            try { if (mapHandle && !mapHandle.isClosed()) { await mapHandle.update({ content: parts }); return; } } catch (e) {}
            mapHandle = await openEngineModal({ id: 'ae-nav-map', title: 'Map', size: 'medium', content: parts });
            return;
        }
        let g: any = state.locationGraph || {};

        // Current location header + body + atmosphere.
        parts.push({ type: 'text', text: (g.currentIcon ? g.currentIcon + ' ' : '') + (state.locationName || 'Unknown location'), style: { fontSize: '15px', fontWeight: 'bold', marginBottom: '2px' } } as UIPart);
        if (state.locationDescription) parts.push({ type: 'text', text: state.locationDescription, style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.75', lineHeight: '1.4', marginBottom: '3px' } } as UIPart);
        if (state.locationAtmosphere) parts.push({ type: 'text', text: state.locationAtmosphere, style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.5', fontStyle: 'italic', marginBottom: '3px' } } as UIPart);

        // "Looking at" panel: the inspected destination, its cost, and the Travel /
        // Teleport actions. Sits directly under the current location so the buttons
        // have the full modal width and room for the cost line.
        if (_aeMapInspectId && _aeMapInspectId !== state.locationId) {
            let insEnt: any = null;
            try { insEnt = await loadEntity(_aeMapInspectId); } catch (eIns) { insEnt = null; }
            if (insEnt) {
                let panel: UIPart[] = [];
                panel.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Looking at', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.55', fontWeight: 'bold', marginBottom: '2px' } } as UIPart);
                panel.push({ type: 'text', text: aeIconPfx(insEnt.icon) + (insEnt.name || ''), style: { fontSize: '14px', fontWeight: 'bold', color: '#a9d4f5', marginBottom: '3px' } } as UIPart);
                panel.push({ type: 'text', text: insEnt.description || 'No description recorded.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.8', lineHeight: '1.4', marginBottom: '6px' } } as UIPart);
                // [CE-STRIP v2.0.0] Travel button (cost/gating) removed with Travel — Teleport
                // (direct reposition, no path/cost) is now the only move action.
                panel.push(_aeHudRow([
                    { type: 'button', text: 'Teleport', iconId: 'navigation', style: { flex: '1 1 0', fontSize: '12px', margin: 0, fontWeight: 'bold', backgroundColor: 'rgba(126,200,160,0.15)', color: '#7ec8a0', border: '1px solid #7ec8a0' }, callback: async function() {
                        let dest = _aeMapInspectId;
                        try { await commitTravel(dest, true); } catch (eTp) {}
                        _aeMapInspectId = '';
                        await renderMap();
                    } } as UIPart
                ]));
                parts.push({ type: 'box', style: { padding: '9px 11px', marginTop: '8px', marginBottom: '2px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(136,204,255,0.08)', border: '1px solid rgba(136,204,255,0.25)', borderRadius: '8px' }, content: panel } as UIPart);
            }
        }

        // Destination list: each location is a full-width name button that loads it
        // into the "Looking at" panel above. Grouped Above / Nearby / Inside.
        function navBtn(id: string, label: string, icon: any): UIPart {
            let sel = (_aeMapInspectId === id);
            return { type: 'button', text: aeIconPfx(icon) + label, iconId: 'eye', style: { width: '100%', textAlign: 'left', fontSize: '12px', marginBottom: '3px', backgroundColor: sel ? 'rgba(136,204,255,0.15)' : undefined, border: sel ? '1px solid rgba(136,204,255,0.4)' : undefined }, callback: async function() { _aeMapInspectId = id; await renderMap(); } } as UIPart;
        }

        parts.push(_aeHudHeader('Travel'));
        // [v1.19.0 LOCGEN] Anchored to state.locationId (the PLAYER's location), not
        // _aeMapInspectId (the "Looking at" selection) -- authoring is relative to
        // where you ARE, not what you're browsing. Mirrors the bridge Map tab's
        // "+ Location" button, which anchors the same way.
        parts.push({ type: 'button', text: '+ New Location', iconId: 'map-pin', style: { width: '100%', fontSize: '11px', marginBottom: '8px' }, callback: async function() { await openAddLocationModal(state.locationId, renderMap); } } as UIPart);
        let anyConn = false;

        if (g.parentId) {
            parts.push(_aeHudSub('Above'));
            parts.push(navBtn(g.parentId, g.parentName || 'Up one level', g.parentIcon));
            anyConn = true;
        }

        let nearby: any[] = [];
        (g.siblings || []).forEach(function(s: any) { nearby.push({ id: s.id, name: s.name, icon: s.icon }); });
        (g.connections || []).forEach(function(c: any) { nearby.push({ id: c.id, name: c.name + (c.label ? '  \u2014 ' + c.label : ''), icon: c.icon }); });
        if (nearby.length > 0) {
            parts.push(_aeHudSub('Nearby'));
            nearby.forEach(function(n: any) { parts.push(navBtn(n.id, n.name, n.icon)); });
            anyConn = true;
        }

        if ((g.children || []).length > 0) {
            parts.push(_aeHudSub('Inside'));
            (g.children || []).forEach(function(c: any) { parts.push(navBtn(c.id, c.name, c.icon)); });
            anyConn = true;
        }

        if (!anyConn) parts.push(_aeHudInfo('No connected locations.'));

        parts.push(_aeHudClose(function() { return mapHandle; }));
        try { if (mapHandle && !mapHandle.isClosed()) { await mapHandle.update({ content: parts }); return; } } catch (e) {}
        mapHandle = await openEngineModal({ id: 'ae-nav-map', title: 'Map', size: 'medium', content: parts });
    }
    await renderMap();
}

// ── INSPECT ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
async function openInspectModal(): Promise<void> {
    let insHandle: any = null;

    async function renderInspect() {
        let parts: UIPart[] = [];
        let state: any = await getSceneState();
        if (!state) {
            parts.push(_aeHudInfo('No scene state available.'));
            parts.push(_aeHudClose(function() { return insHandle; }));
            try { if (insHandle && !insHandle.isClosed()) { await insHandle.update({ content: parts }); return; } } catch (e) {}
            insHandle = await openEngineModal({ id: 'ae-nav-inspect', title: 'Inspect', size: 'medium', content: parts });
            return;
        }

        let chars = (state.presentCharacters || []).filter(function(c: any) { return !c.isProtagonist; });
        parts.push({ type: 'row', style: { alignItems: 'center', gap: '6px', marginTop: '4px', marginBottom: '2px' }, content: [
            { type: 'text', text: 'Characters', style: { flex: '1 1 0', fontWeight: 'bold', fontSize: '12px' } },
            { type: 'button', text: '\u27f3 Detect', iconId: 'refresh-cw', style: { flex: '0 0 auto', margin: 0, fontSize: '10px', padding: '3px 8px', opacity: '0.8' }, callback: async function() { await aeRefreshPresence(); await renderInspect(); } }
        ] } as UIPart);
        parts.push({ type: 'button', text: '+ Add Character to Scene', iconId: 'user-plus', style: { width: '100%', fontSize: '11px', marginBottom: '6px' }, callback: async function() {
            const acAll = await loadAllCharacters();
            const acPresent = new Set((state.presentCharacters || []).map(function(pc: any) { return pc.id; }));
            const acCands = acAll.filter(function(ac) { return ac.active && !ac.isProtagonist && !acPresent.has(ac.id); });
            // Pre-resolve each candidate's current location name for the picker sublabel.
            const acIdx = await loadEntityIndex();
            const acLocById: { [k: string]: string } = {};
            for (const ac of acCands) {
                let locName = 'no location';
                if (ac.entityId) {
                    let room = getEffectiveRoomId(ac.entityId, acIdx);
                    if (room) { let rn = acIdx.find(function(m) { return m.id === room; }); if (rn && rn.name) locName = rn.name; }
                }
                acLocById[ac.id] = locName;
            }
            await openPickerModal({
                title: 'Add Character to Scene',
                items: acCands,
                getId: function(it: any) { return it.id; },
                getLabel: function(it: any) { return it.name; },
                getSublabel: function(it: any) { return '\ud83d\udccd ' + (acLocById[it.id] || 'no location'); },
                searchable: true,
                emptyText: 'Everyone active is already here.',
                onSelect: async function(it: any) { await aeMoveCharToScene(it.id); await renderInspect(); }
            });
        } } as UIPart);
        parts.push({ type: 'button', text: '+ New Character Here', iconId: 'user-plus', style: { width: '100%', fontSize: '11px', marginBottom: '6px' }, callback: async function() { await openAddNpcModal(state.locationId, renderInspect); } } as UIPart);
        if (chars.length === 0) parts.push(_aeHudInfo('No one else is here.'));
        chars.forEach(function(c: any) {
            parts.push({ type: 'row', style: { gap: '4px', marginBottom: '3px', alignItems: 'center' }, content: [
                { type: 'button', text: c.name + (c.compressedLine ? '  \u2014  ' + c.compressedLine : ''), iconId: 'user', style: { flex: '1 1 0', textAlign: 'left', fontSize: '12px' }, callback: async function() { try { await openCharEditModal(c.id); } catch (e) {} } },
                { type: 'button', text: 'Exclude', style: { flex: '0 0 auto', margin: 0, fontSize: '10px', padding: '3px 7px', opacity: '0.8' }, callback: async function() { await aeSetCharScenePresent(c.id, false); await renderInspect(); } }
            ] } as UIPart);
        });

        // Items / narratives native to THIS location -- pulled from the same
        // buildEntityDetailPayload children the character inventory view uses, so
        // descriptions/actions/state are real instead of the old name-only buttons.
        let locEnt = state.locationId ? await loadEntity(state.locationId) : null;
        let locDetail = state.locationId ? await buildEntityDetailPayload(state.locationId, null, locEnt) : null;
        let locChildren = locDetail ? (locDetail.children || []) : [];
        let items = locChildren.filter(function(c: any) { return c.type === 'item'; });
        let narrs = locChildren.filter(function(c: any) { return c.type === 'narrative'; });

        parts.push(_aeHudHeader('Items (' + items.length + ')'));
        parts.push({ type: 'button', text: '+ Add Item Here', iconId: 'plus', style: { width: '100%', fontSize: '11px', marginBottom: '6px' }, callback: async function() { await openAddItemModal(state.locationId, renderInspect); } } as UIPart);
        if (items.length === 0) parts.push(_aeHudInfo('Nothing here.'));
        else parts.push.apply(parts, _aeItemSection(items, undefined, renderInspect));

        if (narrs.length > 0) {
            parts.push(_aeHudHeader('Narratives (' + narrs.length + ')'));
            parts.push.apply(parts, _aeNarrativeSection(narrs, 0, renderInspect)); // [CE-STRIP v2.0.x] Clock removed.
        }

        parts.push(_aeHudClose(function() { return insHandle; }));
        try { if (insHandle && !insHandle.isClosed()) { await insHandle.update({ content: parts }); return; } } catch (e) {}
        insHandle = await openEngineModal({ id: 'ae-nav-inspect', title: 'Inspect', size: 'medium', content: parts });
    }
    await renderInspect();
}

// ── ACTION (Goal & Approach) ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

// ── JOURNAL ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// [v1.7.0 JOURNAL] Native Player Journal UI. Opens from the Player modal. Renderer
// only — every verb lives in Section 10b so the bridge HUD can reuse them later.
// Draft text is held in module-level vars (updated via onChange, never mid-render)
// so re-rendering the modal after an action never clobbers what the user is typing.
var _aeJrnlEditingId: string | null = null;   // id of the bubble currently in edit mode
var _aeJrnlBusy: boolean = false;             // generation in flight (disables buttons)
var _aeJrnlShowArchived: boolean = false;     // archived list visibility toggle
var _aeJrnlCompose: string = '';              // draft for the "new entry" box
var _aeJrnlEditDraft: string = '';            // draft for the bubble being edited
async function openJournalModal(): Promise<void> {
    let jHandle: any = null;

    // Kick a rewrite/compress: seed edit mode, run story-aware generation, then load
    // the result into the edit draft for review. Never commits without an explicit Save.
    async function runJrnlGen(kind: string, b: JournalBubble): Promise<void> {
        if (_aeJrnlBusy) return;
        const srcText = (_aeJrnlEditingId === b.id) ? (_aeJrnlEditDraft || b.text) : b.text;
        _aeJrnlBusy = true; _aeJrnlEditingId = b.id;
        await renderJournal();
        let out: string | null = null;
        try { out = (kind === 'rewrite') ? await journalGenerateRewrite(srcText) : await journalGenerateCompress(srcText); }
        catch (e) { api.v1.error('[AE:hud] journal gen:', e); }
        _aeJrnlBusy = false;
        if (out) { _aeJrnlEditDraft = out; api.v1.ui.toast(kind === 'rewrite' ? 'Rewritten \u2014 review and Save.' : 'Compressed \u2014 review and Save.', { type: 'success' }); }
        else { api.v1.ui.toast('Generation failed or returned nothing.', { type: 'error' }); }
        await renderJournal();
    }

    function renderBubble(b: JournalBubble, isArchived: boolean, cfg: GlobalConfig): UIPart {
        const editing = _aeJrnlEditingId === b.id;
        const body: UIPart[] = [];

        // Header line: "Archived" tag only now — in-story stamps removed.
        if (isArchived) {
            body.push({ type: 'row', style: { marginBottom: '4px' }, content: [
                { type: 'text', text: 'Archived', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.6', flex: '1 1 0', alignSelf: 'center' } } as UIPart
            ] } as UIPart);
        }

        if (editing && _aeJrnlBusy) {
            body.push(_aeHudInfo('Working\u2026'));
        } else if (editing) {
            body.push({ type: 'multilineTextInput', initialValue: _aeJrnlEditDraft, placeholder: 'Edit this entry\u2026', onChange: function(v: string) { _aeJrnlEditDraft = v; }, style: { minHeight: '120px', marginBottom: '6px' } } as UIPart);
            body.push(_aeHudRow([
                { type: 'button', text: 'Save', iconId: 'save', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(126,200,160,0.15)', color: '#7ec8a0' }, callback: async function() { await journalUpdateBubble(b.id, _aeJrnlEditDraft); _aeJrnlEditingId = null; api.v1.ui.toast('Saved.', { type: 'success' }); await renderJournal(); } } as UIPart,
                { type: 'button', text: 'Cancel', iconId: 'x', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: async function() { _aeJrnlEditingId = null; await renderJournal(); } } as UIPart
            ]));
            body.push(_aeHudRow([
                { type: 'button', text: 'Rewrite', iconId: 'feather', disabled: _aeJrnlBusy, style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: function() { runJrnlGen('rewrite', b).catch(function(e) { api.v1.error('[AE:hud] jrnl rewrite:', e); }); } } as UIPart,
                { type: 'button', text: 'Compress', iconId: 'file-minus', disabled: _aeJrnlBusy, style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: function() { runJrnlGen('compress', b).catch(function(e) { api.v1.error('[AE:hud] jrnl compress:', e); }); } } as UIPart
            ]));
        } else {
            // Reading surface: grows with content, then scrolls — never squished/clipped.
            body.push({ type: 'box', style: { maxHeight: '240px', overflowY: 'auto', padding: '8px 10px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)', borderRadius: '6px', marginBottom: '6px' }, content: [
                { type: 'text', text: (b.text && b.text.trim()) ? b.text : '(empty)', noTemplate: true, style: { fontSize: '12px', lineHeight: '1.5', whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap', wordBreak: 'break-word' } } as UIPart
            ] } as UIPart);
            body.push(_aeHudRow([
                { type: 'button', text: 'Edit', iconId: 'edit-3', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: async function() { _aeJrnlEditDraft = b.text || ''; _aeJrnlEditingId = b.id; await renderJournal(); } } as UIPart,
                isArchived
                    ? { type: 'button', text: 'Unarchive', iconId: 'refresh', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: async function() { await journalSetArchived(b.id, false); api.v1.ui.toast('Restored to Always-On.', { type: 'success' }); await renderJournal(); } } as UIPart
                    : { type: 'button', text: 'Archive', iconId: 'archive', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: async function() { await journalSetArchived(b.id, true); api.v1.ui.toast('Archived \u2014 removed from context.', { type: 'success' }); await renderJournal(); } } as UIPart
            ]));
            body.push(_aeHudRow([
                { type: 'button', text: 'Rewrite', iconId: 'feather', disabled: _aeJrnlBusy, style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: function() { runJrnlGen('rewrite', b).catch(function(e) { api.v1.error('[AE:hud] jrnl rewrite:', e); }); } } as UIPart,
                { type: 'button', text: 'Compress', iconId: 'file-minus', disabled: _aeJrnlBusy, style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: function() { runJrnlGen('compress', b).catch(function(e) { api.v1.error('[AE:hud] jrnl compress:', e); }); } } as UIPart,
                { type: 'button', text: 'Delete', iconId: 'trash', disabled: _aeJrnlBusy, style: { flex: '0 0 auto', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', color: '#d98a8a' }, callback: async function() { await journalDeleteBubble(b.id); if (_aeJrnlEditingId === b.id) _aeJrnlEditingId = null; api.v1.ui.toast('Deleted.', { type: 'success' }); await renderJournal(); } } as UIPart
            ]));
        }

        return { type: 'box', style: { padding: '8px', marginBottom: '8px', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', borderRadius: '8px', opacity: isArchived ? '0.55' : '1', backgroundColor: isArchived ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.01)' : 'rgba(126,200,160,0.04)' }, content: body } as UIPart;
    }

    async function renderJournal(): Promise<void> {
        const state = await loadJournal();
        const cfg = await loadConfig();
        const active   = state.bubbles.filter(function(b) { return !b.archived; });
        const archived = state.bubbles.filter(function(b) { return b.archived; });
        const parts: UIPart[] = [];

        parts.push(_aeHudInfo('Your running record. Active entries stay Always-On in the lorebook as \u201CThe story so far\u201D, so they survive context. Archived entries are kept but never injected.'));

        // Compose new entry
        parts.push(_aeHudSub('New entry'));
        parts.push({ type: 'multilineTextInput', initialValue: _aeJrnlCompose, placeholder: 'Write what just happened\u2026', onChange: function(v: string) { _aeJrnlCompose = v; }, style: { minHeight: '80px', marginBottom: '6px' } } as UIPart);
        parts.push({ type: 'button', text: 'Add', iconId: 'plus', disabled: _aeJrnlBusy, style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: async function() {
            const txt = (_aeJrnlCompose || '').trim();
            if (!txt) { api.v1.ui.toast('Nothing to add.', { type: 'warning' }); return; }
            _aeJrnlCompose = '';
            await journalAddBubble(txt);
            api.v1.ui.toast('Added to journal.', { type: 'success' });
            await renderJournal();
        } } as UIPart);

        // Toolbar: merge-down + archived visibility
        const tools: UIPart[] = [];
        if (active.length > 1) {
            tools.push({ type: 'button', text: 'Merge all', iconId: 'chevrons-down', disabled: _aeJrnlBusy, style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: async function() {
                const n = active.length;
                await journalMergeDown();
                _aeJrnlEditingId = null;
                api.v1.ui.toast('Merged ' + n + ' entries into one.', { type: 'success' });
                await renderJournal();
            } } as UIPart);
        }
        if (archived.length > 0) {
            tools.push({ type: 'button', text: (_aeJrnlShowArchived ? 'Hide archived (' + archived.length + ')' : 'Show archived (' + archived.length + ')'), iconId: 'archive', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: async function() { _aeJrnlShowArchived = !_aeJrnlShowArchived; await renderJournal(); } } as UIPart);
        }
        if (tools.length > 0) parts.push(_aeHudRow(tools));

        // Active entries
        parts.push(_aeHudSub('Entries (' + active.length + ')'));
        if (active.length === 0) parts.push(_aeHudInfo('No entries yet. Add one above.'));
        else active.forEach(function(b) { parts.push(renderBubble(b, false, cfg)); });

        // Archived entries (optional)
        if (_aeJrnlShowArchived && archived.length > 0) {
            parts.push(_aeHudSub('Archived (' + archived.length + ')'));
            archived.forEach(function(b) { parts.push(renderBubble(b, true, cfg)); });
        }

        parts.push(_aeHudClose(function() { return jHandle; }));
        try { if (jHandle && !jHandle.isClosed()) { await jHandle.update({ content: parts }); return; } } catch (e) {}
        jHandle = await openEngineModal({ id: 'ae-nav-journal', title: 'Journal', size: 'medium', content: parts });
    }

    await renderJournal();
}

// [v2.12.0 CHARJOURNAL] Per-character journal — same interaction model as
// openJournalModal above (compose/edit/archive/merge/rewrite/compress), scoped to
// one character. Own module-level draft vars so opening a character journal never
// clobbers a still-open main journal's draft state.
var _aeCJrnlEditingId: string | null = null;
var _aeCJrnlBusy: boolean = false;
var _aeCJrnlShowArchived: boolean = false;
var _aeCJrnlCompose: string = '';
var _aeCJrnlEditDraft: string = '';

async function openCharJournalModal(charId: string): Promise<void> {
    let cjHandle: any = null;
    const char = await loadCharacter(charId);
    const charName = char ? char.name : 'Character';

    async function runCJrnlGen(kind: string, b: CharJournalBubble): Promise<void> {
        if (_aeCJrnlBusy) return;
        const srcText = (_aeCJrnlEditingId === b.id) ? (_aeCJrnlEditDraft || b.text) : b.text;
        _aeCJrnlBusy = true; _aeCJrnlEditingId = b.id;
        await renderCharJournal();
        let out: string | null = null;
        try { out = (kind === 'rewrite') ? await journalGenerateRewrite(srcText) : await journalGenerateCompress(srcText); }
        catch (e) { api.v1.error('[AE:hud] char journal gen:', e); }
        _aeCJrnlBusy = false;
        if (out) { _aeCJrnlEditDraft = out; api.v1.ui.toast(kind === 'rewrite' ? 'Rewritten \u2014 review and Save.' : 'Compressed \u2014 review and Save.', { type: 'success' }); }
        else { api.v1.ui.toast('Generation failed or returned nothing.', { type: 'error' }); }
        await renderCharJournal();
    }

    function renderCJBubble(b: CharJournalBubble, isArchived: boolean): UIPart {
        const editing = _aeCJrnlEditingId === b.id;
        const body: UIPart[] = [];

        if (isArchived) {
            body.push({ type: 'row', style: { marginBottom: '4px' }, content: [
                { type: 'text', text: 'Archived', style: { fontSize: '10px', opacity: '0.6', flex: '1 1 0', alignSelf: 'center' } } as UIPart
            ] } as UIPart);
        }

        if (editing && _aeCJrnlBusy) {
            body.push(_aeHudInfo('Working\u2026'));
        } else if (editing) {
            body.push({ type: 'multilineTextInput', initialValue: _aeCJrnlEditDraft, placeholder: 'Edit this entry\u2026', onChange: function(v: string) { _aeCJrnlEditDraft = v; }, style: { minHeight: '120px', marginBottom: '6px' } } as UIPart);
            body.push(_aeHudRow([
                { type: 'button', text: 'Save', iconId: 'save', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(126,200,160,0.15)', color: '#7ec8a0' }, callback: async function() { await charJournalUpdateBubble(charId, b.id, _aeCJrnlEditDraft); _aeCJrnlEditingId = null; api.v1.ui.toast('Saved.', { type: 'success' }); await renderCharJournal(); } } as UIPart,
                { type: 'button', text: 'Cancel', iconId: 'x', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: async function() { _aeCJrnlEditingId = null; await renderCharJournal(); } } as UIPart
            ]));
            body.push(_aeHudRow([
                { type: 'button', text: 'Rewrite', iconId: 'feather', disabled: _aeCJrnlBusy, style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: function() { runCJrnlGen('rewrite', b).catch(function(e) { api.v1.error('[AE:hud] cjrnl rewrite:', e); }); } } as UIPart,
                { type: 'button', text: 'Compress', iconId: 'file-minus', disabled: _aeCJrnlBusy, style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: function() { runCJrnlGen('compress', b).catch(function(e) { api.v1.error('[AE:hud] cjrnl compress:', e); }); } } as UIPart
            ]));
        } else {
            body.push({ type: 'box', style: { maxHeight: '240px', overflowY: 'auto', padding: '8px 10px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)', borderRadius: '6px', marginBottom: '6px' }, content: [
                { type: 'text', text: (b.text && b.text.trim()) ? b.text : '(empty)', noTemplate: true, style: { fontSize: '12px', lineHeight: '1.5', whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap', wordBreak: 'break-word' } } as UIPart
            ] } as UIPart);
            body.push(_aeHudRow([
                { type: 'button', text: 'Edit', iconId: 'edit-3', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: async function() { _aeCJrnlEditDraft = b.text || ''; _aeCJrnlEditingId = b.id; await renderCharJournal(); } } as UIPart,
                isArchived
                    ? { type: 'button', text: 'Unarchive', iconId: 'refresh', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: async function() { await charJournalSetArchived(charId, b.id, false); api.v1.ui.toast('Restored — folds back into the lorebook entry.', { type: 'success' }); await renderCharJournal(); } } as UIPart
                    : { type: 'button', text: 'Archive', iconId: 'archive', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: async function() { await charJournalSetArchived(charId, b.id, true); api.v1.ui.toast('Archived \u2014 removed from the lorebook entry.', { type: 'success' }); await renderCharJournal(); } } as UIPart
            ]));
            body.push(_aeHudRow([
                { type: 'button', text: 'Rewrite', iconId: 'feather', disabled: _aeCJrnlBusy, style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: function() { runCJrnlGen('rewrite', b).catch(function(e) { api.v1.error('[AE:hud] cjrnl rewrite:', e); }); } } as UIPart,
                { type: 'button', text: 'Compress', iconId: 'file-minus', disabled: _aeCJrnlBusy, style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: function() { runCJrnlGen('compress', b).catch(function(e) { api.v1.error('[AE:hud] cjrnl compress:', e); }); } } as UIPart,
                { type: 'button', text: 'Delete', iconId: 'trash', disabled: _aeCJrnlBusy, style: { flex: '0 0 auto', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px', color: '#d98a8a' }, callback: async function() { await charJournalDeleteBubble(charId, b.id); if (_aeCJrnlEditingId === b.id) _aeCJrnlEditingId = null; api.v1.ui.toast('Deleted.', { type: 'success' }); await renderCharJournal(); } } as UIPart
            ]));
        }

        return { type: 'box', style: { padding: '8px', marginBottom: '8px', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', borderRadius: '8px', opacity: isArchived ? '0.55' : '1', backgroundColor: isArchived ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.01)' : 'rgba(126,200,160,0.04)' }, content: body } as UIPart;
    }

    async function renderCharJournal(): Promise<void> {
        const state = await loadCharJournal(charId);
        const active   = state.bubbles.filter(function(b) { return !b.archived; });
        const archived = state.bubbles.filter(function(b) { return b.archived; });
        const parts: UIPart[] = [];

        parts.push(_aeHudInfo('Active entries fold into ' + charName + '\u2019s own lorebook entry as running notes (toggle in World Settings \u2192 Lorebook Additions). Archived entries are kept but excluded. Nothing is auto-summarized — merge or archive as you see fit.'));

        parts.push(_aeHudSub('New entry'));
        parts.push({ type: 'multilineTextInput', initialValue: _aeCJrnlCompose, placeholder: 'Write a note for ' + charName + '\u2026', onChange: function(v: string) { _aeCJrnlCompose = v; }, style: { minHeight: '80px', marginBottom: '6px' } } as UIPart);
        parts.push({ type: 'button', text: 'Add', iconId: 'plus', disabled: _aeCJrnlBusy, style: { margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: async function() {
            const txt = (_aeCJrnlCompose || '').trim();
            if (!txt) { api.v1.ui.toast('Nothing to add.', { type: 'warning' }); return; }
            _aeCJrnlCompose = '';
            await charJournalAddBubble(charId, txt);
            api.v1.ui.toast('Added.', { type: 'success' });
            await renderCharJournal();
        } } as UIPart);

        const tools: UIPart[] = [];
        if (active.length > 1) {
            tools.push({ type: 'button', text: 'Merge all', iconId: 'chevrons-down', disabled: _aeCJrnlBusy, style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: async function() {
                const n = active.length;
                await charJournalMergeDown(charId);
                _aeCJrnlEditingId = null;
                api.v1.ui.toast('Merged ' + n + ' entries into one.', { type: 'success' });
                await renderCharJournal();
            } } as UIPart);
        }
        if (archived.length > 0) {
            tools.push({ type: 'button', text: (_aeCJrnlShowArchived ? 'Hide archived (' + archived.length + ')' : 'Show archived (' + archived.length + ')'), iconId: 'archive', style: { flex: '1 1 0', margin: 0, fontSize: '11px' }, callback: async function() { _aeCJrnlShowArchived = !_aeCJrnlShowArchived; await renderCharJournal(); } } as UIPart);
        }
        if (tools.length > 0) parts.push(_aeHudRow(tools));

        parts.push(_aeHudSub('Entries (' + active.length + ')'));
        if (active.length === 0) parts.push(_aeHudInfo('No entries yet. Add one above.'));
        else active.forEach(function(b) { parts.push(renderCJBubble(b, false)); });

        if (_aeCJrnlShowArchived && archived.length > 0) {
            parts.push(_aeHudSub('Archived (' + archived.length + ')'));
            archived.forEach(function(b) { parts.push(renderCJBubble(b, true)); });
        }

        parts.push(_aeHudClose(function() { return cjHandle; }));
        try { if (cjHandle && !cjHandle.isClosed()) { await cjHandle.update({ content: parts }); return; } } catch (e) {}
        cjHandle = await openEngineModal({ id: 'ae-char-journal', title: charName + ' \u2014 Journal', size: 'medium', content: parts });
    }

    await renderCharJournal();
}

// ============================================================================
// LIVE CHAT TAB  —  buildLiveChatTab()  [v2.5.0 CE-CHATS]
//
// The in-document wizard chat's control surface, rendered as the "Live Chat" tab
// INSIDE the existing World-Build Wizard modal (openWizardModal). Reached from the
// native "Wizard" toolbar button or the sidebar. Two states:
//   inactive -> pick a persona (+ optional Always-On context) and start, OR resume
//               a saved chat pulled from the CE Chats lorebook category;
//   active   -> Summarize->Preview (editable, save to lorebook), Save & Close,
//               Discard, plus live Always-On context toggles.
// It renders into the host modal's content and refreshes through the modal's own
// redraw() (passed in as 'refresh'); persona-pick / resume close the modal first
// (via 'closeModal') so start's toast + decorations aren't stacked under it.
// ============================================================================
var _wizModalPreview: string = '';   // last summary preview text ('' = none shown)
var _wizModalCtxPick: any = {};      // { entryId: true } — context preselected for a not-yet-started chat
var _wizDiscardArmed: boolean = false;   // [v2.5.0] two-tap guard for Discard (no window.confirm in the Worker)
var _wizDiscardTimer: any = null;

async function _wizPickPersonaAndStart(closeModal: () => Promise<void>): Promise<void> {
    let cfg = await loadConfig();
    let topics = ((cfg as any).wizardTopics && (cfg as any).wizardTopics.length) ? (cfg as any).wizardTopics : DEFAULT_WIZARD_TOPICS;
    let ctx = Object.keys(_wizModalCtxPick);
    try { await closeModal(); } catch (_e) {}
    await openPickerModal({
        title: 'Choose a wizard persona',
        items: topics,
        getId: function(t: any) { return t.id; },
        getLabel: function(t: any) { return t.label; },
        getSublabel: function(t: any) { return (t.commitKind === 'concept') ? 'general' : ''; },
        searchable: true,
        pinnedOptions: [ { id: '__generic__', label: 'General worldbuilding', icon: '\u2728', onSelect: async function() { await startLiveWizardChat('', ctx); _wizModalCtxPick = {}; } } ],
        onSelect: async function(t: any) { await startLiveWizardChat(t.id, ctx); _wizModalCtxPick = {}; }
    });
}

async function buildLiveChatTab(refresh: () => Promise<void>, closeModal: () => Promise<void>): Promise<UIPart[]> {
    let parts: UIPart[] = [];
    let entries = await listWizChatEntries();

    if (_aeLiveWiz.active) {
        parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'A wizard chat is live in your story, below the violet marker. Write in a new paragraph and press Send \u2014 no need to type curly braces, they\u2019re added for you. Blue paragraphs are your directions; violet are the wizard\u2019s. Close it here when you\u2019re done.', style: { fontSize: '12px', opacity: '0.85', marginBottom: '10px' } });
        // [v2.6.0] Renameable chat title, mirroring the classic wizard chat's 'Chat Name'
        // field. Defaults to the topic picked at start; never auto-stamped with a date.
        parts.push({ type: 'textInput', label: 'Chat name', initialValue: _aeLiveWiz.title || '', style: { marginBottom: '8px' }, onChange: async function(v: string) { _aeLiveWiz.title = v; await saveLiveWizState(); } });

        if (entries.length > 0) {
            let ctxRows: UIPart[] = [];
            for (let i = 0; i < entries.length; i++) {
                let e = entries[i];
                ctxRows.push({
                    type: 'checkboxInput',
                    label: (e.displayName || 'Untitled chat'),
                    initialValue: !!e.forceActivation,
                    onChange: (function(id) { return async function(v: boolean) {
                        try {
                            await setContextEntriesActivation([id], v);
                            if (v) { if (_aeLiveWiz.contextEntryIds.indexOf(id) < 0) _aeLiveWiz.contextEntryIds.push(id); }
                            else { _aeLiveWiz.contextEntryIds = _aeLiveWiz.contextEntryIds.filter(function(x) { return x !== id; }); }
                            await saveLiveWizState();
                        } catch (err) { api.v1.error('[AE:wizlive] live ctx toggle:', err); }
                    }; })(e.id)
                });
            }
            parts.push({ type: 'collapsibleSection', title: 'Context lorebooks (Always-On this session)', initialCollapsed: true, content: ctxRows });
        }

        if (_wizModalPreview) {
            parts.push({ type: 'multilineTextInput', label: 'Summary preview \u2014 edit, then save to the lorebook', initialValue: _wizModalPreview, onChange: function(v: string) { _wizModalPreview = v; }, style: { minHeight: '130px', marginTop: '8px' } });
            parts.push({ type: 'button', text: 'Save summary to CE Chats', style: { width: '100%', marginTop: '4px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(126,200,160,0.18)', border: '1px solid rgba(126,200,160,0.4)' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
                try {
                    let title = ((_aeLiveWiz.title || '').trim() || 'Wizard Chat') + ' \u2014 Summary';
                    await upsertChatEntry(null, title, [{ role: 'assistant', content: _wizModalPreview }], _aeLiveWiz.topicId);
                    api.v1.ui.toast('Summary saved to the CE Chats lorebook.', { type: 'success', autoClose: 3000 });
                    _wizModalPreview = '';
                    await refresh();
                } catch (e) { api.v1.error('[AE:wizlive] save summary:', e); api.v1.ui.toast('Could not save the summary.', { type: 'error', autoClose: 4000 }); }
            } });
        }

        parts.push({ type: 'text', text: '\u2500\u2500\u2500', style: { opacity: '0.2', textAlign: 'center', marginTop: '8px', marginBottom: '6px' } });
        parts.push({ type: 'button', text: 'Summarize \u2192 Preview', style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '4px' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
            try {
                api.v1.ui.toast('Summarizing the chat\u2026', { type: 'info', autoClose: 2500 });
                let s = await previewSummarizeLiveChat();
                if (s) { _wizModalPreview = s; await refresh(); }
                else api.v1.ui.toast('Nothing to summarize yet \u2014 send a turn first.', { type: 'warning', autoClose: 3500 });
            } catch (e) { api.v1.error('[AE:wizlive] summarize preview:', e); api.v1.ui.toast('Summarize failed \u2014 try again.', { type: 'error', autoClose: 4000 }); }
        } });
        parts.push({ type: 'button', text: 'Save & Close', style: { width: '100%', marginBottom: '4px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(126,200,160,0.2)', border: '1px solid rgba(126,200,160,0.45)', fontWeight: '600' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
            await endLiveWizardChat('save'); _wizModalPreview = ''; await refresh();
        } });
        parts.push({ type: 'button', text: _wizDiscardArmed ? 'Tap again to discard \u2014 the chat is deleted, not saved' : 'Discard chat', style: { width: '100%', backgroundColor: _wizDiscardArmed ? 'rgba(220,110,110,0.35)' : 'rgba(220,110,110,0.15)', border: '1px solid rgba(220,110,110,0.5)', fontWeight: _wizDiscardArmed ? '600' : 'normal' }, disabledWhileCallbackRunning: true, callback: async function() {
            if (!_wizDiscardArmed) {
                _wizDiscardArmed = true;
                // [BUGFIX v2.19.1] Bare setTimeout/clearTimeout don't exist in the Worker
                // sandbox -- this was the only setTimeout call anywhere in the file. The
                // clearTimeout below was already try/caught so it no-opped harmlessly, but
                // the setTimeout call that followed it was NOT guarded, so it threw a
                // ReferenceError that silently rejected this callback's promise before
                // _wizDiscardArmed's flip ever reached a refresh() -- the button visibly did
                // nothing. api.v1.timers.setTimeout/clearTimeout are the sandbox-safe
                // equivalents (both async, per script-types.txt).
                if (_wizDiscardTimer) { try { await api.v1.timers.clearTimeout(_wizDiscardTimer); } catch (_eT) {} }
                _wizDiscardTimer = await api.v1.timers.setTimeout(function() { _wizDiscardArmed = false; refresh().catch(function() {}); }, 4000);
                await refresh();
                return;
            }
            if (_wizDiscardTimer) { try { await api.v1.timers.clearTimeout(_wizDiscardTimer); } catch (_eT2) {} _wizDiscardTimer = null; }
            _wizDiscardArmed = false;
            await endLiveWizardChat('discard'); _wizModalPreview = ''; await refresh();
        } });
    } else {
        parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Start a wizard chat that lives right in your story document. Pick a persona and it drops in below a marker \u2014 write in a new paragraph and press Send, no need to type curly braces yourself. Saved chats live in the \u201cCE Chats\u201d lorebook category: resume them here, or switch them on as Always-On context for a chat or a batch generator.', style: { fontSize: '12px', opacity: '0.85', marginBottom: '10px' } });

        if (entries.length > 0) {
            let ctxRows: UIPart[] = [];
            for (let i = 0; i < entries.length; i++) {
                let e = entries[i];
                ctxRows.push({
                    type: 'checkboxInput',
                    label: (e.displayName || 'Untitled chat'),
                    initialValue: !!_wizModalCtxPick[e.id],
                    onChange: (function(id) { return function(v: boolean) { if (v) _wizModalCtxPick[id] = true; else delete _wizModalCtxPick[id]; }; })(e.id)
                });
            }
            parts.push({ type: 'collapsibleSection', title: 'Include saved chats as context (optional)', initialCollapsed: true, content: ctxRows });
        }

        parts.push({ type: 'button', text: 'Choose persona \u2192 Start chat', style: { width: '100%', marginTop: '4px', marginBottom: '4px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(147,112,219,0.2)', border: '1px solid rgba(147,112,219,0.45)', fontWeight: '600' }, callback: async function() { await _wizPickPersonaAndStart(closeModal); } });

        if (entries.length > 0) {
            parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'Resume a saved chat', style: { fontWeight: '600', fontSize: '12px', marginTop: '10px', marginBottom: '4px' } });
            for (let i = 0; i < entries.length; i++) {
                let e = entries[i];
                parts.push({ type: 'button', text: '\u21ba ' + (e.displayName || 'Untitled chat'), style: { width: '100%', textAlign: 'left', marginBottom: '2px', fontSize: '12px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.04)', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)' }, callback: (function(id) { return async function() {
                    try { await closeModal(); } catch (_e) {}
                    await resumeLiveWizardChatFromEntry(id);
                }; })(e.id) });
            }
        } else {
            parts.push({ type: 'text', text: 'No saved chats yet \u2014 start one above and Save & Close to bank it here.', style: { fontSize: '11px', opacity: '0.55', marginTop: '8px' } });
        }
    }

    return parts;
}

// ── Registration + mode switch ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Builds the script UI extension set (sidebar panel + optional toolbar tray) from
// the current cfg.interfaceMode and registers it. Re-callable to apply a mode change.
async function registerEngineUI(): Promise<void> {
    let cfg = await loadConfig();
    let mode = (cfg as any).interfaceMode || 'native';
    let ext: any[] = [
        { type: 'sidebarPanel', id: 'ce-panel', name: 'Adventure', iconId: 'compass', content: [{ type: 'text', text: 'Loading\u2026' }] }
    ];
    // [v2.51.0 TOOLBAR-ORDER, per user] Native tray order is Map, Inspect, Roster,
    // Wizard, Journal, Chat. Wizard + Chat remain the only two entry points a bridge-only
    // user gets (that mode has no native tray at all), so in bridge mode they are pushed
    // on their own; in native/both they slot into the full ordered tray. The descriptors
    // are defined once and reused across both branches so the bridge-only path cannot
    // drift from the native one.
    let btnWizard   = { type: 'toolbarButton', id: 'ae-tb-wizard',   text: 'Wizard',  iconId: 'star',           callback: function() { openWizardModal().catch(function(e) { api.v1.error('[AE:hud] wizard:', e); }); } };
    let btnCharchat = { type: 'toolbarButton', id: 'ae-tb-charchat', text: 'Chat',    iconId: 'message-circle', callback: function() { openCharChatPicker().catch(function(e) { api.v1.error('[AE:hud] charchat:', e); }); } };
    if (mode === 'native' || mode === 'both') {
        ext.push({ type: 'toolbarButton', id: 'ae-tb-map',     text: 'Map',     iconId: 'map',     callback: function() { openMapModal().catch(function(e) { api.v1.error('[AE:hud] map:', e); }); } });
        ext.push({ type: 'toolbarButton', id: 'ae-tb-inspect', text: 'Inspect', iconId: 'search',  callback: function() { openInspectModal().catch(function(e) { api.v1.error('[AE:hud] inspect:', e); }); } });
        ext.push({ type: 'toolbarButton', id: 'ae-tb-roster',  text: 'Roster',  iconId: 'users',   callback: function() { launchWorkspace('roster').catch(function(e) { api.v1.error('[AE:hud] roster:', e); }); } });
        ext.push(btnWizard);
        ext.push({ type: 'toolbarButton', id: 'ae-tb-journal', text: 'Journal', iconId: 'book',    callback: function() { openJournalModal().catch(function(e) { api.v1.error('[AE:hud] journal:', e); }); } });
        ext.push(btnCharchat);
    } else {
        ext.push(btnWizard);
        ext.push(btnCharchat);
    }
    await api.v1.ui.register(ext);
}

// [v0.9.9.5] Set a specific HUD mode (native | bridge | both) and re-register UI.
async function setInterfaceMode(mode: string): Promise<void> {
    try {
        if (mode !== 'native' && mode !== 'bridge' && mode !== 'both') mode = 'bridge';
        let cfg = await loadConfig();
        if (((cfg as any).interfaceMode || 'native') === mode) return;
        (cfg as any).interfaceMode = mode;
        await saveConfig(cfg);
        await registerEngineUI();
        await refreshSidebar();
        api.v1.ui.toast('HUD mode: ' + mode, { type: 'info', autoClose: 1500 });
    } catch (e) { api.v1.error('[AE:hud] setInterfaceMode:', e); }
}

// Cycles bridge -> native -> both -> bridge and re-registers the UI immediately.
async function cycleInterfaceMode(): Promise<void> {
    try {
        let cfg = await loadConfig();
        let cur = (cfg as any).interfaceMode || 'native';
        let next = (cur === 'bridge') ? 'native' : ((cur === 'native') ? 'both' : 'bridge');
        (cfg as any).interfaceMode = next;
        await saveConfig(cfg);
        await registerEngineUI();
        await refreshSidebar();
        api.v1.ui.toast('HUD mode: ' + next, { type: 'info', autoClose: 1800 });
    } catch (e) { api.v1.error('[AE:hud] cycleInterfaceMode:', e); }
}

api.v1.hooks.register('onScriptsLoaded', async function() {
    try {
        // 1. Register NAI UI: sidebar panel + (when cfg.interfaceMode is native/both)
        //    the native toolbar HUD tray. Bridge mode registers the panel only.
        await registerEngineUI();

        // 2. Permissions
        await api.v1.permissions.request(['fileInput', 'fileDownload', 'lorebookEdit', 'storyEdit', 'documentEdit', 'editorDecorations']);
        await api.v1.timers.sleep(300);

        // 3. [CHANGE] Load image settings before bridge connects so auto-snap is ready.
        await loadImageSettings();

        // 3b. [v0.9.7.9] Lorebook world-pack auto-import. Runs only when storyStorage
        //     has no config (fresh story created from a packed scenario). Non-destructive:
        //     existing stories are always skipped. Runs before bridge handshake so the
        //     first SCENE_STATE_UPDATE already reflects the imported world.
        try { await loadConfigFromLorebook(); } catch (eLcInit) { aeLog('[AE:pack] init import error:', eLcInit); }

        // 4. [CHANGE] Pre-seed cachedCharVisuals from storage so getCharacterData() works
        //    immediately on the first generation, even before bridge handshake completes.
        await buildCharacterDataPayload();

        // 5. [CHANGE] initMessaging() — sends HANDSHAKE_REQUEST to bridge. When bridge
        //    ACKs, handleBridgeMessage → broadcastCharacterData + broadcastSceneState.
        await initMessaging();

        // 5b. [v2.4.0 WIZLIVE] Rehydrate an in-document wizard chat left open in this
        //     story (marker re-verified against the live document; stale state cleared).
        try { await restoreLiveWizOnStartup(); } catch (eLw) { aeLog('[AE:wizlive] startup restore error:', eLw); }

        // 5c. [v2.21.0 CHARCHAT] Same rehydration contract for an in-story character chat
        //     (marker re-verified against the live document; stale state cleared and the
        //     pinned max_tokens restored — a stranded 120-token cap would otherwise
        //     silently truncate every story generation).
        try { await restoreCharChatOnStartup(); } catch (eCc) { aeLog('[AE:charchat] startup restore error:', eCc); }

        // 6. Story init path
        const rawIndex = await api.v1.storyStorage.get(STORAGE_INDEX);
        const isFreshStory = !rawIndex || (Array.isArray(rawIndex) && (rawIndex as any[]).length === 0);

        // [BUGFIX v2.3.3] refreshSidebar() used to live inside the isFreshStory
        // branch below, so it only ever ran on a brand-new story. registerEngineUI()
        // (step 1 above) registers the ce-panel sidebarPanel with a hardcoded
        // '{ type: "text", text: "Loading…" }' placeholder as its initial content —
        // refreshSidebar() -> buildSidebar() is what's supposed to replace that with
        // the real panel. For every returning/existing story, nothing ever called
        // it, so the native sidebar was stuck on the literal placeholder forever.
        // Moved out here so it always runs regardless of freshness; only the
        // fresh-story-specific migration kick stays gated below.
        await refreshSidebar();

        if (isFreshStory) {
            queueSceneStateBroadcast();
        }

        aeLog('[AE] Adventure Engine initialized.');
    } catch (e) {
        api.v1.error('[AE] Init error:', e);
    }
});
